entries.title: Elevated Fashion Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Transform this photo into an elevated fashion studio portrait. Choose a complementing-color background that enhances the subject's skin tone. Keep a tight head-and-shoulder composition with the subject centered and facing the camera straight with an optimistic expression. Apply directional lighting with subtle shadows. Preserve natural skin tones while making the image polished, minimal, and editorial-like a magazine photoshoot.
entries.description: A prompt to transform any photo into a professional studio headshot with minimal editorial aesthetics and directional lighting.

entries.title: Golden Hour Identity-Preserving Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use my uploaded portrait photo only as the identity reference. Only reference the person's real facial features, face shape, proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, hairline, hair volume, and overall natural appearance. Do not copy the original clothing, background, lighting, pose, or image quality from the uploaded portrait. Accurately preserve the person's real identity and realism. Do not turn the subject into someone else. Do not over-beautify. Do not make the skin look plastic. Do not make the image anime-like or illustrated.

Create a highly realistic vertical portrait photo set on a quiet coastal road during golden hour at sunset. The background should include the ocean, a curved seaside road, roadside railings, and a clean modern white seaside café with large glass windows and a few simple tables and chairs. The environment should feel like a real travel photo taken near the coast.

Show a young adult woman standing naturally on the road or near the roadside, holding a smartphone casually in one hand. This version should be framed closer than a full-body shot, around a medium shot or medium-close portrait. The subject should be looking directly at the camera with a soft, calm, natural expression. Her pose should feel relaxed, gentle, and slightly candid rather than stiff or overly posed.

Do not lock the clothing to one exact outfit. Instead, automatically generate clothing that best suits the uploaded person's appearance, hairstyle, and overall vibe. The outfit should feel stylish, clean, youthful, and suitable for a seaside golden-hour scene. It may use soft white, cream, red, pastel, or other sunset-friendly tones, but it must remain natural and wearable. Avoid exaggerated cosplay styling or artificial fashion-editorial distortion. The clothing should have realistic fabric texture, natural folds, and believable structure.

Use real golden sunset lighting. The sun should be low in the sky, casting warm light across the scene and creating soft golden rim light around the hair. The ocean should reflect the sunset. The sky should transition naturally from pale blue to warm yellow and orange. Keep the face properly exposed and preserve natural skin texture, subtle pores, gentle shading, and real tonal variation. The overall feeling should be warm, dreamy, clean, and realistic.

The photography style should feel like a real high-quality phone or digital camera portrait with a natural travel snapshot atmosphere. Use a vertical 9:16 composition. The framing should be closer, with the subject occupying more of the image while still keeping part of the coastal road, the sea, and the seaside café visible in the background. Keep realistic perspective, natural hair movement, believable shadows, and authentic photo detail.

No text, no watermark, no logo, no platform label.

Negative Prompt:

watermark, text, logo, platform label, signature, caption, qr code, anime, illustration,
entries.description: An advanced prompt designed to maintain a person's facial identity while placing them in a new coastal setting during sunset, emphasizing realism and natural textures over artificial beauty filters.

entries.title: Summer Balcony Film Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic outdoor lifestyle portrait in a dreamy summer film photography style, 3:4 vertical composition. Use the uploaded portrait only as the identity and hairstyle reference. Preserve the person's facial identity, face shape, natural facial features, skin tone, hairstyle, hair length, hair volume, and general body proportions accurately. Do not copy the original portrait's clothes, background, lighting, pose, or image quality. The subject is standing on an upper-floor balcony, leaning slightly forward over a dark blue metal railing and looking directly into the camera with a calm, soft, gentle expression. The camera is positioned from a low angle below the balcony, creating a natural upward-looking perspective, as if someone is looking up at the subject from the courtyard. The scene takes place on a bright sunny day outside a quiet residential building. The background includes a pale white exterior wall, a slanted roof edge, clean blue sky, and soft green tree leaves in the foreground. Some leaves should be close to the lens and slightly blurred, creating natural depth and a candid summer atmosphere. The subject wears a simple white summer dress or soft white blouse with a clean youthful look. The styling should feel fresh, natural, and realistic, not overly fashionable or staged. Hair should move slightly in the breeze, with fine hair strands catching the sunlight. Keep the pose relaxed and natural, with one or both hands lightly touching the balcony railing. Lighting should be bright natural daylight with strong backlight from the upper sky, soft lens flare, glowing rim light around the hair, slight overexposure in the highlights, and a warm nostalgic summer feeling. The image should look like a real photograph taken with a vintage digital camera or soft film camera: gentle grain, soft focus, natural skin texture, subtle haze, slightly washed colors, realistic shadows, and no heavy beauty retouching. Make the final image feel like a real-life candid summer portrait, romantic, clean, airy, youthful, and cinematic. No text, no logo, no watermark. Negative Prompt: anime, illustration, cartoon, 3D render, CGI, doll-like face, plastic skin, overly smooth skin, heavy retouching, fake face, distorted face, wrong facial identity, changed hairstyle, changed hair length, extra limbs, deformed hands, broken fingers, unnatural wrist, bad anatomy, strange body proportions, stiff pose,
entries.description: Generates a nostalgic, film-style portrait of a subject on a summer balcony using a reference photo for identity preservation.

entries.title: Handcrafted Mixed Media Portrait Painting
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a highly detailed mixed media portrait painting of the subject's face, combining layered acrylic brush strokes, charcoal smudges, pencil sketches, rough paint splashes, collage textures, paper grain, expressive ink marks, and imperfect handcrafted details to create an authentic human-made artwork appearance. The overall composition should feel raw, artistic, and naturally imperfect, avoiding overly clean or overly polished digital results.

Use bright, eye-catching, and dynamic colors with rich tonal variation so the artwork feels vibrant and visually engaging without looking monotonous. Add visible skin texture details, layered paint textures, subtle rough strokes, and organic imperfections to enhance realism and artistic depth. The mixed media style should also influence the entire visual presentation, including the outfit and surrounding artistic elements, so the final artwork feels cohesive and fully immersed in the mixed media aesthetic.

The subject's pose and facial expression must appear relaxed, expressive, lively, and natural, avoiding stiff body language, awkward posing, or gloomy emotional tones. The pose, angle, expression, and overall composition must be clearly different from the attached reference photo while still maintaining the subject's identity.

The modern, stylish, casual, and fashion-forward with layered clothing details, trendy contemporary fashion elements, unique textures, and visually interesting accessories that enhance the artistic mood. Avoid plain, generic, repetitive, or standard clothing designs, and ensure the outfit is completely different from the clothing shown in the reference image.

Focus on creating a visually balanced artwork with an expressive artistic atmosphere, realistic handcrafted imperfections, rich mixed media layering, and strong emotional energy, while still maintaining an elegant and aesthetically pleasing portrait composition.
entries.description: A prompt for creating a raw, artistic portrait that mimics traditional human-made art using acrylics, charcoal, and paper textures.

entries.title: Cozy Korean Living Room Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cozy living room portrait of a beautiful Korean woman sitting sideways on a soft cream-colored couch at night, turning gently over her shoulder toward the camera with a soft shy smile. Legs mostly hidden from the frame by the oversized fluffy pastel pink hoodie and couch angle, creating a cozy modest composition. Long silky black hair flowing naturally down her back, glossy eyes, soft blush makeup, natural skin texture, dreamy youthful Korean beauty aesthetic.
Warm ambient apartment lighting mixed with subtle realistic iPhone flash photography for soft highlights and cinematic shadows. Cozy Korean-style living room with cream furniture, fluffy blankets, soft pillows, candles, warm table lamps, pastel flowers, cute photo cards on the wall, aesthetic coffee table decor, fashion books, soft curtains, and nighttime city lights glowing outside large windows.
Romantic slice-of-life atmosphere, intimate late-night mood, candid relaxed pose, cozy feminine aesthetic, soft pink and cream tones, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, highly detailed, photorealistic Korean apartment vibe, soft glow, lifestyle editorial photography, calm comforting atmosphere.

entries.title: Korean Style Academic Studio Portrait Series
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, generate **9 different individually retouched portrait photos** at once, uniform in **3:4 vertical composition**.

The theme is:

**"High-Intelligence Academy Style Retro Wood Grain Studio Photoshoot"**

Overall temperament reference:
High-intelligence feel, academy girl, light retro, fashion studio shoot, smart coldness, a bit of distance, refined but restrained, magazine feel, slight rebellion, Korean fashion photoshoot feel.

---

## 1. Character Consistency

Please strictly preserve the user's real identity characteristics, including but not limited to:

- Face shape
- Facial feature proportions
- Eye shape
- Nose shape
- Lip shape
- Skin color
- Sense of age
- Hairstyle basis
- Body type
- Overall temperament

All 9 photos must clearly look like the **same real girl**, cannot turn into a stranger, cannot be Westernized, cannot be internet-famous style, cannot over-smooth skin, cannot have an AI fake faces, and cannot randomly change the sense of age.

If the user is not originally blonde, do not forcefully change to blonde. The whole is based on the user themselves, only doing style makeup/clothing extensions.

---

## 2. Overall Style Positioning

This is not a regular campus shoot, nor is it a sweet graduation photo.
The set should present a feeling of **High-Intelligence Academy Style + Retro Studio + Cold Fashion Sense**.

Keywords:

- High-intelligence feel
- Academy style
- Light retro
- Fashion studio
- Cold and restrained
- Micro-rebellion
- Girly but not childish
- Wood grain background
- Editorial/classroom prop feel
- Magazine blockbuster feel

The picture is like a set of high-completion studio theme shoots, emphasizing uniform aesthetics and a complete set feel.

---

## 3. Scene Setting

The scene is an **indoor retro photography studio**.

Background and spatial elements can include:

- Large area of deep brown wood grain wall
- Dark green or ink green floor
- Wooden student chairs / desk chairs
- Stack of books
- Typewriter
- Old-fashioned telephone
- Geometric teaching aids
- Oversized wooden protractor / triangle / ruler
- Pencils
- Scattered books
- Simple retro props

The overall layout should be simple but designed, focusing on highlighting the wood grain background, academy props, and character.

---

## 4. Clothing and Styling

The overall clothing is **High-Intelligence Academy Girl Fashion Styling**.

Suggested clothing elements:

- Black or deep navy blue loose blazer
- Shirt
- Tie
- Short skirt or pleated skirt
- Long boots / mid-calf boots / academy style footwear
- Bow hair accessories or simple hair accessories
- Exquisite earrings

Overall requirements:

- Clear academy feel
- Clear fashion feel
- Slight top student / cold girl temperament
- No over-sexualization or vulgarity
- No excessive cuteness or childishness
- No cheap cosplay feel

---

## 5. Hairstyle and Makeup

Hairstyle can be:

- Long straight hair
- Smooth long hair
- Slightly wavy long hair
- With air bangs or natural bangs
- With black and white bow hair accessories or small hair accessories

Makeup is:

- Clean base makeup
- Clear eyeliner
- Exquisite eye makeup
- Natural eyelashes
- Pale pink or nude lip makeup
- Overall leaning towards cold, exquisite, high-intelligence feel

Temperament should have:
Smart, cold, slight alienation, restrained, like an academy girl who has very good grades but doesn't like to please others.

---

## 6. 9 Photo Lens Designs

Please generate **9 different individual photos**, no collages, no four-grids, no nine-grids.
The 9 photos must be like the same set of photoshoot results, maintaining **the same person, same makeup/styling system, same scene system, same color tone**, but each photo's lens, action, expression, and prop interaction must be significantly different.

### Photo 1: Full body standing + Chair
The person stands on a wooden student chair or next to the chair, holding an oversized wooden protractor. Full body in frame, upright posture, eyes calmly looking at the camera, cold and restrained temperament, highlighting leg lines, clothing silhouette, and scene design sense.

### Photo 2: Full body standing + Holding books
The person stands in front of the wood grain background, holding several books in both hands, body slightly leaning forward or lightly crossed standing posture. Expression is quiet, cold, smart. Full body composition, highlighting academy feel and the whole styling.

### Photo 3: Horizontal sitting/lying + Phone interaction
The person sits horizontally or half-lies on a row of wooden chairs, holding an old-fashioned telephone receiver in hand. Legs naturally extended, relaxed posture. The picture should have an obvious fashion sense and a bit of rebellion, like a styling photo in a magazine blockbuster.

### Photo 4: Medium close-up + Protractor + Pencil
The person sits on a chair, with an oversized wooden protractor in front, holding a pencil in one hand and lightly supporting the protractor with the other. The picture is a medium close-up, expressing a sense of thinking, bookish air, and high-intelligence girl temperament.

### Photo 5: Sitting on ground leaning on book stack
The person sits on the ground, leaning against a wood grain wall or book stack, arms naturally crossed or hugging knees, with a typewriter and books nearby. Eyes looking directly at the camera, cold temperament, a bit of pride. Composition is medium shot.

### Photo 6: Close-up profile + Protractor
The person's face is close to the oversized wooden protractor, hands naturally placed on the protractor, eyes looking forward to the side. The picture is a close-up, highlighting profile silhouette, eye makeup, hair accessories, hand details, and a quiet thinking temperament.

### Photo 7: Half-body close-up + Colored pencils
The person sits on a chair or near the camera, holding several colored pencils in each hand, lightly raising hands to display. Expression is cold and micro-cool, with a bit of a "smart and not to be messed with" girl aura. Composition is half-body close-up.

### Photo 8: Super close-up + Funny expression
Close-up of the person, a pencil placed horizontally on the nose, mouth slightly pouting, expression a bit slightly funny and impatient. Overall still maintains exquisite fashion sense, don't overdo the parody.

### Photo 9: Half-body close-up + Book interaction
The person holds an open book in both hands, the pages spread out below the face, one eye closed doing a wink, the other eye looking at the camera. The picture is a half-body close-up, the emotion is more dynamic and playful, as the photo with the most expression change in the set, the action and expression should be natural and vivid, looking like a candid shot not a pose.

---

## 7. Expression Control

The expressions in the whole set cannot be all the same.
Please assign different states in the 9 photos, including:

- Cold direct look
- Quiet daze
- Slight side look
- Slight alienation
- Thoughtful
- Faintly impatient
- Micro-cool
- Slightly funny
- wink blink

Note:
Even with funny and playful expressions, they must be built on the basis of "exquisite, high-end, fashion sense", and cannot become exaggerated silly emojis.

---

## 8. Photography and Quality

Photography texture must be real and high-end, like a professional studio shoot:

- Real photography texture
- Delicate skin texture
- Clear hair strands
- Soft but directional studio lighting
- Wood brown + dark green + black as main color tone
- Low saturation, slightly retro
- Clean and crisp composition
- Slight cinematic feel
- Magazine blockbuster feel

The picture should be clear, sharp, and textured, no low-res, no messy filters.

---

## 9. Negative Requirements

No collages. No nine-grids. No repeated angles. No standing in all 9 photos. No looking at camera in all 9 photos. No same expression in all 9 photos. No change of identity. No Western faces. No internet-famous faces. No cheap cosplay. No garbled text. No extra fingers. No hand deformities. No leg structure errors. No plastic skin. No over-smoothing. No AI fake faces.

---

## 10. Supplementary Stability Sentence

The 9 photos must look like the same complete set of photoshoot results:
**Same person, same clothing system, same scene system, same color tone system, same shooting theme**, 
but with significantly different lens distances, action designs, expression changes, and prop interactions. 
The overall effect is like a set of high-completion theme photos that can be published directly.

entries.title: Kawaii Four-Panel Selfie Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cute kawaii four-photo collage of the same young woman, preserving the uploaded portrait identity while changing the outfit and setting.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 portrait collage, soft pastel aesthetic, high-key lighting, clean white outer border and thick white dividers forming a 2 by 2 grid.

Layout: Show exactly 4 close-up portrait panels of the same person, cropped from upper chest to head. Panel 1, top left: she faces forward with both hands cupping her cheeks, elbows close together. Panel 2, top right: she faces forward and raises both hands in double peace signs near her shoulders. Panel 3, bottom left: she turns slightly sideways with a gentle shy pose, shoulders visible. Panel 4, bottom right: she faces forward with both hands tucked under her chin in a cute pose.

Subject details: The woman has dark brown hair styled in loose low side braids or pigtails with wispy strands around the face. She wears a light blue denim baseball cap with a small embroidered Sanrio-style yellow puppy patch and a red bow on the front, plus a distressed/frayed brim. Outfit is a white sleeveless camisole with lace trim and delicate vertical texture, soft feminine summer styling. Skin is fair and softly lit, with a gentle idol-photo look.

Background and decorations: Use a pastel pink bedroom or boutique-shelf background in each panel, softly blurred, with cute toy-like details. Add exactly 4 large translucent pink heart decorations: one at the top left corner, one at the top right corner, one at the bottom left corner, and one at the bottom right corner. Add exactly 6 pastel star stickers: one blue star near the top center divider, one pink star in the upper right panel, one pink star on the left side near the middle, one blue star on the left side of the lower-left panel, one purple star on the right side of the lower-right panel, and one blue star near the bottom center divider.

Visual style: Cute Japanese/Korean selfie booth aesthetic, dreamy pastel pink color palette, glossy soft focus, smooth skin retouching, bright diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, playful sticker overlays, realistic photography rather than illustration.

Constraints: Keep the same person consistent across all 4 panels. Use exactly 4 portrait panels, exactly 4 hearts, and exactly 6 stars. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no harsh shadows. The face should remain clearly visible unless privacy masking is intentionally requested via natural visible face.

entries.title: Ink Sketchbook Zine Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform any provided reference photo into a vertical 4:5 stylized ink-drawn sketchbook illustration.

Use the person, outfit, pose, accessories, pet, objects, mood, and overall character from the reference photo as the main subject. Do not copy fixed clothing or fixed phrases from previous examples. Adapt all visual details to the new reference image.

Create a high-detail black ink and fineliner illustration on a white sketchbook page. The drawing should fill almost the entire frame, with no fabric element, no colored cloth, and no extra textile foreground.

Composition:
- one main full-body or main portrait illustration based on the reference photo;
- 1-3 additional smaller sketch studies inspired by the same subject, such as side view, back view, close-up portrait, accessory detail, pet/object detail, or gesture pose;
- small hand-drawn decorative elements around the subject: hearts, stars, sparkles, arrows, leaves, dots, mood symbols, tiny doodles;
- balanced but dense sketchbook layout, editorial zine feeling.

All handwritten text must be in Russian only.
The text should be random, natural, and relevant to the mood, outfit, season, activity, personality, or atmosphere of the reference photo.
Do not repeat the same phrases every time.
Art style:
expressive handmade sketchbook aesthetic, nostalgic indie zine warmth, high-detail manga-influenced editorial line art, rich black India ink, fineliner, marker and brush-pen hatching, cross-hatching, varied pen nib strokes, subtle ink bleed, visible sketch construction lines.

Render textures from the reference carefully: fabric folds, hair, accessories, shoes, bags, jewelry, pets, objects, skin shadows, material surfaces, and distinctive silhouette.

Camera and format:
vertical 4:5 format, close-up overhead flatlay photo of a white sketchbook page, slightly tilted top-down angle around 20 degrees, centered composition, drawing filling the screen, visible paper grain and sketchbook edge.

Lighting:
soft natural diffused morning daylight from a window, even cool-key illumination, subtle diagonal page shadow, gentle softbox fill, neutral whites, deep blacks.

Image quality:
high-resolution print-quality output, 300 DPI, ultra-crisp ink detail, slight warm tone adjustment, contrast +15, clarity +10, subtle vignette, selective sharpening on ink strokes, minimal noise reduction to preserve paper texture.

Final look:
contemporary sketchbook photography meets editorial zine illustration, clean, polished, high-fidelity, suitable for print and portfolio presentation.

entries.title: Elegant White Qipao Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical photorealistic portrait of an elegant adult woman seated on the floor in a traditional Chinese-style wooden room, wearing a glossy white silk qipao-inspired bridal outfit with delicate frog closures, pearl accents, tassels, and a high side slit. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a muted brown skin-tone color. She has long wavy dark brown hair flowing over her shoulders, decorated with exactly two white floral pearl hair ornaments and exactly two translucent white ribbon bows. She wears exactly two sheer white opera gloves, exactly two white high-heeled Mary Jane shoes with ankle straps, and a sheer white stocking detail with pearl-and-flower trim on one thigh. Pose her sitting low with both knees raised close to the camera, one gloved hand near her face, creating a soft fashion editorial composition. The setting includes exactly one warm glowing paper lantern on a wooden table to the left, exactly one small white teapot on a low table in the background, dark wooden furniture, shoji-style window grids, hanging calligraphy scrolls, and white blossom branches on the right. entries.title: Minimalist Monochrome Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:

entries.title: 1990s Flash Camera Snapshot Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded image as the main reference. 

Transform the uploaded photo into a realistic candid portrait with an early 1990s digital camera aesthetic. Preserve the subject's identity, facial features, pose, outfit, and overall composition, but restyle the image with harsh blown-out flash highlights, subtle red-eye effect, low-resolution image quality, raw snapshot imperfections, nostalgic flash-filter styling, and a vintage timestamp look.

The final image should feel candid, imperfect, and authentic, like an old retro party or personal snapshot taken with an early consumer digital camera. Keep the background dark or naturally subdued when appropriate, maintain a direct-flash look, and give the image a raw, unpolished, memory-like atmosphere.

Include:
- harsh direct camera flash
- overexposed or blown-out highlights
- subtle red-eye effect
- low-resolution / soft digital detail
- slight grain or noisy texture
- authentic retro snapshot feeling
- vintage date/timestamp aesthetic in one corner
- candid, natural, imperfect energy

Avoid:
- cartoon or anime style
- overly polished beauty retouching
- studio lighting
- ultra-sharp modern DSLR look
- glossy AI skin
- text, logos, watermarks, or graphic overlays other than the timestamp aesthetic
- distorted anatomy or altered identity

Make the aspect ratio 3:4
entries.description: A prompt template to transform any photo into an authentic early 1990s digital camera snapshot, complete with harsh flash and vintage timestamps.

entries.title: New Chinese Koi Fine Art Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, generate a 2×2 four-grid collage with the theme "New Chinese Koi Couture Art Portrait."

[Character Consistency]
Strictly preserve the character's real identity features, including face shape, facial features proportion, eyebrow/eye structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hair foundation, body type, and overall temperament. The four small images must clearly look like the same real person. Do not turn them into strangers, do not westernize, do not use 'influencer' styles, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not generate AI fake faces.

[Overall Style]
High-end New Chinese commercial shooting, Oriental ink art masterpiece, red koi-themed brand photography. The scene should look like a high-budget commercial shoot completed in a professional studio, with complete makeup, lighting, set, clothing, and prop design. Overall high-end, agile, noble, and quiet, with Oriental aesthetics, fashion magazine feel, slight film grain, and soft oil painting texture.

[Makeup Requirements, Priority]
Exquisite New Chinese commercial shoot makeup: transparent and clean high-end base makeup, retaining real skin texture but with delicate quality; clearly defined natural eyebrows; refined eye makeup with elongated eyeliner, slight upward tail, soft tear troughs, and clean eyelashes. The face has natural contouring and highlights, emphasizing the nose bridge, cheekbones, jawline, and neck. Lip makeup is cinnabar red, jujube red, or classic velvet red, adding vitality and Oriental nobility. The overall makeup is sophisticated but not heavy.

[Hairstyle]
Carefully designed New Chinese low bun or loose Oriental bun: maintain the original hair base but clearly styled by a professional; hair has volume, layering, and natural curvature; hair strands are clean and glossy. A small amount of natural stray hair can frame the face. The four grid images must maintain the same hairstyle.

[Clothing]
A unified cinnabar red, koi red, or classic red New Chinese couture gown. The dress must have a clear sense of design and commercial texture, such as one-shoulder, off-shoulder, low back, silk wraps, long streamers, long trails, or Oriental pleat structures. Fabrics like heavy silk, satin, chiffon, or velvet must have a high-end drape and fluid feel. The red dress should echo the koi fins.

[Scene]
High-end art studio space with a light water blue, teal, or light cyan-gray ink-wash xuan paper background. The floor can have shallow water, mirror reflections, mist, and white lotus. 2-4 large red koi art installations made of semi-transparent red silk or gauze appear, looking like commercial props rather than real fish.

[Format]
Generate one 2x2 collage. All four small images are independent vertical compositions with a 3:4 aspect ratio, maintaining consistent styling and tone.

entries.title: Golden Hour Rooftop Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an authentic daily-life photographic image: a three-quarter full-body shot of a young East Asian Japanese woman in her early 20s standing alone on a residential rooftop at golden hour. Shoot from slightly below eye level at a three-quarter side angle, with her body turned left and her head angled slightly away from the camera; her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered rectangular warm-brown privacy blur covering the facial features. She has long, naturally straight fine black hair worn loose, backlit into a subtle amber halo, with two or three stray strands lifted by a light rooftop breeze. She wears a slightly oversized vintage-wash denim jacket over a plain white inner top, straight-cut dark trousers, and simple worn white sneakers; one hand rests in a jacket pocket while the other hangs relaxed at her side. Place her near a low concrete rooftop parapet, with one visible industrial outdoor air-conditioning unit in the left foreground and grey rooftop pipes adding realistic texture. The background is softly blurred residential rooftops and a distant city skyline receding into an orange-tinted horizon, with the low sun glowing at the far right. Use warm low-angle sunset light, amber-orange rim lighting along her hair, shoulder, cheek area, and jacket edge, natural shadows, subdued urban colors, realistic lens bokeh, fine film-like grain, and candid documentary realism rather than fashion posing. Vertical composition, full body visible from head to shoes, quiet contemplative mood, no text, no logos.
entries.description: Generates a realistic candid rooftop portrait of a young woman at sunset with urban skyline bokeh, denim styling, and an anonymized face.

entries.title: Lady of Red Poppies Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic fine-art portrait titled The Lady of Red Poppies: a pale-skinned woman in strict side profile facing right, cropped from chest to top of head, with her face intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square overlay in a muted red-to-gray vertical gradient. She has a short smooth bob of silver-white hair with wispy strands and heavy side-swept bangs, styled like a sculptural wig. Her head is crowned with exactly 8 red poppy elements: 1 large open poppy centered on the left front of the hair, 1 tall open poppy rising above the crown, 1 small curled bud on a thin stem at the far upper left, 1 small bud on the lower left side, 1 blurred red poppy in the background above the head, 1 open poppy partly visible on the upper right, 1 large cropped poppy at the right edge, and 1 lower-right red poppy petal cluster. The poppies have delicate translucent crinkled petals, dark centers, and thin dark curved stems emerging from the hair. Dress her in a minimalist high-collared black coat or turtleneck with soft matte fabric, giving a somber fashion-editorial silhouette. Use a shallow depth of field with the hair and foremost poppy sharply detailed while the distant flowers and background are blurred. Set the scene outdoors in a misty gray atmosphere with a soft horizon and a low field of defocused red poppies near the bottom. Lighting is overcast, cool, and diffused, with muted tones except for saturated crimson flowers; composition vertical 3:4, subject slightly left of center, elegant surreal botanical portrait, photorealistic, high detail, painterly bokeh, melancholic and refined.

entries.title: Chiaroscuro Rim-Lit Male Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A dramatic high-contrast studio portrait of a young man with dark messy hair and a well groomed beard, captured in a close-up vertical composition against a completely black background. The subject is photographed in a strong side-profile pose, body turned away from the camera while his head rotates slightly over the shoulder toward the right side of the frame, creating a cinematic and contemplative mood.
He wears translucent acetate-framed sunglasses with glossy reflections and subtle texture visible inside the semi-transparent frames. His expression is calm, serious, and introspective.
The portrait uses intense back rim-lighting from behind and slightly above, creating a bright glowing edge around the contours of the hair, ear, beard, nose bridge, shoulder, and neckline. Most of the face remains in deep shadow, producing a striking chiaroscuro effect. Tiny illuminated dust particles are faintly visible around the rim-lit hair, enhancing the atmospheric studio realism.
The subject wears a fitted matte black t-shirt with subtle woven fabric texture and visible shoulder seams softly highlighted by the rim light. The black clothing blends seamlessly into the dark background while maintaining edge definition through controlled highlights.
Shot with an 85mm prime portrait lens at eye level using a shallow depth of field, keeping the eye area, beard texture, and glasses crisp while allowing softer focus toward the edges. The entire image should maintain rich monochrome tones with deep blacks, sharp white highlights, and clean neutral grayscale transitions.
Ultra-realistic monochrome portrait photography, cinematic studio lighting, luxury editorial aesthetic, dramatic rim-light profile shot, detailed salt-and-pepper beard texture, fashion magazine quality, moody masculine portrait, fine skin texture, minimalist black background, premium artistic photography style.
entries.description: A dramatic studio portrait of a bearded man with high-contrast rim lighting against a black background, emphasizing texture and mood.

entries.title: Vintage Qipao Mother and Daughter Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please generate a vintage Qipao-style mother-daughter photo shoot based on the two real female photos uploaded by the user. Character settings: The young woman is the daughter, 28 years old; the older woman is the mother, 56 years old. Please strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of each person, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, sense of age, hairstyle base, and overall temperament. The mother should retain a natural sense of maturity and slight traces of time; nasolabial folds should be shallow, not too heavy, but not completely smoothed out. The daughter should maintain her young, natural, and delicate characteristics. Overall style: Vintage Oriental Qipao photo shoot, quiet, gentle, and dignified, with the atmosphere of a commemorative mother-daughter portrait. The image features soft studio lighting, with a slight film feel and a faint oil painting quality. The background is a grey-green, blue-grey, or slate-grey vintage studio backdrop, potentially including slight flower branches, canvas texture, or Chinese wooden elements. Clothing and hairstyle: The mother wears a light grey-green, lake blue, or grey-blue traditional Qipao; the daughter wears a dark blue, navy, or black-blue improved Qipao. Both outfits belong to the same visual system. Hairstyles should be handled naturally based on original hair length, overall appearing dignified and neat with a Chinese-style updos or gathered feel; long hair can be a low bun or chignon, while short hair maintains its base with a side part, tucked behind the ears, or a vintage short hairstyle. Quality requirements: Realistic photographic texture, low saturation, high-end, and soft; no excessive skin smoothing, no 'fake' faces. Composition 1: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, double half-body composition, characters close together, balanced and relaxed. Content 1: Mother and daughter standing side-by-side, daughter on one side of the mother, body leaning slightly toward her, naturally holding the mother's arm or leaning on her shoulder. Both look at the camera with gentle, quiet, and dignified expressions, carrying a restrained natural smile. Atmosphere 1: This image focuses on the formal, authentic, and dignified visual of a mother-daughter commemorative portrait. Composition 2: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, close-up or near half-body composition, highlighting the relationship between faces, shoulders, and hands. Content 2: Daughter approaches gently from behind or the side-rear of the mother, one hand resting naturally on the mother's shoulder. There should be a natural interactive response: they could be smiling at each other, or the daughter looking tenderly at the mother while the mother turns her head slightly in response. Overall intimate, soft, and companionable. Atmosphere 2: Focuses on the authentic, gentle, and responsive sense of the mother-daughter relationship. Composition 3: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, medium or 3/4 body composition, clearly showing the relationship between sitting and standing postures and displaying part of the Qipao silhouettes. Content 3: Mother sitting on a Chinese wooden chair, daughter standing behind or to the side-rear, one hand resting gently on the mother's shoulder or the chair back. Both look at the camera, with quiet, calm, and dignified expressions. A small side table, blue and white porcelain vase, and white flower branches can be added on one side as accents. Atmosphere 3: Focuses on the layers of the mother-daughter relationship and the vintage sense of ritual. Composition 4: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, full-body or near full-body composition, natural and relaxed proportions, fully displaying the overall styling. Content 4: Mother and daughter standing side-by-side, daughter naturally close to the mother, possibly holding her arm. Mother can naturally hold a round silk fan or have hands naturally folded. Both look at the camera together, with gentle, dignified, and peaceful expressions. Background can include Chinese wooden frames, a side table, blue and white porcelain, or light-colored flower branches to enhance completeness. Atmosphere 4: The complete mother-daughter commemorative portrait of the set, focusing on overall styling, complete composition, and a gentle, dignified mother-daughter temperament.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for generating a series of vintage Oriental-style studio portraits for mothers and daughters, focusing on preserving facial features and creating a nostalgic film texture.

entries.title: Executive Professional Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: [Men's Version Prompt] Based on the front-facing photo I uploaded, generate a professional men's studio business portrait. Please strictly preserve the authentic identity features of the person in the photo, including face shape, facial feature proportions, eyebrow and eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, perceived age, facial texture, hairline, and hairstyle. Do not turn the person into someone else, do not over-rejuvenate, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not generate a fake AI face. The final result must look like a high-quality professional portrait of the same individual. The visual style should refer to high-end corporate executive headshots, LinkedIn business portraits, and management photos on official company websites. The person faces the camera, using a classic head-and-shoulders portrait composition, capturing from the chest to the head. The posture is natural and upright, with shoulders relaxed but conveying a sense of power. Eyes look directly into the camera, with a confident, steady, and approachable expression featuring a restrained smile, presenting a professional, reliable, and authoritative aura. Please replace the clothing with a well-tailored dark gray textured suit, a crisp white shirt inside, and a high-quality navy blue tie. The suit should be well-fitting, smooth, with a business texture; the collar, shoulder lines, and tie knot should be clear and natural. Avoid exaggerated luxury or looking like wedding or studio art photos. Use soft, flattering professional studio lighting. The main light shines from the front-side, creating natural light and shadow levels on the face, with slight catchlights in the eyes and realistic skin texture. The overall look is clean and high-end. Avoid harsh hard light, overexposure, greasy reflections, and heavy shadows. The background is a smooth, blurred gradient from medium gray to warm taupe, simple, clean, without clutter, text, or logos. The background is only used to set off the subject and should not distract. Photo requirements: realistic photographic feel, commercial portrait photography, high resolution, clear details, natural skin tone, high-end texture, stable composition, subject centered, coordinated head-to-shoulder ratio. Aspect ratio 3:4. [Women's Version Prompt] Based on the front-facing photo I uploaded, generate a professional women's studio business portrait. Please strictly preserve the authentic identity features of the person in the photo, including face shape, facial feature proportions, eyebrow and eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, perceived age, facial texture, hairline, and hairstyle. Do not turn the person into someone else, do not over-rejuvenate, do not over-beautify, and do not generate a fake AI face. The overall styling should be high-end, clean, and sharp; avoid being overly sexy, avoid exaggerated fashion, and do not look like internet celebrity photos or studio art portraits. The blazer's shoulder lines, collar, fabric texture, and layering should be clear and natural. Please keep the hair and makeup natural and authentic, suitable for formal professional settings. entries.title: Eiffel Tower Low-Angle Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic travel selfie shot from a low angle directly beneath the Eiffel Tower in Paris on a bright cloudless day, with the tower rising dramatically overhead and centered in perfect vertical symmetry against a vivid blue sky. In the foreground, a young woman with medium brown shoulder-length straight hair stands very close to the camera, holding the phone slightly below chest level for an upward-facing selfie perspective. Her face is mostly neutral and relaxed, with a casual candid vacation-photo feel. She wears a fitted ribbed strapless tube top in light pink, high-waisted white jeans, and 2 thin layered silver necklaces. Her skin is warmly lit by strong midday sunlight, with crisp natural shadows from the tower structure and subtle highlights on her shoulders and collarbone. Frame the subject from mid-thigh to head, with one arm extended toward the camera in a natural selfie pose. Emphasize realistic smartphone photography, sharp architectural detail in the iron lattice beneath the Eiffel Tower, authentic tourist snapshot composition, natural body proportions, clean summer styling, and high-detail photorealism. Make it look like a real handheld vacation selfie of a stylish young woman in Paris, not a studio image.

entries.title: Premium Sporty Creator Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Based on the uploaded personal photo, generate a realistic premium studio sporty creator portrait of the same person. Preserve the person's real identity above all else. Strictly keep the face recognizable, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, and overall likeness. The result must clearly look like the same person, not a different person and not a synthetic AI face. Do not preserve the original facial expression if it looks like an ID photo, a stiff neutral face, an awkward smile, or weak eye contact. Replace it with a refined sporty portrait expression: calm, confident, softly serious, self-possessed, and quietly strong. The eyes should have direct eye contact with the camera, with a steady focused gaze and subtle intensity. The mouth should remain relaxed and closed, without a smile. The overall facial expression should project confidence through restraint, discipline, and composure. Create a clean, healthy, feminine, athletic, premium sporty creator portrait. Hair and grooming: Keep the hairstyle believable for the person. Preserve recognizable hair length, hairline, fringe or bangs if present, overall hair color, and facial framing. If the person has short hair, keep it short in a polished sporty way. If the person has longer hair, light styling or a neat sporty arrangement is allowed. A few soft natural strands around the face are welcome if suitable. Use a natural no-makeup makeup look, fresh healthy skin, subtly defined eyes, natural brows, and soft neutral lips. Outfit: A fitted burgundy sporty top or fitted short-sleeve crop top, paired with high-waisted black fitted pants or sleek black athletic-casual trousers. Keep the styling clean, minimal, sporty-feminine, tasteful, and not exaggerated. Show realistic fabric texture and natural folds. No distracting accessories. Pose: Standing naturally and confidently, with the upper body slightly angled rather than perfectly flat to the camera. One hand lightly touching or resting near the waistband, the other relaxed naturally or near a pocket. Relaxed shoulders, elegant posture, natural sporty portrait body language. Lighting and photography: Use realistic professional studio portrait photography. Soft frontal key light slightly above eye level, subtle shaping on the face and upper body, gentle contour through light rather than harsh shadows, visible catchlights in the eyes, realistic skin texture, refined tonal contrast, gentle subject separation from the background, and a premium polished studio finish. The lighting should feel dimensional and elevated, not flat like an ID photo and not overly dramatic like a fashion campaign. Background: dark charcoal gray seamless studio background with a subtle soft gradient and slight vignette. Clean, minimal, premium studio atmosphere. Composition: Vertical portrait, half-body to three-quarter-body compositio

entries.title: Low-key monochrome editorial portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-end, cinematic black-and-white editorial portrait of a fit man with a short, styled undercut hairstyle and a well-groomed beard. He is positioned in a three-quarter profile, looking slightly upward with a contemplative and stoic expression, chest front to camera. His arms are confidently crossed over his chest, showcasing smart muscles and a premium silver stainless steel watch on his wrist.
Wardrobe & Details: Clothing: A simple, high-quality black t-shirt that fits tightly to emphasize his physique. Accessories: A delicate, thin silver curb chain necklace rests over the black shirt, catching the light.
Gaze: The subject is looking away from the camera, directed toward a light source just above eye level.
Lighting & Atmosphere: Style: Low-key lighting with high contrast (Chiaroscuro effect). Background: Deep, solid matte black, creating a seamless "void" look that makes the subject pop.
Technical Details: Shot on a prime 85mm lens for a flattering compression. The lighting should be sharp on one side of his face and arms (rim lighting), with deep, dramatic shadows on the other.
Quality Tags: 8K resolution, hyper-realistic skin texture, dramatic monochrome, sharp focus on eyes and watch, luxury fashion photography style, moody atmosphere. ar 4:5

Her outfit is an extravagant yume-kawaii idol dress in shimmering pink and lavender, with glossy satin fabric, lace trim, frilly off-shoulder sleeves, sheer ruffles, beadwork, tiny gem details, and a large jeweled heart brooch at the center of the chest. Include a lace camisole neckline underneath, a sparkly collar with tiny pastel charms, a ribbon bow near one curl that she gently holds with one hand, and matching frilled wrist cuffs. The background is a dreamy, heavily decorated kawaii room filled with soft fairy lights, pastel curtains, ribbons, bows, plush textures, and glowing decor. On the left side, add a pink neon heart sign with a bow outline containing the Japanese text 夢は叶えるもの. Use a soft-focus lens, glittery highlights, pearlescent textures, warm pink-purple ambient lighting, bokeh sparkles, and a vertical social-media photo composition. The overall mood is sweet, magical, idol-core, feminine, and hyper-detailed, like a pastel fashion photo taken in a decorated kawaii studio.

entries.title: Editorial Studio Portrait in Neutral Streetwear
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-end studio fashion portrait of a woman in her mid-30s to early 40s with a naturally fit build, shown in a half-body to upper-thigh framing, standing in a relaxed, confident pose with both hands tucked into her pants pockets. She has long, dark chestnut-brown wavy hair parted near the center, softly cascading over her shoulders, and wears 2 small gold hoop earrings on one visible ear, a delicate gold necklace, and a thin bracelet. Her outfit is modern minimal casual streetwear in soft neutral tones: a light beige zip-front jacket worn open, a fitted white cropped tank top, and matching light beige drawstring jogger pants. Shoot at eye level with an 85mm portrait lens at f/2.8, keeping the subject tack sharp with shallow depth of field. Use professional studio lighting with 1 softbox key light from the front-left, subtle fill to soften shadows, and 1 gentle warm rim light along the hair and shoulder for separation. The background is a clean studio backdrop with a smooth taupe-to-warm-gray neutral gradient and no distractions. The image should feel highly realistic and editorial, with natural skin tones, balanced color grading, ultra-high detail, crisp fabric texture, soft natural shadows, no noise, no motion blur, no cartoon styling, and no anatomical distortions.

entries.title: Anime Graffiti Girl Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the photo into a stylized anime street-art illustration while keeping the same subject, pose, outfit, headphones, backpack, and graffiti-wall setting. Replace the obscured real face with a clean original anime girl face, with a short blonde bob and side-swept bangs, and make the expression calm and slightly aloof. Keep the oversized yellow hoodie and black-and-white sneakers, but simplify the clothing into bold cel-shaded shapes with thick black ink outlines. Change the object in the raised hand from touching the headphones to holding a small blue spray-paint can near the face. Intensify the wall colors into vivid cyan, hot pink, and yellow graffiti splashes, and render the whole image in a dynamic manga/pop-art style with high contrast, sketchy linework, and a slightly low-angle full-body composition.

entries.title: High-Contrast Monochrome Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a 4:5 high-contrast, black-and-white studio portrait of a handsome man in the uploaded image. He is seated in a slumped, pensive posture on a minimalist dark wooden chair. His right elbow rests on his knee, with his head leaning heavily into his palm, while his left hand loosely grips a white disposable coffee cup with a black plastic lid. He is wearing classic black Wayfarer-style sunglasses, hiding his eyes and adding to the stoic, moody atmosphere.Suit: An oversized, structured black blazer and matching wide-leg trousers. The fabric is a heavy, matte wool. Four small black buttons are visible on the sleeve cuff. Footwear: Crisp, bright white ribbed cotton socks creating a sharp visual break between the dark trousers and shoes. Shoes: Highly polished black leather Oxford shoes with thin laces and a slight sheen on the toe box. Background: A minimalist, sterile studio setting with a light grey or off-white textured plaster wall. A soft, vertical shadow or curtain edge is visible on the far left. Lighting: Soft, diffused side-lighting that creates gentle gradients on the man's face and deep, dramatic folds in the oversized suit. The lighting emphasizes the high-contrast "black on white" aesthetic. Floor: A light, seamless studio floor that catches the soft shadows cast by the chair legs and the man's shoes. Color Grade: Pure monochrome (black and white) with a wide dynamic range-deep blacks and bright, clean whites. Film Quality: Sharp focus on the subject with a very subtle film grain, mimicking professional editorial fashion photography (reminiscent of 1990s minimalist campaigns).
entries.description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a professional, minimalist black-and-white fashion portrait based on an existing subject.

entries.title: Pastel Beach Selfie Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic high-angle beach selfie of a young woman standing on bright white sand under harsh midday sunlight, framed from just above the head to the upper thighs in a vertical smartphone composition. She has black hair parted in the center and styled into 2 long braided pigtails, one on each side. Her face is mostly obscured by her raised hand shading her eyes from the sun, creating a candid, slightly anonymous look. She is wearing a fitted ribbed deep V-neck cap-sleeve crop top in pale baby blue and low-rise white bottoms visible at the waist. Her body is slim with a soft, glamorous fashion-photo look. One arm is extended toward the camera holding the phone for the selfie, while the other hand rests across her forehead to block the sunlight. The lighting is extremely bright and washed with soft pale tones, producing delicate skin highlights, gentle shadows, and a clean airy summer aesthetic. Background is a minimal sandy beach with a faint strip of shoreline and water near the top edge, no other people, no props, no buildings. Style should feel like a polished social-media beach selfie, realistic skin texture, subtle retouching, soft pastel color grading, high detail, natural pose, feminine and youthful summer mood.

entries.prompt: A glamorous travel-fashion portrait of a blonde woman seated on a sunlit stone ledge overlooking the caldera in Santorini, Greece, with whitewashed cliffside buildings descending toward a deep blue sea and rugged volcanic islands in the distance. She wears a flowing ivory halter dress with a very deep plunging neckline, side cutouts, a gathered waist with a circular ring detail, and soft pleated fabric draped across her lap. Her hair is long, wavy, and golden blonde, styled loose over her shoulders. Add layered delicate necklaces including a small pendant and a silver cross, plus a bracelet or watch on one wrist. Place a classic white Greek church with a bright blue dome in the upper right background, and frame the right side of the image with vivid magenta pink bougainvillea in full bloom. Lighting is bright Mediterranean midday sun with crisp highlights, soft skin glow, and gentle depth of field that keeps the woman sharp while the background architecture and sea are slightly softened. Composition is vertical, elegant and aspirational, with the woman centered slightly right, torso visible down to the flowing skirt, scenic coastline stretching across the left half of the frame. entries.title: Realistic Cheerleader Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic full-body portrait photo of a young Japanese woman styled as Miko-chan, sitting on the floor indoors against a plain light beige wall. She has a soft shoulder-length bob haircut in dark brown, slightly tousled, with a natural casual look. She wears a modern cheerleader outfit in blue, white, and red: a sleeveless cropped V-neck top with striped trim and bold text reading AITuber OnAir across the chest, plus a short pleated cheer skirt with matching color-block panels. She also wears white ankle socks and white athletic sneakers. Her pose is shy and demure, seated with both knees bent, one leg extended closer toward the camera and the other folded inward, hands clasped together between her thighs, shoulders slightly drawn in. Soft natural window light enters from the left, creating faint diagonal shadows on the floor and lower wall. Shot in a vertical composition with the whole body visible, slightly high-resolution fashion-photography realism, gentle muted tones, smooth skin, subtle shadows, minimal background, candid gravure-style atmosphere, calm and innocent mood, photorealistic.

entries.title: Luxury Studio Ballet Portrait Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: # Light and Shadow Ballet Photo | 3x3 Grid Version | Open Source Stable Prompt Please generate one 3x3 grid puzzle photo based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user. The final product should be a square puzzle composed of 9 different small images, suitable for direct posting on X. Each frame should look like a different shot from the same high-end photo set, with a unified theme, styling logic, color palette, and spatial atmosphere. Theme: "High-Luxury Light and Shadow Ballet Photo" Overall Reference Vibe: High-cost studio photography, ballet girl, swan princess, European court elegance, dreamy backlighting, crystalline snowflakes, gorgeous mirrors, crystal chandeliers, light ethereal aura, expensive custom styling, strong atmospheric lighting. --- ## I. Character Consistency Please strictly preserve the user's real identity characteristics, including but not limited to: - Face shape - Facial feature proportions - Eye shape - Nose shape - Lip shape - Skin tone - Apparent age - Hairline - Hairstyle foundation - Body type - Overall temperament The 9 small images in the grid must clearly look like the same real girl; they must not become a stranger, be westernized, become an influencer style, have excessive skin smoothing, or feature an AI fake faces. --- ## II. Overall Style Positioning The set of images must present a high-end photo quality that looks like it "cost a lot of money to shoot." It is not an ordinary princess style or cheap cosplay, but rather: - High-end studio lighting - Expensive makeup and hair styling - Haute couture ballet dresses - Detailed hair accessories and crowns - High-end post-production atmosphere - Combining cinematic and jewelry-like quality Style Keywords: - Light and shadow ballet - White swan princess - European magnificence - Dark-field backlighting - Crystal lamps - Classic floor mirrors - Falling snow / Flying feathers / Sequins - Luxurious dreamscape - Ethereal spirit - High-end custom photos - Tang Vision style high-cost studio aesthetics, but without any text watermarks. --- ## III. Scene Setting The scene is a European dream space inside a dark-toned high-end photography studio. Spatial elements can include: - Black or dark background space - Golden vintage floor mirrors - European carved mirror frames - Crystal chandeliers - Ground glitter / sequins / snowflake reflections - Floating snowflakes / feathers / shimmering dust in the air - A few vintage clocks or European ornaments - Mirror-like reflections or sparkling textures on the floor The overall space must have a clear black-and-gold contrast, using strong backlighting and rim lighting to create an "expensive" atmosphere. Do not show ordinary home backgrounds. Do not show modern messy props. Do not show brand logos. Do not show "TANG VISION" text. Do not show Xiaohongshu watermarks. Do not show garbled text. --- ## IV. Clothing and Styling Clothing is haute couture light and shadow ballet dresses. Core Clothing Elements: - White, cream, champagne, or pearl white primary colors - Ballet short dress / tutu structure - Layers of tulle - Feather decorations - Beadwork, rhinestone embellishments, silver threads, fine chains - Corset bodice structure - Light fluffy skirts - Feather accents on shoulders or chest - Ballet slippers / satin ribbon shoes / pointe-style footwear The styling should look like a custom creation from a high-end studio-not cheap, not a simple wedding dress feel, and not a standard evening dress feel. Accessories include: - Exquisite crowns / light tiaras / crystal headpieces - Delicate shimmering earrings - Minimal facial sequins or tear rhinestones - Feather neckpieces or shoulder feather details --- ## V. Hairstyle Requirements (Very Important) Hairstyles must be extended based on the user's real hair; it is not allowed to forcibly unify them into the blonde hair from reference images. Please strictly follow these rules: - Retain the user's real hair color; do not bleach it blonde without permission. - Retain the user's original hairline and bangs type. - Retain the user's original hair length and overall volume. - Extend the "light and shadow ballet" styling on this basis. Flexibility based on original hairstyle: - Long hair: Elegant low bun / ballet bun / half-up style, retaining a few natural wisps. - Medium hair: Light bun or half-tied princess style, keeping it light. - With bangs: Retain and soften. - Without bangs: Use natural side wisps to frame the face. - Curly: Maintain curl base with more refined arrangement. - Straight: Smooth ballet bun or half-up style. Core Principle: Hairstyle is a "high-end upgrade based on the user's original hair," not a rigid template. --- ## VI. Makeup Requirements Makeup should reflect "wealth, royalty, photogenicity, and dreaminess," without looking like a fake face. Makeup Keywords: - Translucent cream skin - Cool-toned highlights - Exquisite eye makeup - Clear lashes - Lower lid shimmer - Pale pink, rose almond, champagne eye tones - Peach or cool pink blush - Hydrated yet restrained lips - Minimal facial sequins / tear diamonds / shimmer - Looking like high-end custom makeup that took a long time to complete Makeup Requirements: High completion, photogenic, noble, ethereal, but still retaining real skin texture; no plastic skin. --- ## VII. Grid Shot Design Please generate 9 different small images and combine them into a 3x3 grid puzzle. The 9 images must be clearly different, including full body, medium shot, half body, close-up, and extreme close-up, with varying poses and emotions. ### 1 Back to the camera turning slightly, looking at the lens, near a golden floor mirror, half-body close-up, graceful shoulder and back lines, falling snowflakes. ### 2 Standing half-body or 3/4 body, slightly angled, strong backlighting on the crown and shoulder feathers, cold and quiet aura. ### 3 Wide-angle full body sitting on the floor, next to a floor mirror, legs naturally tucked or to the side, looking up at the crystal chandelier, dreamy atmosphere. ### 4 Full body standing, ballet gesture, one hand raised like a stage still, crystal chandeliers and classic mirror frames in the frame. ### 5 Medium close-up sitting, skirt spread out, hand lightly on chest or shoulder, very strong backlighting, highlighting the layers of the expensive dress. ### 6 Half-body or medium shot looking at light, ethereal expression, like a white swan lit by stage lights. ### 7 Wide-angle sitting on the ground, head down, body slightly curled, arms around knees, quiet and fragile, like a captured rest moment. ### 8 Medium close-up sitting, hand on face, looking at lens, dreamy and soft expression, like a classic cover feel in high-end samples. ### 9 Medium or half body, looking down at the skirt or feather in hand, quiet and gentle movement, acting as a more relaxed shot in the grid. --- ## VIII. Photography and Lighting Photography quality must be very high-end, like expensive studio samples: - Strong backlighting - Rim lighting - Edge glow - Chandelier reflection highlights - Mirror refraction - Volumetric light - Shimmering particles - Floating snowflakes / sequins - Black-and-gold contrast - High-end dreamy film quality - Clear yet soft skin representation The image must have a clear "high-budget shoot" feel. --- ## IX. Puzzle Requirements Final output: one square 3x3 grid puzzle. All 9 images maintain unified theme, styling, and tone. --- ## X. Negative Requirements No identity changes. No mismatched hairstyles. No ordinary wedding styles. No cheap princess dresses. No plastic skin. No AI fake faces. No deformed hands. No extra fingers. No wrong proportions. Not all grids from the same angle. Not all grids with the same expression. Not all grids just standing. No repeated compositions in the puzzle. --- ## XI. Supplementary Stability The 9 images must look like the same high-end sample set: same person, same styling system, same spatial system, same color system, same luxury theme, but with obvious differences in distance, pose, expression, and emotion. The overall effect should be a professional studio sample ready for sale or display.

entries.title: Met Gala Couture Triptych
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-fashion editorial triptych showing exactly 3 full-body or three-quarter red-carpet portraits of fictional female models at the 2026 Met Gala inside and around the Metropolitan Museum of Art. Canvas is a wide horizontal 3-panel collage, roughly 3:2 aspect ratio, with thin black vertical dividers between panels and no captions or logos. Overall style is photorealistic luxury event photography with warm evening gala lighting, paparazzi flashes, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, and intentionally anonymized soft-blurred faces.

Left panel: A dark-haired model in a dramatic deep crimson red Renaissance-inspired velvet and tulle ball gown, strapless sweetheart neckline, structured corset bodice, ornate antique-gold embroidery radiating across the torso, voluminous skirt, sparkling necklace and bracelet. She poses on red-carpeted museum steps with one hand near her mouth and one hand at her waist. Background includes photographers, guests in formalwear, red carpet, hedge-like greenery, and small red flowers.

Center panel: A model seen in an elegant over-the-shoulder pose wearing a luminous icy silver-white off-shoulder couture gown with sheer cape-like draping, crystal beading, embroidered celestial details, high leg slit, long transparent train, and metallic high heels. She stands on a dark gala carpet with star motifs, surrounded by white floral arrangements and a dense crowd of photographers with bright camera flashes.

Right panel: A model standing front-facing on grand cream stone stairs in an opulent black and antique gold fitted off-shoulder Renaissance velvet gown, long sleeves, mermaid silhouette, elaborate baroque gold scroll embroidery, oval black-and-gold chest motifs, and a small trailing train. Counted visible subjects: exactly 3 main models, one per panel; exactly 3 couture gowns; exactly 3 distinct gala locations; many background guests and photographers kept secondary and slightly blurred. Use Renaissance portrait-inspired velvet couture as the unifying fashion concept. Keep the image realistic, glamorous, and editorial, with no readable text, no watermark, no extra panels, and no celebrity likeness.

entries.title: Met Gala Couture Triptych
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic editorial triptych of Met Gala red-carpet couture photographs featuring the same glamorous woman in three different luxury gowns, arranged as three equal vertical panels separated by thin black borders.

Canvas: Wide horizontal collage, approximately 3:2 aspect ratio, with three side-by-side full-height photo panels. Use hyper-realistic DSLR event photography, candid celebrity gala lighting, shallow depth of field, flash highlights, warm indoor museum tones, and crowded paparazzi backgrounds. Faces of background guests and photographers may be softly blurred, while the main subject remains sharp.

Layout: Exactly 3 discrete panels. Panel 1 on the left shows a front-facing red-carpet pose; Panel 2 in the center shows a rear three-quarter walking pose; Panel 3 on the right shows a formal full-body staircase pose.

Subject details: The same adult woman with dark brunette hair and an elegant celebrity presence appears in all three panels. Keep the face softly anonymized or unfocused, but preserve realistic skin, posture, jewelry, and couture styling.

Panel 1 outfit: A dramatic scarlet red strapless couture ball gown with a sweetheart neckline, structured corset bodice, refined gold embroidery, glittering crystal accents, sheer red tulle volume, and a romantic flowing skirt. The woman stands on a red-carpet staircase area, one hand lifted near her chin and the other near her waist. Add diamond necklace and bracelet. Background includes paparazzi, guests in black formalwear, camera flashes, and green hedge decor with red flowers.

Panel 2 outfit: A luminous pearl silver off-the-shoulder couture gown photographed from behind and slightly to the side. The dress has crystal embroidery, delicate short draped sleeves, a fitted sparkling bodice, a high leg slit, sheer flowing cape-like train, long translucent fabric pooling across the carpet, and moon/star-like celestial embellishments. The woman holds part of the train while walking. Background includes dense paparazzi, bright flash bursts, white floral hedge decor, and a dark blue gala carpet.

Panel 3 outfit: A black off-the-shoulder mermaid gown with ornate metallic antique gold baroque embroidery, long sleeves, fitted silhouette, dramatic circular chest motifs, and a small sweeping train. The woman stands centered on cream marble stairs with a red-carpet runner, hands posed gracefully in front. Background includes museum architecture, warm wall sconces, velvet ropes, trimmed greenery, and tuxedoed attendants.

Visual style: Photorealistic, high-fashion celebrity event photography, Met Gala atmosphere, luxurious couture textures, realistic fabric weight, sparkling beadwork, accurate red-carpet lighting, cinematic paparazzi flashes, vertical fashion-magazine composition inside each panel.

Constraints: Include exactly 3 panels and exactly 3 couture gowns: 1 scarlet-red gold-embroidered ball gown, 1 pearl-silver celestial train gown, and 1 black-and-gold baroque mermaid gown. Do not add captions, logos, watermarks, or extra text. Keep the collage seamless and realistic, with thin black dividers between panels.

entries.title: Elf Warrior Transformation Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic vertical 3:4 transformation collage showing a young woman being turned into a dark-haired fantasy elf warrior in a salon or backstage makeup studio.

Canvas: A single vertical image divided into exactly 12 equal rectangular panels arranged in a 3-column by 4-row grid, with thin white borders between panels. Each panel has a small white serif number in the upper-left corner, labeled exactly 1 through 12.

Subject: The same young adult woman appears in every panel, centered in a close-up portrait from chest or shoulders upward. She has long black hair, pale skin, and a neutral forward-facing pose. Her face is intentionally obscured in every panel by a soft-edged rectangular beige blur or privacy mask covering the facial features while leaving hair, ears, neck, and outfit visible.

Setting and style: Photorealistic cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, dark warm salon or dressing-room background with mirrors, shelves, makeup tools, blurred lights, and a professional makeover atmosphere. Use natural camera perspective and consistent lighting across all panels.

Panel sequence: Show exactly 12 distinct stages of the transformation:
1. Before look: the woman with loose long black hair, wearing a cream knit sweater, no elf ears or armor yet.
2. Hair preparation: hair clipped back with small metal salon clips, wearing a black salon cape; a makeup artist hand works near the cheek.
3. First prosthetic: a long pointed elf ear is being attached on one side, with a makeup brush or tool near the ear.
4. Both pointed elf ears visible, hair tucked back, black salon cape, clean early fantasy look.
5. Makeup detailing: both pointed ears visible, a brush applying makeup near the cheek or ear.
6. Finished prosthetic ears: both long pointed elf ears visible, dark hair loose, still in black salon cape.
7. Close elf portrait stage: pointed ears prominent, hair smoother and darker, black salon cape, no armor yet.
8. Hairstyling stage: hair partly braided with small silver ornaments or clips woven through the sides, pointed ears visible, wearing a lighter underlayer.
9. More advanced braided hairstyle: intricate dark braids with silver beads and accessories, pointed ears visible, fantasy styling becoming stronger.
10. Armor stage: the woman now wears ornate silver fantasy shoulder armor and chest armor with engraved details, braided hair and pointed ears visible.
11. Final makeup touch-up: same ornate silver armor and elf ears, a makeup artist hand applies finishing detail with a brush near the face.
12. Final completed character: fully transformed into an elven warrior wearing polished silver armor with gold accents, braided black hair with ornaments, long pointed ears, and a dramatic fantasy presence.

Constraints: Keep the same person, same camera angle, and same studio environment across all 12 panels. Include no extra text besides the numbers 1 through 12. Make the collage look like behind-the-scenes documentation of a professional fantasy character makeup and costume transformation. Avoid cartoon style; make it highly realistic, detailed, and cinematic.
entries.description: A photorealistic 12-panel salon makeover sequence showing a woman transformed step by step into a dark-haired armored elf warrior.

Ultra realistic full body street fashion portrait of a handsome young man standing casually on a quiet luxury city street beside a modern beige stone building, looking sideways with a confident calm expression. Wearing a slightly oversized black button-up shirt with sleeves rolled up, loose cream wide-leg trousers, polished black leather loafers, layered silver necklaces, bracelet, and a brown leather watch. Holding a smartphone with wired earphones hanging naturally, large black shoulder tote bag on one shoulder. entries.title: Anime Wedding Dress Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a detailed vertical anime fashion design sheet for Inugami Korone in an ornate bridal outfit, titled "WEDDING DRESS Collection" with a warm cream-and-gold wedding catalog aesthetic.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 layout, high-resolution illustration, ivory parchment background with delicate gold filigree corners, soft cathedral-like wedding hall lighting, bokeh flowers, lace textures, and elegant tan/gold typography. Use a polished Japanese anime art style with soft watercolor shading, fine linework, glossy highlights, and luxury bridal magazine presentation.

Main subject: One large full-body anime dog-girl bride on the left side, front-facing in a playful elegant pose. She has warm chestnut brown medium-long wavy hair, floppy dog ears, a fluffy dog tail, floral headpiece, soft bridal veil, and a joyful idol-like personality. Her face should be clearly visible and expressive. She wears a cream, champagne, and pale-gold wedding dress with layered ruffled lace, floral appliqués, corset bodice, off-shoulder lace sleeves, thigh-high slit, ribbon bows, tiny paw/bone-themed ornaments, and white-gold bridal heels. She holds a round bouquet of cream, peach, yellow, and blue flowers with long red, blue, and gold ribbons.

Top-left title area: Large serif headline "WEDDING DRESS" and elegant script subtitle "Collection". Add a ribbon label reading "Inugami Korone Bridal Style 2024". Include a small Japanese-style message block beneath it with decorative spacing, but keep it secondary and delicate.

Right-side fashion sheet layout: Create exactly 3 tall "DRESS VIEW" panels across the upper right, labeled "FRONT", "SIDE", and "BACK". Each panel shows the same bride outfit from that angle: front with bouquet, side profile showing slit and tail, back view showing veil, lace train, bow, and fluffy tail.

Middle-right detail grid: Create exactly 6 boxed "DETAIL POINT" panels labeled "BOUQUET", "BODICE", "VEIL & LACE", "SHOES", "SLIT DETAIL", and "BACK STYLE". Show close-up illustrations for each: bouquet flowers and ribbons; corset bodice with lace and flower jewel; translucent veil lace pattern; ankle-strap heels with floral paw-like decoration; thigh slit with lace and small blue bow; back waist bow and tail.

Lower-right charm section: Create exactly 3 "DOGGIE CHARM POINT" panels labeled "BONE HAIR CLIP", "PAW RIBBON", and "FLUFFY TAIL". Show one bone-shaped hair clip, one ornate paw-themed ribbon brooch, and one fluffy brown tail with a small heart accent.

Bottom-left and bottom-center sections: Add one "DESIGN POINT" box with exactly 5 short bullet lines and tiny paw icons. Add one "COLOR PALETTE" strip with exactly 6 rectangular swatches labeled in small elegant text: ivory beige, honey gold, lace white, peach pink, soft blue, and champagne brown. Add a small ornate nameplate reading "Inugami Korone".

Bottom-right: Add one small chibi version of the bride, smiling with closed happy eyes, dog ears, veil, small hearts, and a handwritten message panel titled "Korone's Message".

Constraints: Maintain a cohesive cream, gold, peach, and soft blue palette; use exactly 1 main full-body bride, 3 dress-view panels, 6 detail panels, 3 charm panels, 6 color swatches, 5 design bullets, and 1 chibi character. Make the sheet information-dense but readable, with ornate borders and no watermark.
entries.description: Creates an ornate anime bridal fashion reference sheet for a dog-girl character with dress views, detail panels, charms, palette, and chibi message art.
