entries.title: Premium Footballer Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a premium studio portrait of a footballer (character name) designed entirely around the character's unique identity, personality, style, and visual theme. Every detail in the image must be customized specifically to match the character, including hairstyle, facial structure, expression, clothing design, team inspiration, color palette, accessories, posture, typography, atmosphere, lighting mood, and background aesthetics. The football jersey must feel fully personalized to the character, inspired by a fictional or real football club that matches their vibe and energy. Include custom team colors, unique crest-style badge, modern sleeve accents, luxury sportswear stitching, sponsor-style graphics, and an authentic oversized football-fashion silhouette. Add the number "[NUMBER]" and position "[POSITION]" designed specifically for the character's identity and role. The character must remain visually consistent and realistic, preserving all defining features, natural skin texture, pores, proportions, eye shape, nose structure, lips, hairstyle, and facial identity. Avoid artificial beauty filters, over-smoothing, or exaggerated stylization. Use a cinematic monochrome or gradient studio background inspired directly by the character's theme and team colors. Add premium stadium-style lighting with soft directional highlights from above and one side, creating realistic shadows, depth, and dramatic contrast across the face and jersey. Include subtle football editorial graphics designed around the character's aesthetic: - thin frame lines - minimal typography blocks - technical labels - custom slogans or match details - faint football pitch markings - geometric overlays or futuristic grid patterns - subtle branding elements matching the character theme Add slight atmospheric haze, soft film grain, floating dust particles, or cinematic glow to create a premium stadium atmosphere while keeping the composition clean and luxury-focused. Pose should reflect the character's personality naturally: confident, relaxed, intimidating, calm, energetic, mysterious, stylish, or aggressive depending on the character design. Slight body angle, natural hand placement, fashion-editorial posture. Style inspired by high-end Nike, Adidas, Puma, and luxury football campaign photography mixed with cinematic sports-fashion editorials. Depth of field: character in ultra-sharp focus with a softly blurred cinematic background. Ultra-detailed, 8K quality, realistic fabric textures, authentic skin detail, dramatic lighting, polished composition, premium football-fashion campaign aesthetic, cinematic framing, bold and highly shareable.

entries.prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white editorial photograph of exactly three veiled women in Victorian gothic mourning attire ascending the broad stone steps of an old cathedral or historic courthouse. The scene is shot in harsh natural sunlight with deep shadows, high contrast, and a grainy documentary-film texture, in a wide 16:9 composition. The women wear full-length black pleated dresses, long black gloves, layered translucent black veils, and flowing capes or trains; count exactly three figures: one shadowed figure on the left partly obscured by veil, one central figure turned back toward the camera with her veiled face partially visible, and one taller figure on the right walking upward with her back mostly turned. The architecture should include massive pale stone columns, weathered masonry, dark doorway recesses, iron grating, and worn steps with gritty texture. Mood: somber, mysterious, ritualistic, fashion-forward, like a gothic couture funeral procession. Use black-and-white high-contrast film photography, ancient cathedral steps, three veiled women, Victorian gothic black mourning gowns with translucent veils, and somber mysterious ritualistic. entries.title: Midnight Blue Asuka Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a full-body cinematic fashion portrait of Asuka Langley Soryu reimagined as a solitary, regal figure in a cold abandoned concrete ruin. She has long flowing fiery red-orange hair with small red twin hair clips, pale skin, a slim elegant silhouette, and a distant, composed pose; keep the face softly obscured or minimally detailed rather than sharply recognizable. Dress her in a monochrome midnight ink-blue vertical silhouette: a sleeveless Fortuny Delphos-inspired pleated silk column gown with a wide shallow boat neckline, ankle-to-calf length, subtle glossy highlights, and extremely fine vertical pleats continuing the body line. Add matching tonal silk stockings and minimalist pointed-toe high-heel pumps inspired by Manolo Blahnik BB, all in the same dark blue palette so the dress, hosiery, and shoes form one uninterrupted line. She stands slightly turned beside a massive weathered concrete pillar, one hand resting lightly on the pillar and the other relaxed at her side, legs crossed at the ankles. The environment is a vast derelict industrial interior with many tall concrete columns receding into the background, peeling surfaces, exposed rusted rebar, rubble, dead weeds, shallow reflective water on the floor, and bluish fog. Use cold blue moonlit haze with soft shafts of light from the upper left, wet reflections, high-fashion editorial realism, dramatic depth, muted blue-gray ruins, and a quiet queenlike atmosphere that feels distant, elegant, and razor-sharp. Vertical 2:3 composition, full body visible from head to shoes, realistic fabric texture, cinematic color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.

entries.title: Women's Summer Big Sale Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a square fashion e-commerce sale banner for a women's summer clothing promotion, with accurate Japanese text and a cheerful catalog-ad look.

Canvas: 1:1 square social media graphic, peach-beige background, bright summer palette, clean commercial layout, no border or watermark.

Layout: Place one large central full-body female fashion model in front, cropped slightly at the top and bottom, wearing a pale yellow open shirt, white ribbed tank top, high-waisted light blue jeans, black belt, hoop earrings, and holding a woven straw bag. Surround her with exactly 4 smaller fashion model cutouts inside soft organic color blobs: top-left blue blob with a seated casual model in a striped shirt, jeans, white sneakers, and dark cap; top-right green blob with a standing side-view model in a pale yellow blouse, white skirt, and woven shoulder bag; bottom-left pink blob with a standing model in a pink cardigan, white graphic tee, wide white pants, and small white handbag; bottom-right gray-blue blob with a seated model in a dark sleeveless top, gray pants, white sneakers, cap, and silver tote bag. Use simple white decorative doodles around the blobs: short rays, dots, and small curved strokes.

Main text: Huge bold red-orange uppercase headline across the center reading BIG SALE, overlapping the central model slightly. Directly underneath, add a white horizontal banner with red-orange uppercase subtitle reading WOMEN'S SPECIAL SELECTION. At the very top, add handwritten red-orange Japanese copy reading 夏まで着回せる、厳選アイテム with a white wavy underline. Near the bottom center, add small red-orange brand text reading EHOU'S WARDROBE.

Discount badge: On the right side overlapping the headline, create one large red-orange circular badge with a dotted white rim. Inside it, include exactly 3 text elements: "MAX" at the top, very large "60%" in the center, and "OFF" to the right/bottom of the percent. Attach a small pale yellow label strip below the badge with a shopping bag icon and Japanese text reading 数量限定・期間限定.

Visual style: Photorealistic fashion models composited with bold flat graphic shapes, magazine-sale flyer aesthetic, warm lighting, saturated red-orange typography, crisp cutout edges, playful but polished Japanese retail advertising design.

Constraints: Include exactly 5 women total: 1 central model plus 4 smaller surrounding models. Include exactly 4 colored blob backgrounds: blue, green, pink, and gray-blue. Keep all text sharp, correctly spelled, and readable. Do not add extra models, extra badges, extra logos, or unnecessary text.
entries.description: A square Japanese fashion sale banner featuring five women's outfit cutouts, bold BIG SALE typography, and a 60% off discount badge for social media advertising.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Fashion Editorial Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A full-body, ultra-detailed cinematic fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful Asian woman with perfectly preserved facial identity and natural facial proportions, seated confidently on a futuristic yellow-and-black cyberpunk motorcycle. The aesthetic blends Neo-Tokyo street culture with luxury avant-garde techwear fashion, photographed in a premium studio setting.
She wears an intricate white technical hood featuring embedded red optical sensor details, layered beneath a bold yellow armored shoulder mantle with exposed metallic bolts and industrial mechanical design. Her torso is wrapped in a weathered cybernetic corset with bronze-toned gears, exposed wiring, layered mechanical plating, and subtle battle-worn textures over a fitted white tactical inner suit.
Her sleeves are dramatically oversized with a rich pink satin-silk texture, featuring bold black Japanese-inspired typography and subtle distressed detailing. She wears black tactical fingerless leather gloves with realistic stitching and matte carbon textures.
The lower outfit consists of high-waisted charcoal-black oversized techwear cargo pants with utility straps, hanging buckles, reinforced seams, and minimal red accents. On her feet are chunky futuristic yellow-and-red high-top sneakers with thick mechanical soles, intricate layered panels, red lacing, metallic trims, and realistic rubber textures.
Face remains highly realistic and naturally beautiful with visible pores, fine skin texture, subtle under-eye detail, sharp eyeliner, high-arched dark eyebrows, soft matte red lips, and glossy realistic eyes. No plastic skin, no AI smoothing, no exaggerated anime features. Expression is calm, cool, confident, and determined, with a slight head tilt creating a commanding hero-like presence.
Camera angle is a dramatic low-angle hero shot emphasizing power, scale, and cinematic attitude. Her right leg is extended naturally to the ground while her upper body turns slightly toward the lens. Hands rest casually near the handlebars in a poised, ready stance.
Background is a clean white high-fashion studio with large bold red Japanese kanji typography and futuristic editorial graphic elements arranged like a premium magazine cover. Minimalist cyberpunk composition with subtle floating UI-inspired design accents.
Lighting is cinematic Rembrandt lighting with soft directional key light shaping the face and outfit folds, combined with subtle rim lighting to separate her silhouette from the white backdrop. Metallic bike surfaces reflect realistic highlights and volumetric studio atmosphere.
Shot on Fujifilm GFX 100 II with an 85mm f/1.4 lens, ultra-shallow depth of field, razor-sharp facial detail, cinematic color grading, photorealistic materials, weathered metal textures, silk fabric realism, denim grain, rubber detailing, volumetric lighting, ultra-HD, 8K, masterpiece quality, editorial fashion photography, hyper-realistic cyberpunk aesthetic.

entries.title: Cyber Maid Cosplay Flash Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic disposable-camera-style cosplay portrait of a young adult woman wearing a futuristic white cyber maid costume in a modern high-rise apartment kitchen at night. She stands centered from mid-thigh up, facing the camera, holding a round stainless-steel serving tray with both hands at waist level. Her outfit is glossy white with silver hardware: a white ruffled maid headband, long dark wavy hair, white structured bodice with translucent ruffle shoulder straps, a white choker with a large metal ring, silver chain details, metallic wrist cuffs, an upper-arm band, white apron panel, short layered skirt with translucent frills, and black-and-silver garter-like cyber accessories. The setting is a sleek stainless-steel kitchen with a range hood and reflective metal backsplash on the right, warm under-cabinet lighting, wood lower cabinets, and a large dark window on the left showing a nighttime city skyline with scattered building lights. The image should feel like an amateur flash photo taken on a compact disposable camera: direct flash, slight grain, warm indoor highlights, high contrast, mild lens distortion, candid cosplay event energy, realistic skin and fabric textures. Keep the composition vertical, intimate, and documentary, with the subject occupying most of the frame. Add a large soft rectangular blur over the face to anonymize identity, while leaving hair, costume, and background visible. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people, or exaggerated fantasy anatomy.

entries.title: Aesthetic Cozy Cafe Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic cozy Japanese-Korean café photography featuring a cute young Japanese/Korean couple sitting together naturally in a trendy aesthetic café. The young couple should look stylish and youthful, wearing [fashion style/outfit colors], smiling softly and enjoying desserts together. The table is beautifully filled with [desserts/foods] such as pancakes, strawberry cakes, macarons, croissants, pastries, iced coffees, matcha lattes, fruit desserts, and aesthetic drinks arranged in a visually satisfying composition. Add small aesthetic café props like [flowers/ribbons/books/candles/pearls/notebooks] on the table for a premium Pinterest moodboard feel. Soft [lighting style] lighting enters through the café windows creating dreamy highlights, creamy shadows, glossy reflections on drinks, and realistic dessert textures. Background should contain softly blurred [Japanese/Korean] signs, glowing café boards, handwritten Japanese text, neon typography, and aesthetic city café elements for an authentic Tokyo/Seoul vibe. Add cute scrapbook-style doodles and handwritten notes around the image in [doodle color] ink - tiny hearts, stars, sparkles, ribbons, arrows, smiley sketches, bows, diary stickers, and handwritten café notes. Color palette should focus on [color theme] tones. Style inspired by viral Pinterest café photography, Korean lifestyle aesthetics, Japanese cozy café culture, dreamy Gen-Z romance mood, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, ultra realistic food textures, soft blurry background, ultra detailed realistic photography, clean aesthetic layout, 8k.

entries.title: Neon Holographic Streetwear Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a stylized fashion editorial portrait of a person from the chest up, centered and shot from a slightly low angle against a dense smoky studio background. The subject wears an oversized iridescent metallic puffer jacket in holographic silver-blue with pink reflections, with a high zipped collar, crinkled foil texture, a diagonal black zipper pocket on the right chest, and a large raised NIKE wordmark with swoosh across the front. The background is filled with dramatic colored fog in blue, violet, and hot pink, softly blended with no visible horizon. The person has a shaved or very short head with hints of red/pink lighting and small hoop earrings, but the face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in muted mauve-purple, extending from the forehead area to below the mouth. Use glossy high-fashion lighting, neon cyberpunk color grading, realistic fabric reflections, sharp detail on the jacket, shallow depth of field, square-cropped composition, and a moody futuristic streetwear campaign aesthetic.

entries.title: Surreal Cowboy Fashion Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a surreal high-fashion western editorial photograph of a stylish Black cowboy riding a dapple gray horse, framed from a low slightly upward angle so the rider fills the left-center and the horse's head dominates the right side of the image. The rider wears a wide black cowboy hat, abundant gold jewelry and rings, and a dramatic shaggy faux-fur coat in red, pink, and pale lavender, holding brown leather reins with one hand while lifting a black-and-white mug to their mouth with the other. Their face is intentionally obscured by a simple soft-edged rectangular blur in warm brown tones. Add a large cloud of pink smoke drifting behind the rider across a vivid deep blue sky, with hints of low mountains or desert horizon at the bottom. Use saturated cinematic color grading, glossy fashion-magazine lighting, sharp detail on the horse's fur and bridle, tactile texture on the shaggy coat, rich contrast, dreamy surreal mood, and a square-to-4:3 editorial composition.

entries.title: Damask Gothic Butler Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-realistic illustration of a refined male butler in an opulent Victorian tea salon, shown from mid-thigh up in a three-quarter pose. The butler has dark plum-black tousled layered hair with glossy highlights, while his face is deliberately covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a muted brown skin-tone gradient. He wears an elegant silver gray formal butler ensemble with a long tailored frock coat, waistcoat, cravat, white dress shirt, fitted trousers, and subtle purple lining visible inside the coat. The entire outfit features ornate damask patterns, embroidered lapels, metallic filigree brooches, chain accessories, jeweled purple accents, and a polished aristocratic gothic-rock style. His left arm is held behind his back, and his right hand presents a silver serving tray holding exactly 3 tea service items: one porcelain teacup with saucer, one polished silver teapot, and one small matching dish or saucer. The background is a luxurious dimly lit cafe or ballroom with dark carved wood, mirrors, chandeliers, warm lantern lights, blurred seated guests, round tables, teacups, and gold-brown bokeh. Use dramatic warm lighting, shallow depth of field, intricate fabric texture, glossy metal reflections, cinematic composition, high contrast, elegant dark fantasy atmosphere, and a portrait aspect ratio of 2:3.

entries.title: Sunlit Fashion Portrait with Privacy Block
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of a fashionable young adult woman standing outdoors in bright natural sunlight near the entrance of a modern building. She has long, smooth warm chestnut brown hair with soft layers and a side part, falling over her shoulders and catching rim light. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque rectangular privacy block in a muted beige-brown skin-tone gradient, covering the full facial area from forehead to chin while leaving hair, neck, and body visible. She wears an elegant ivory cream sheer long-sleeve blouse with a soft draped necktie detail, tucked into a high-waisted light beige tweed skirt. Add a delicate small gold necklace at the collarbone. Her right hand gently holds a lock of hair near her shoulder, and a beige handbag with a thin gold chain strap hangs from her right shoulder at the lower right edge of the frame. The composition is a waist-up three-quarter portrait, subject centered slightly right, with a softly blurred urban background showing pale stone columns, glass doors, gray pavement, and greenery in the left background. entries.title: Ivory Garment Goddess
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed ethereal fantasy illustration of the goddess of garments, a divine feminine figure standing front-facing in a misty dark gray void, dressed entirely in luminous ivory and pearl-white ceremonial fabric. She wears an extravagant translucent veil and headdress made from layered lace, embroidered mesh, white flowers, pearls, silver filigree, and tiny crystal ornaments; her face is hidden behind the dense veil and floral headpiece, creating a mysterious sacred presence. Behind her head is a large circular halo shaped like an ornate lace crown, with intricate gothic filigree, delicate pointed arches, floral tracery, and sparkling beadwork. Her outfit is a luxurious bridal-goddess ensemble: flowing sheer bell sleeves, gauzy draped cape fabric, a fitted jeweled bodice with silver embroidery, pearl chains, lace appliqué, ornate waist ornaments, and a long narrow white skirt falling vertically. One hand is lifted near the veil as if gently adjusting it, while the other rests lower at the waist holding or touching a dangling silver lace ornament. Use a soft monochrome palette of ivory white, pearl silver, pale champagne, and smoky charcoal gray, with glowing highlights, mist, glittering dust particles, and translucent fabric edges. The style should be romantic dark fantasy, ultra-fine lace detail, elegant anime-inspired concept art, delicate watercolor softness mixed with polished digital painting, high fashion couture, sacred bridal goddess atmosphere, vertical portrait composition, no text, no modern objects, no harsh outlines.

entries.title: Minimalist Men's Fashion Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean minimalist fashion collage featuring **8 different casual everyday outfits for a young man** arranged across a soft beige studio background, inspired by a lifestyle lookbook aesthetic.

The same boy appears in every outfit with consistent facial features, medium-length textured hair, natural smile, and relaxed poses. The collage should feel warm, effortless, modern, and Pinterest-style.

Outfits include:

1. oversized white linen shirt with light blue wide-leg jeans and white sneakers
2. fitted black basic tee with beige pleated trousers and canvas shoes
3. oversized gray sweatshirt with black shorts, crew socks, and chunky sneakers
4. striped long sleeve shirt with loose white trousers and sneakers
5. fitted white tank top with relaxed blue jeans and shoulder bag
6. layered outfit with light blue overshirt, white tee, black wide trousers, sneakers
7. cream knit cardigan with relaxed denim jeans and casual shoes
8. navy button-up shirt with beige shorts, white socks, and retro sneakers

Add subtle handwritten annotations around outfits in a brown ink style, such as:

* "linen shirt"
* "basic tee"
* "oversized sweatshirt"
* "layered look"
* "neutrals always work"
* "shorts + sneakers"
* "effortless everyday essentials"

Include small arrows and doodles pointing toward outfit details.
Use soft natural lighting, realistic photography style, muted neutral tones, minimal shadows, and clean spacing between figures.

Overall vibe: modern men's capsule wardrobe, Korean/Japanese casual streetwear inspiration, aesthetic Instagram/Pinterest fashion collage, editorial lookbook composition, realistic fabric textures, cozy minimalist styling.

entries.title: Korean Baseball Live TV Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Use the uploaded reference image as the primary identity reference. Create an ultra-realistic Korean professional baseball live broadcast screenshot of a woman accidentally caught by a TV camera while seated in the spectator stands. Preserve the woman's overall facial identity, hairstyle, soft expression, and natural vibe from the reference image, but do not make it look like a pasted or overly copied face. Render her naturally as part of the scene. She is wearing a Samsung Lions baseball jersey in a summer evening KBO stadium. The camera angle is eye-level from the spectator seats, captured with a realistic telephoto broadcast zoom from far away. The woman is not looking directly at the camera. She is naturally watching the baseball game with a calm, casual expression, slightly smiling as if unaware or only barely noticing the broadcast camera. The scene should feel like a real sports TV capture, not a smartphone photo, selfie, portrait, or fashion shoot. Include realistic Korean baseball stadium elements: crowded stadium seats, lively cheering fans, blue cheering towels, beer cups, iced drinks, stadium lights, LED boards, and softly blurred background spectators. Use telephoto compression, mild broadcast video softness, slight motion blur in the crowd, subtle video noise, and light compression artifacts. Add realistic KBO broadcast graphics / score bug on screen: bottom of the 8th inning, 0 balls, 2 outs, Samsung at bat: Jeon Byeong-woo, Kiwoom pitcher: Oh Seok-joo, runner on first base, Korean team abbreviations, and a small LIVE broadcast indicator. entries.title: Cinematic Meadow Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic photo of a hijabi woman. Do not change her face. She has a tall and slim body posture. She is sitting calmly in the middle of a vast wild poppy flower field during the afternoon. The entire area is filled with natural dark green grass and hundreds of red-orange poppy flowers scattered randomly and organically across almost the entire endless frame. The flower distribution must look natural and realistic like a real flower meadow. The woman wears a soft cream-colored hijab with realistic fabric folds naturally draping around her head and shoulders. Outfit consists of a plain white t-shirt layered with a light yellow knitted outer cardigan, and loose light blue jeans. Relaxed and emotional pose: she sits casually facing directly toward the camera, one hand holding a single poppy flower extended toward the lens. She smiles cheerfully. Camera angle is taken slightly from the side at eye level using a cinematic perspective. Composition is a medium shot - close enough for the face to appear clear while still showing many poppy flowers surrounding her. In the foreground near the lens, several blurry poppy flowers create natural depth and cinematic framing. No shoes and no bag around the subject. Background shows a wide bright blue daytime sky with calm atmosphere. Afternoon sunlight naturally illuminates the side of her face and hijab with soft subtle shadows. Rich dark green tones, vivid yet realistic red-orange flowers, extremely sharp grass texture details, cinematic color grading, subtle film grain, realistic depth of field, dreamy and immersive atmosphere, ultra realism like a National Geographic cinematic editorial photo, HD. She is sitting casually in the middle of a vast wild poppy flower field, captured from a perfectly top-down aerial drone perspective. Her body is positioned exactly in the center of the frame and remains clearly visible while still appearing smaller compared to the massive field surrounding her, creating a cinematic sense of scale and aesthetic solitude. The composition is slightly closer than before so her face remains visible, but not too close-up, allowing the flower field to still dominate the frame. The entire area is filled with natural dark green grass and hundreds of red-orange poppy flowers scattered randomly and organically across almost the entire frame. No pathways or large empty areas. She looks directly toward the camera with a soft gentle smile and calm expression. Near her shoulder lies a small white mini backpack placed on the grass. Camera perspective must feel very high like a professional drone with cinematic aerial lens. The camera faces perfectly straight downward, allowing the flower and grass patterns to create immersive visual textures. The woman appears blended naturally into the vast landscape surrounding her. Natural golden hour lighting with soft shadows, earthy and slightly moody tones, rich dark green colors, vivid yet natural red-orange flowers, extremely sharp grass textures, cinematic color grading, subtle film grain, dreamy and peaceful atmosphere, ultra-realistic like a professional National Geographic drone photo, HD.

The right panel shows her as 5 years later: confident and polished, long glossy dark brown hair worn down with a center part, wearing a tailored black blazer over a black satin camisole, warmer studio lighting with dramatic sunlight and shadow on a taupe wall, shoulders-up portrait crop. Keep the same body type, skin tone, posture, and camera angle across both panels so she is clearly the same person after a glow-up. Obscure the face in each panel with a centered solid rectangular privacy block matching the surrounding skin tone, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth. entries.title: KFC Booth iPhone Snapshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic iPhone-style photo set inside a KFC fast-food restaurant, with the subject's identity preserved exactly as in the reference image.

A young woman is seated in a booth, photographed from across the table using a slightly wide, casual iPhone perspective. She is centered in the frame, leaning back comfortably while a messy spread of fast food fills the foreground.

Pose & expression:
She holds a brown KFC paper bag on top of her head with both hands, elbows angled outward. Her expression is playful and expressive; one eye closed in a wink, lips pushed into a soft pout, giving a mix of mock annoyance and cuteness.

Outfit & styling:
She wears a fitted white sleeveless top, paired with long, loose hair. Accessories are minimal, such as a delicate necklace or thin chain. Long, neatly styled nails add to the casual yet polished look.

Table details:
The table is filled with KFC-style food packaging, fried chicken bucket, fries, wrappers, branded paper cups with straws, dipping sauces, napkins, a tray liner with colorful graphic elements, and a slightly crumpled takeaway bag. The setup feels real and slightly messy, like an ongoing meal.

Environment:
A modern KFC interior featuring tiled walls mixed with darker textured surfaces, subtle wall graphics or lettering, booth seating, and a few tables or stools visible in the background. The atmosphere is authentic and everyday.

Camera & lighting:
Captured like a raw iPhone snapshot, slightly wide lens feel, overhead indoor lighting creating natural shadows, no heavy editing or filters. The image should feel spontaneous and unpolished.

Important notes:
Maintain the booth composition, bag-on-head pose, wink and pout expression, white sleeveless outfit, and messy fast-food foreground. Emphasize realism, natural skin texture, accurate packaging, no smoothing or beautification.

Format: 4K resolution, vertical aspect ratio.

entries.title: Editorial Fashion Flower Field Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-quality 3-panel vertical photo collage of a stunning uploaded woman with soft, voluminous wavy hair glowing in golden sunlight. She is styled in a cream-colored lace-up vintage blouse with delicate textures, olive green high-waisted flowy trousers, and a wide-brimmed straw hat slightly tilted for a fashionable editorial look. Light golden jewelry (thin chains, rings) adds a subtle luxury touch.
The setting is a dreamy, vibrant yellow mustard flower field under a bright blue sky with soft clouds, enhanced by golden hour lighting for a magical glow.
Top panel: Back view of the woman standing in the field with arms wide open, sunlight creating a glowing halo around her hair, slight motion blur in flowers for a cinematic feel.
Middle panel: Close-up portrait, she smiles naturally at the camera, wind softly moving her hair, her hand reaching toward the lens creating depth and a slightly blurred foreground for a DSLR effect.
Bottom panel: Playful pose, she leans sideways in the flowers, making a double peace sign, laughing candidly, capturing an authentic joyful moment.
Add cute, trendy white doodle overlays (smiley faces, sparkles, stars, tiny hearts) with a subtle animated/sketchy feel. Include light leaks, sun flares, and soft film grain for a premium Instagram aesthetic.
Ultra-realistic, 4K, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high dynamic range, natural skin tones, editorial fashion photography, soft pastel color grading.

entries.title: Cinderella Glass Slipper Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical high-fashion editorial photograph of a graceful Cinderella-inspired blonde woman seated on an ornate gilded bench in an opulent palace interior, leaning forward while delicately adjusting a transparent crystal glass slipper on her extended foot. Her face is fully covered by a flat beige rectangular anonymizing block, while her posture remains elegant and poised. She wears pale sky blue off-the-shoulder tulle and lace ball gown with sheer draped sleeves, a fitted lace bodice, a plunging neckline, and voluminous translucent layers pooling around the bench, exposing her bare legs. Her hair is styled in a sculptural blonde updo with soft curled tendrils, tied with a bright azure satin ribbon trailing behind her head. The glass slipper is clear and glossy with a slim heel and sparkling crystal embellishment at the toe. Set the scene in a refined classical chamber with a large ornate gilded mirror on the left, an antique gold console table beneath it, cream marble walls, and a softly blurred sweeping staircase in the background on the right. Use soft cinematic side lighting from the left, shallow depth of field, warm highlights, cool blue fairy-tale atmosphere, luxurious fabric texture, realistic skin, elegant composition, centered subject, 9:16 vertical crop, editorial fashion photography style.
entries.description: A vertical couture fairy-tale portrait of a Cinderella-inspired woman adjusting a crystal slipper in an ornate palace interior.

entries.title: Aesthetic Doodle Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Low-angle aesthetic portrait of subject from reference image, standing under a bright blue sky filled with soft, fluffy clouds. The subject is wearing a pastel bucket hat, oversized gray sweatshirt, and round sunglasses, styled in minimal fashion. Relaxed and calm expression, natural pose. 

Above and surrounding the subject are playful white doodle illustrations seamlessly integrated into the sky: cute cartoon characters, rocket, robot, skull, stars, paper airplane, sparkles, and whimsical abstract shapes.

Handwritten typography floating in the sky with the text "custom name 1" and "custom name 2", drawn in soft white ink, bubbly, dreamy, and slightly imperfect hand-drawn style.

Clean composition, airy spacing, pastel tones, soft natural lighting, minimal shadows, crisp details. Kawaii doodle overlay combined with ultra-realistic photography style. Instagram-style edit with subtle film grain and soft glow.

Modern Gen Z aesthetic, light blue dominant palette, dreamy and playful mood, high dynamic range, editorial photography, 4K resolution.

Aspect ratio 3:4

entries.title: Candid Mall Shopping Snapshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic low-resolution candid phone photo of two young adults descending an indoor shopping mall escalator, captured from a lower diagonal angle across the escalator. The composition should feel accidental and slightly imperfect, with the escalator handrail and glass side panel cutting across the foreground as a strong diagonal obstruction. On the left, show a cheerful young man with short black slightly tousled hair, wearing a dark casual short-sleeve shirt. He is smiling genuinely while carrying several oversized PC hardware boxes pressed against his torso, including visible GeForce RTX 4080 graphics card boxes, ASUS or GALAX-style GPU packaging, and a large black AORUS monitor box. His face, neck, forearms, and hands are visible, with natural warm skin tone and practical tension in the hands from holding heavy boxes. On the right, show a slim young woman standing slightly higher on the escalator, calm and composed, looking downward rather than at the camera. She has a neat short dark bob haircut with straight bangs, soft indoor shine, pale warm ivory skin, and an East Asian fashion-editorial inspired makeup style: smooth matte base, subtle eyes, and defined red lips. She wears a fitted sleeveless cream or beige knit top covered with small repeated dark text-like pattern, matching long patterned arm sleeves, and a short black pleated skirt with vivid blue and turquoise plaid paneling, blue trim, and a dark belt. Visible skin includes her face, neck, exposed shoulders, upper arms, a small neckline area, and partially visible thighs above the escalator rail. The skin should look natural and softly matte, as if smooth and cool to the touch, lit by ordinary overhead mall lights rather than beauty lighting. The background is a warm brown wood or laminate wall panel area inside a mall or electronics shopping center, with vertical seams, reflective metal rails, glass panels, and a partial passerby shape near the edge of the frame. Use practical indoor mall lighting: soft overhead illumination, warm reflected light from the brown wall, weak uneven shadows, and broken reflections on the escalator glass and metal. Keep a deep phone-camera-like depth of field where the subjects, boxes, escalator, and background remain mostly readable. The image should preserve compressed social-media photo texture: mild noise, softened details, slightly muddy colors, imperfect framing, and a believable candid snapshot feeling. The emotional tone is a funny, slightly surreal tech purchase moment: the man looks proud and happy after buying expensive gaming hardware, while the woman appears cool, stylish, and detached. It should feel like they had just bought the hardware and were caught by someone passing by before either noticed the camera.
entries.description: A realistic prompt for creating an imperfect, candid-style photo of two people on an escalator with electronics boxes, mimicking social media compressed textures.

noise, softened details, slightly muddy colors, imperfect framing, and a believable candid snapshot feeling. the emotional tone is a funny, slightly surreal tech purchase moment: the man looks proud and happy after buying expensive gaming hardware, while the woman appears cool, stylish, and detached. it should feel like they had just bought the hardware and were caught by someone passing by before either noticed the camera. social media post snapshot realistic editorial fashion beauty phone camera

entries.title: Minimalist Studio Editorial Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate a 'Warm Minimalist Studio Fashion Photo Shoot 3x3 Grid Collage' based on the clear photo of the person I uploaded.

Strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of the person in the photo, including face shape, facial feature proportions, eyebrow and eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, perceived age, hairline, hairstyle features, and overall temperament. Do not turn the person into someone else; avoid excessive beautification, influencer-style aesthetics, or AI-generated fake faces. The final nine images must feature the same adult person, just presenting different compositions, poses, and local details within the same studio shoot.

Image Format:
Generate a 3x3 fashion photo collage with a 4:5 aspect ratio. The nine photos should look like an editorial moodboard from a magazine page or a contact sheet curated by a photographer. Each cell features the same person in the same studio setting but with different views, including facial close-ups, half-body shots, profile shots, shoulder and neck details, waist details, back views, upper body movement, and two-thirds body compositions.

Character Setting:
An adult East Asian female with a natural, clean, soft, and fashionable temperament, reflecting the aesthetic sense of women from first-tier cities. The overall feeling should be elegant, relaxed, and feminine, but must be high-end, restrained, and natural-not vulgar, not overly sexy, not studio-style kitsch, and without influencer filters.

Hairstyle and Makeup:
Retain the real hairstyle base from the original photo, but it can be slightly styled to be more voluminous, airy, and naturally lustrous. Hair can be naturally loose, slightly messy, with a light wind-blown effect. Makeup should be clean and elegant, skin with a natural glow, preserving real skin texture; no heavy makeup, no exaggerated eye makeup, no plastic skin.

Outfit:
The person wears a white slim-fit cropped tank top, a white knit vest, a white off-the-shoulder top, or a white ribbed sleeveless top, paired with light blue loose jeans. Accessories include minimalist thin necklaces, thin bracelets, or small earrings. The overall outfit is clean, light, and fashionable, like the minimalist female photo style popular in major cities in Korea/Japan/China. Clothing should fit the body naturally but not be overly revealing or sexualized.

Scene:
A clean indoor studio with a background of warm beige, cream, or light camel walls. No clutter, no furniture, no text, no logos. The overall environment is minimalist, warm, and soft, like a high-end fashion magazine shoot set.

Lighting:
Soft warm studio lighting, with light coming softly from the front-side or above, giving the skin a slight creamy texture and natural highlights. Shadows should be soft; no hard flash, no strong contrast. The overall atmosphere is warm, dreamy, and cinematic.

3x3 Grid Content:

Grid 1:
Facial close-up, head slightly turned, hair naturally falling along the side of the face with a slight wind-blown feel. Eyes looking at the camera or slightly away, expression quiet, confident, and soft.

Grid 2:
Profile half-body shot, the person standing, body sideways to the camera, one hand naturally raised to tidy the hair, eyes closed or head slightly lowered, pose elegant and relaxed. Highlight the profile, neck, and upper body lines.

Grid 3:
Shoulder, neck, and collarbone detail, showing only the chin, neck, shoulder line, white top, and thin necklace, without showing the full face. High-end, restrained, with a magazine detail close-up feel.

Grid 4:
Soft emotional facial close-up, eyes closed or half-closed, hair naturally sweeping across the face, relaxed expression, slight soft focus and warm light.

Grid 5:
Half-body fashion shot, one hand naturally placed near the collarbone or lightly resting on the upper chest, the other hand hanging naturally. Movement should be elegant; no exaggerated gestures, expression quiet and atmospheric.

Grid 6:
Two-thirds body or near full-body shot, person in a white cropped top and light blue jeans, hands naturally raised or stretching, posing like a natural stretch in a studio. The image should be fashionable, clean, and light.

Grid 7:
Shoulder, neck, and hand detail, capturing the white top, thin necklace, and fingers lightly touching the collar or shoulder. Hands must be natural and structurally correct, no deformation, not overly sexy.

Grid 8:
Back view or side-back shot, person facing away from the camera, one hand naturally raised to tidy hair, revealing the upper back silhouette and long hair lines. Elegant and restrained, not over-exposed.

Grid 9:
Waist and upper body detail, capturing the white cropped top, light blue jeans, waistline, and fabric details. Composed like a fashion magazine detail outfit shot, no full face needed.

Overall Photography Style:
High-end fashion magazine editorial, warm minimalist studio shoot, slight film feel, soft focus but clear features, natural skin tone, clean visuals, lifestyle moodboard atmosphere. Lens feel like 35mm to 85mm portrait photography, shallow to medium depth of field, sharp subject, simple soft background.

Expression and Pose Requirements:
The nine images should not all have the same expression or angle. There should be variety: looking at the camera, closing eyes, profile, head down, tidying hair, body stretching, back view, and detail shots. Overall natural, relaxed, and elegant; not like an ID photo, not like a Taobao model stiffly posing.

Consistency Requirements:
All nine images must maintain consistency in the same person's face and temperament. Composition, pose, angle, and cropping can change, but do not change face shape, facial feature proportions, nose, lips, eyes, skin tone, or perceived age. Do not make people in different cells look like different individuals.

Hand and Body Stability Requirements:
Hand movements must be simple and natural. Do not generate extra fingers, deformed fingers, broken wrists, misplaced arms, or strange body structures. If hands are prone to error, automatically simplify the movement. Priority is given to the realism and naturalness of the person, followed by pose complexity.

Restrictions:
No other people, no cluttered backgrounds, no text, no watermarks, no logos. No exaggerated heavy makeup, no excessive skin smoothing, no plastic skin, no cartoon style, no vulgarity or pornography, no excessive exposure, no incorrect human anatomy, no blurred low-quality faces.

Final Output:
A single 4:5 vertical 3x3 fashion photography grid collage. The overall effect should be close to a high-end female editorial moodboard in a warm minimalist studio: clean, soft, fashionable, natural, restrained, and atmospheric.

entries.title: Realistic Vintage Cafe Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic editorial lifestyle photograph of a young woman sitting at a rustic wooden table in a cozy vintage cafe, positioned beside tall old-fashioned window panes with soft daylight streaming in from the left. She wears a cream cable-knit midi dress with a light blue oversized denim jacket draped over her shoulders, a delicate necklace and bracelet, seated on a dark wooden chair with legs crossed, one hand resting on the table and the other lightly touching her cheek. Her dark hair is loosely tied up with natural wisps, but her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered solid tan square covering the entire facial area. On the table are exactly 2 visible tabletop props: a small cup of latte with foam near the right edge and a clear glass vase holding dried flowers and eucalyptus stems. The background contains exactly 2 prominent cafe decor elements: a dark chalkboard menu reading "DAILY SPECIALS" with blurred handwritten prices and warm vertical wooden wall paneling. Use a natural documentary photography style with shallow depth of field, warm wood tones, creamy highlights, realistic fabric texture, soft window light, subtle film grain, 50mm lens look, f/2.8 aperture, vertical portrait composition, intimate cafe atmosphere, high realism, no illustration or CGI.

entries.title: 8-Panel GRWM Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-quality 4K cinematic "Get Ready With Me" Instagram-style storyboard in a 9:16 vertical layout with EXACTLY 8 PANELS ONLY (no more, no less). Use soft natural lighting, pastel tones, and a clean trendy aesthetic. No text anywhere.
The storyboard must include exactly these 8 scenes:
Waking up in a cozy aesthetic bedroom with soft sunlight
Skincare close-up (applying serum or moisturizer)
Standing in front of wardrobe, choosing outfit
Changing into a modern trendy outfit (quick transition moment, stylish dress)
Makeup close-up (foundation, lip gloss, or blush)
Hair styling (brushing, tying, or clip styling)
Mirror check with full modern outfit, confident pose
Final confident walk or soft smile in sunlight
Keep panels clearly separated in one single frame with even spacing. Use cinematic angles (mirror shots, close-ups, POV), smooth lighting, and a strong glow-up transformation vibe.

entries.title: French Saffron Gummies Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean premium wellness advertisement on a soft warm beige studio background with gentle natural shadows and a minimal editorial aesthetic. At the very top center, place the brand name naali in elegant dark brown serif typography. Centered in the upper half, show a large white rounded testimonial card with a subtle drop shadow containing exactly 2 stacked social-style review posts separated by a thin divider line. The first post has a circular gold avatar with the initials "ML", the username "marie.lbx" with a small blue verification badge, and the French review text: "Franchement je dormais pas bien depuis des semaines... 3 jours avec les gommes naali et je me sens enfin posée. 🧡" with a like count below reading "1,847" followed by a small gold heart. The second post has a circular terracotta avatar with the initials "SC", the username "sofiacr__", and the French review text: "Pareil pour moi, le safran c'est magique. Plus jamais sans 🌿✨" with a like count below reading "892" followed by a small gold heart. In the lower left, place a rectangular metal tin of saffron gummies in a matte amber-orange gradient with a white lid, photographed straight-on. The tin prominently shows the brand name "naali" and product text including "ANTI-STRESS", "RELAXATION / HUMEUR POSITIVE", "safran", "Safran", "Vitamines B3, B6, B9, B12", "Goût mangue", and "60 gommes". In the lower center, arrange exactly 4 stacked citrus fruits in a playful vertical balancing sculpture: a small orange at the top, a mandarin beneath it, another mandarin beneath that, and a large yellow lemon at the bottom, with realistic texture and glossy highlights. Place exactly 2 translucent orange gummy pieces on the surface near the lemon. On the right side, add a bold luxury serif headline in golden brown reading Elles ont trouvé le calme. and below it a smaller dark text subheadline reading Maintenant à toi. Gommes au safran.. Use soft directional lighting from the upper left, smooth shadows, refined French skincare-supplement ad styling, balanced spacing, warm monochromatic tones of cream, amber, orange, yellow, and brown, and a polished photorealistic product-photography look.

entries.title: Cinematic Duo Concert Performance
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic concert performance, high energy, bold charisma, dominant duo presence, like top-tier global pop idol stage. Hard-hitting, sharp, synchronized but with attitude contrast (male = strong/grounded, female = sharp/sassy).
👥 SUBJECT (DUO)
Male dancer:
Western male, short styled dark brown hair, sharp jawline, subtle stubble, fitted sleeveless black performance top or asymmetrical streetwear hoodie, black cargo pants with neon accents, muscular arms, strong & grounded energy, calm dominance.
Female dancer:
Western female, curly blonde hair (voluminous, bouncing curls), high ponytail or half-up style, black & metallic pink techwear jacket, fitted cargo pants, confident, fierce, expressive, pop-diva attitude (like a high-fashion stage performer), sharp and charismatic presence.
Chemistry:
Power duo, slightly competitive vibe, teasing interaction, stage dominance, electric chemistry without romance softness.
🎤 STAGE DESIGN
Dark concert stage, glossy reflective floor
LED wall: red/pink glitch visuals + pulsing cyber graphics
Lighting:
red spotlight (female focus)
white/blue spotlight (male focus)
strobe flashes on beat drops
Atmosphere: fog + light haze
Backup dancers: 2-4 silhouettes (optional, low focus)
⏱️ TIMELINE (10 DETIK - HARD & POWERFUL)
0-1s
Black → beat drop
Silhouette duo back-to-back
Flash reveal, low-angle cinematic push-in
1-2s
Step touch right (sync)
→ male heavy grounded groove, female sharp lighter hit
Direct eye contact to camera (dominant)
2-3s
Step touch left → chest pop (HARD synchronized hit)
Lighting flash per impact
Female adds slight confident head tilt + curl bounce
3-4s
Arm wave (mirror style):
male right → left
female left → right
Camera orbit half circle
4-5s
Point & slide toward each other
→ almost collide → freeze tension moment 🔥
5-6s
Hip roll contrast:
female smooth & expressive
male controlled & grounded
→ cross arms then open (BIG synchronized hit)
6-7s
Attitude exchange: head turn + hand gesture
→ male cold focused stare
→ female smirks, diva confidence
7-8s
Side slide opposite directions
→ fast shoulder pops alternating
Quick cuts + micro zoom impact
8-9s
Body roll sync (different styling)
→ large commanding arm circle overhead
Backlight sweep across stage
9-10s
Final chest hit → FREEZE
Both point forward at camera
FINAL POSE:
male slightly behind, grounded stance
female front, chin up, confident smirk
Spotlight lock, background dark
🎥 CAMERA STYLE
Low angle dominance shots
Fast punch-in zoom on beat drops
Orbit shots for duo dynamics
Quick cinematic MV cuts
Slight handheld shake for impact realism
⚡ ENERGY DIRECTION
Not cute - POWER COUPLE stage dominance
Female: sassy, sharp, confident diva energy
Male: calm, strong, controlled presence
Interaction: teasing + competitive tension
✨ DETAIL TAMBAHAN
Curly blonde hair bounce physics
Sweat glow realism under stage lights
Fabric movement (techwear + cargo flow)
Floor reflection

entries.title: Moody Hijab Phone Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody, realistic indoor portrait of a young Muslim woman wearing a black hijab, a loose white blouse with slightly puffed sleeves, blue jeans, and white sneakers, seated casually in a dark brown leather armchair. She is posed in a relaxed, editorial way with one knee raised, one hand resting near her ankle, and the other hand holding a smartphone to the side of her face as if on a call. Frame the shot vertically from about mid-shin upward, centered composition, with her body angled slightly toward the camera. Her face is intentionally obscured or softly anonymized, with no detailed facial features visible. Use soft natural window light coming from the upper right, creating gentle shadows across a plain textured beige wall and adding a warm, quiet afternoon atmosphere. Emphasize realistic fabric folds in the draped hijab, crisp cotton texture in the blouse, denim texture, and a calm minimalist lifestyle aesthetic. Muted neutral color palette, shallow depth of field, candid fashion photography style, subtle grain, soft contrast, and an elegant contemporary editorial look.

entries.title: Editorial Top-Down Fisheye Portrait

entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic portrait of a young man captured from a top-down wide-angle perspective (slight fisheye distortion), creating an exaggerated head-to-body ratio. Subject is crouching on a seamless solid vibrant orange background (studio floor and backdrop blended).

Pose: relaxed squat, one arm resting on knee, the other holding a minimal cylindrical object (like a thermos or bottle) placed near the ground. Body slightly angled, head tilted upward looking directly into the camera.

Outfit: fitted black t-shirt, neutral-toned pants, casual sneakers, minimal accessories (thin chain, bracelet optional).

Styling: yellow-tinted translucent sunglasses with a modern frame.

Camera: top-down shot, 24-28mm lens feel, slight distortion for editorial effect, sharp focus, high detail.

Mood: confident, minimal, editorial, slightly playful due to perspective distortion.

Background: clean, monochrome orange, no distractions, studio aesthetic.

Style: fashion editorial, high saturation, crisp textures, ultra-detailed, 8k, HDR.

entries.title: Two Anime Girls with Flashy Hair
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean white-background anime illustration of two teenage girls standing side by side, shown from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle, with a stylish monochrome-and-accent-color look, crisp inked linework, manga screentone shading, subtle halftone texture, and slight cyan-magenta print-registration offset for a modern graphic feel. The girl on the left has very long pale silver-white hair fading into vivid electric blue at the ends, styled in 2 small round buns with the rest flowing down, large light blue eyes, and a calm slightly curious expression. She wears a school uniform with a white blouse, a black sleeveless sweater vest, a pleated dark skirt, a bright blue ribbon bow at the collar, white socks, and black loafers, with both hands held behind her back and her body leaning forward slightly. The girl on the right has rich deep purple hair in a high ponytail with loose layered strands, golden amber eyes, and a cool reserved expression; she wears a metallic hair clip reading AI. Her outfit is a sporty streetwear school look: an oversized white jacket with bold purple trim and hood lining, a gray top underneath, short bottoms mostly hidden by the jacket, white socks, and purple high-top sneakers, with both hands in her jacket pockets. Keep the composition balanced with the left girl slightly left-of-center and the right girl slightly right-of-center, both looking up toward the viewer. Add abstract black shadow bars and dotted halftone shapes beneath and around them instead of a detailed environment. Emphasize a polished hybrid of manga illustration and contemporary anime key visual design, high contrast, minimal background, fashionable "flashy hair day" mood, and a cool creative duo atmosphere.

entries.title: Overhead Flash Money Bed Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty flash photo shot from directly overhead of a young woman lying on a rumpled white bed, surrounded by scattered U.S. dollar bills. Her long dark black hair is spread out dramatically in all directions like a halo across the sheets. She wears a black cropped tank top or sports bra and low-rise black pants with a visible white waistband, exposing her toned midriff. Her left arm reaches straight up toward the camera with an open hand in strong foreshortened perspective, creating a dynamic in-your-face fashion editorial look. A single blurred banknote flies across the lower foreground near the lens, adding motion and depth. She wears layered silver jewelry: 2 pearl-and-silver necklaces, multiple chunky silver bangles on one wrist, and rings on her fingers. The scene includes approximately 40 scattered U.S. bills, mostly $100 notes with a few lower denominations mixed in. Use harsh direct on-camera flash, high contrast, slight wide-angle distortion, candid luxury streetwear energy, early-2000s paparazzi aesthetic, centered composition, full body cropped from mid-thigh upward, white bedding filling the background, realistic photography.

entries.title: Fashion Magazine Collage Guide
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
An American fashion magazine collage layout featuring Karina on a clean textured white background with subtle grid lines. The bold headline at the top-left reads "ZARA'S 7-DAY OUTFIT GUIDE" in black and pink fonts, accented with playful star doodles. Beneath it, a small subheading in English reads: "Zara's weekly style picks ❤️".

On the right side, a large high-resolution portrait shows Zara in a black sequined strap dress, looking straight at the camera with her hand resting on her chin. The top-right corner includes handwritten-style notes and hashtags like #ZaraStyle #DailyLooks, surrounded by small heart and star doodles.

The center features seven "polaroid-style" photos arranged in two rows, each labeled from MONDAY to SUNDAY. Each image includes short, aesthetic English captions with casual handwritten notes and tiny arrows or heart doodles:

MONDAY: A relaxed "casual vibe" with a navy cap and cream sweatshirt, holding coffee. ("Keep Mondays comfy and easy.")

TUESDAY: A bold "street style" look in a black nylon jacket. ("Turn up the street vibe.")

WEDNESDAY: A polished "office look" with a gray blazer and glasses, holding a mug. ("Smart and confident midweek energy.")

THURSDAY: A soft, feminine outfit with a light blue cardigan. ("Light, soft, and effortlessly pretty.")

FRIDAY: A sleek "chic & cool" outfit with a black leather jacket. ("All-black, all confidence.")

SATURDAY: A romantic "date night" look with wavy hair and an off-shoulder white top. ("Cute, flirty weekend mood.")

SUNDAY: A cozy "relax & unwind" outfit in a cream knit. ("Slow down and stay comfy.")

At the bottom-left, a black label with "ZARA" is paired with a short English blurb about her fashion influence. Below that, a "STYLE TIPS" section lists three quick tips in simple English. The bottom edge includes a barcode graphic and the line: "Zara inspo for your everyday style."

entries.title: Two Ages Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic studio portrait in a vertical 4:5 composition showing two versions of the same male person seated side by side against a plain warm beige-gray studio backdrop. On the left, a child version of the same person sits cross-legged, wearing a light gray crew-neck T-shirt and medium-blue jeans, with neatly styled dark brown to black hair swept back and slightly voluminous. The child is turned slightly to the right, looking toward the adult version with a soft innocent smile and relaxed posture. Above the child, place the text 1997 in a simple elegant black serif font. On the right, the present-day version of the same person sits cross-legged, larger in scale and closer to camera, wearing a plain white crew-neck T-shirt and blue jeans, with matching facial structure and matching dark swept-back hair. He leans forward slightly with both hands clasped together under his chin, elbows resting near his knees, and looks left toward the child with a calm gentle smile. Above the adult, place the text 2026 in the same black serif font. Keep both subjects visually consistent as the same person at two ages, emphasizing emotional connection, recognition, and quiet reflection. Use soft cinematic warm studio lighting, realistic skin texture, subtle shadows, minimal styling, professional editorial photography, sharp focus, natural proportions, and a clean uncluttered composition. The image should feel like a real photoshoot, intimate, minimal, emotional, and highly realistic.

entries.title: Pancake Angel Idol Café Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A loose watercolor-and-ink anime illustration of a youthful male idol styled as a pancake angel taking a selfie inside a trendy café. He is centered in a close, slightly wide-angle selfie composition with one arm reaching toward the viewer from the left foreground, creating a casual fan-service snapshot feel. He has messy short blond hair and a soft, pretty-boy look, with large white angel wings spreading behind him. On top of his head sits a whimsical stack of golden pancakes with syrup and a square of butter like a halo. He wears an oversized white T-shirt printed with the words PANCAKE TENSHI and a pancake illustration, plus a thin necklace with a small star charm. The mood is cheerful, dreamy, and slightly idol-like. A hand-drawn speech bubble near his head contains the Japanese text 今日もふわふわ〜♪ パンケーキパワー!. The café interior behind him is bright and sketchy, with a blackboard sign reading CAFE Pancake Heaven, shelves and windows on the left, and 2 background idol performers on the right holding microphones on a tiny stage under hanging lights. In the foreground, show 3 plated or served pancake-themed items: one small decorated pancake dessert with whipped cream and berries at bottom left, one cropped pancake plate at bottom center, and one iced drink in a plastic cup at bottom right labeled TENSHI CAFE with a tiny wing icon. Add hand-drawn doodles, tiny hearts, sparkles, and handwritten Japanese menu notes around the food, including a small "Set List" card at the lower right. Use expressive pencil lines, soft beige and honey tones, white highlights, slightly messy café sketchbook energy, and charming editorial illustration quality.
entries.description: This prompt generates a whimsical anime-style watercolor café selfie of a winged male idol with pancake-themed styling, ideal for character art or social-media-style key visuals.

entries.title: Cinematic Sunset Couple Close-Up
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic golden-hour close-up of a young couple in an intimate outdoor moment, framed from the chest up. The main focus is a handsome young man with dark brown tousled wavy hair, soft defined jawline, smooth light-tan skin, and a calm, distant expression as he gazes slightly upward and off to the left. He wears a black open-collar button-up shirt with a relaxed, elegant fit. Leaning into him is 1 young woman with long dark brown hair, her face mostly hidden against his shoulder and chest, creating a tender, protective mood; only part of her hair, shoulder, and thin black spaghetti-strap dress are visible. Use warm sunset backlighting with the sun low behind them on the left, creating glowing rim light around their hair and shoulders, soft lens flare, amber highlights, shallow depth of field, and a blurred natural landscape in the background with low hills. The composition should feel romantic, editorial, and filmic, like a luxury fragrance or fashion campaign, with soft skin detail, realistic textures, subtle wind in the hair, muted earth tones, and high-end cinematic color grading. Photorealistic, emotional, intimate, 50mm lens look, ultra-detailed, natural light, soft contrast.
entries.description: This prompt generates a photorealistic romantic close-up of a couple at golden hour, ideal for cinematic social content, fashion-style visuals, or mood-driven promo imagery.

entries.title: Rainy Blue Editorial Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy fashion editorial portrait of a young woman standing outdoors on a rainy, overcast day beside a shallow reflecting pool and a pebled stone walkway, shown from about mid-thigh up in a vertical composition. She wears a monochrome pale powder-blue rain outfit consisting of a wide-brim waterproof sun hat and a high-collared technical raincoat with a hood, shiny silver front zippers, multiple drawstrings, toggles, and cord details around the waist and chest. The coat is zipped high so the collar covers part of the lower face, giving a cocooned, utilitarian look. Her short dark bob hair peeks out from under the hat. Pose her turned slightly to the side, body angled right, head facing the camera, with a calm, quiet, introspective mood. Use soft diffused light, muted cool tones, misty atmosphere, and very shallow depth of field so the modern architectural structures in the background are blurred and minimal. The setting should feel futuristic and serene, with wet surfaces, faint raindrops, pale gray sky, gentle reflections in the water, and a clean minimalist color palette dominated by pale powder blue. Make the image look like high-end contemporary streetwear photography, slightly cinematic, airy, soft focus, delicate contrast, and subtle film-like texture. Add a small handwritten-style watermark reading aichof near the right-center edge.
entries.description: This prompt generates a soft, minimalist fashion portrait of a woman in a monochrome rain outfit, ideal for editorial, lookbook, or atmospheric streetwear imagery.

entries.title: Avant-Garde Bridal Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-fashion studio portrait of a seated woman in an ethereal bridal look against a seamless light gray background, framed vertically from headpiece to the trailing ends of her hair. She wears a flowing sleeveless white gown with a high gathered neckline, sheer pleated chiffon over the bodice, delicate white floral appliqué clustered at the neck, chest, waist, and upper skirt, and a soft draped skirt spread around her on the floor. Her hair is deep dark brown and styled into 2 extremely long oversized bubble ponytails, one on each side, each segmented with white ties; the left ponytail shows 4 visible bubble sections and the right ponytail shows 3 visible bubble sections, with both tails extending onto the floor in thick glossy loops. She also wears an elaborate white fascinator hat tilted to one side, made of lace, netting, and sculptural floral details. Pose her leaning diagonally with one hand braced on the floor and the torso angled, creating an elegant editorial fashion posture. Keep the mood refined, bridal, and avant-garde, with soft diffused lighting, realistic skin texture, crisp textile detail, minimal shadows, and a clean luxury magazine aesthetic.

entries.title: Surreal Self-Reflection Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic conceptual portrait of a young man with curly hair and light stubble, wearing yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses, a beige minimal t-shirt, blue jeans, and off-white sneakers. He is sitting casually with a relaxed posture. The twist: he is seated on a large, hyper-realistic version of his own detached head placed on the ground. The head is scaled up, lying sideways, with the same facial features and sunglasses, creating a surreal self-reflection concept. Composition: centered, full-body shot, neutral studio background with soft beige tones, minimal aesthetic. Clean negative space. Typography integrated into the background: Handwritten-style text at the top: "HEAVY"; Below it, smaller text: "ON MY OWN MIND" with "MIND" crossed out; Large, rough, scribbled text in black: "HEAD". Lighting: soft diffused studio lighting, subtle shadows, high detail, fashion editorial quality. Style: blend of surrealism and modern streetwear campaign, minimal yet expressive, high-resolution, 8k, sharp focus, natural skin texture. Mood: introspective, mental weight, identity, self-awareness.

entries.title: Editorial Portrait with Retro Handheld
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-fashion studio portrait of a young woman posed from the waist up against a seamless vivid red background, centered in frame, with her face fully obscured by a solid vertical censor rectangle in a warm brown skin-tone color. She has copper red hair styled in multiple messy mini buns on top with long defined spiral ringlets cascading down both sides, creating a playful Y2K editorial look. She wears black rectangular eyeglasses partially visible at the left edge of the censor bar, and her right ear is covered in stacked silver piercings and one long dangling charm earring. Her outfit is a distressed layered gray ensemble: a sheer mesh short-sleeve top over a fitted inner layer, plus extra-long detached fingerless arm warmers or sleeves with visible overlock seams and worn edges. She also wears layered silver chain necklaces. Her nails are long, sharply tapered acrylics in metallic lavender chrome. In her right hand, held beside her chest, she displays an open blue Game Boy Advance SP angled toward the camera, with a dark inactive screen and clearly visible controls. Her left hand rises to her chin in a soft fashion pose, fingers bent delicately. The image should feel like a clean commercial editorial photo with crisp detail, soft even studio lighting, realistic skin and fabric texture, saturated color contrast between the gray clothing and red backdrop, and a cool alt-girl retro-gaming aesthetic.

entries.title: Fashion Editorial with Cartoons
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Full-body fashion editorial of a confident young woman sitting casually on a concrete ledge, relaxed pose with one leg slightly extended and arms resting naturally, direct gaze into the camera. She has long flowing hair moving gently in the wind, natural glowing skin, and subtle modern makeup. She is wearing a light blue oversized denim jacket layered over a clean white t-shirt, neutral-toned fitted shorts, bright colorful socks, and trendy sneakers.
Behind her, Tom and Jerry appear as playful cartoon characters integrated into the scene - slightly oversized, interacting with each other and the environment (Tom peeking from behind the ledge, Jerry standing on it or running playfully), positioned naturally in the background as if part of the world. Their style remains true to classic animation with bold outlines and expressive motion.
Beside her, a bold cartoon dragon illustration with thick outlines and vibrant neon blue, green, and yellow colors, playful yet powerful, subtly wrapping around the composition and interacting with the model's pose.
Scene is set in a bright urban outdoor environment with a clear blue sky, strong natural sunlight, crisp shadows, and high contrast lighting. Add subtle wind motion in clothing and hair.
Mixed-media aesthetic blending high-end photorealism with graphic illustration elements - include hand-drawn doodles, arrows, motion lines, sparkles, and dynamic graphic overlays around the subject and characters.
Ultra-detailed, HDR, sharp focus, cinematic composition, fashion magazine quality, 8K resolution.
entries.description: A complex mixed-media fashion prompt that blends photorealistic models with integrated classic cartoon characters and graphic doodles.

entries.title: Elegant Office Lady in Jewelry Store
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined anime-style close-up portrait of a stylish Japanese office lady in an elegant jewelry store, framed from the chest up. She has soft chestnut brown medium-length layered hair with a smooth side part, glossy highlights, and slightly tousled ends brushing her shoulders. Her face is mostly turned and partially obscured by her hair and hand, creating a coy, sophisticated composition that emphasizes her ear and accessories rather than direct eye contact. She gently touches 1 dangling earring with two fingers, as if trying it on or admiring it; the earring has 3 visible parts: a small round gemstone stud, a tiny connecting ornament, and a large transparent teardrop crystal pendant. She wears 1 delicate gold necklace with a small spherical pendant, 1 light beige blazer, and 1 soft white scoop-neck inner top. Her hand is slender with neatly manicured natural pink nails. The background is an upscale boutique jewelry display with warm golden bokeh lighting, softly blurred glass cases, and 2 visible necklace bust stands in the background. Use a polished modern anime illustration style with clean linework, subtle realism in the hair and hands, luminous skin, luxurious reflections on the jewelry, and a calm mature atmosphere. Vertical composition, intimate crop, premium fashion editorial feel, warm indoor lighting, soft depth of field, high detail.

entries.title: Elegant Office Lady at Beauty Counter
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined anime-style illustration of a stylish Japanese office lady in her late 20s to early 30s trying on lipstick in front of a luxury cosmetics mirror inside an elegant department store beauty counter. Medium shot framed through the mirror, with her reflected figure centered and the back of her head and hand softly visible in the left foreground holding a lipstick tube. She has warm chestnut brown shoulder-length softly wavy hair with a side part, small gold earrings, and a delicate gold necklace. Her outfit is polished and feminine: a light beige tailored blazer with gold buttons, a white satin-like blouse, and a deep burgundy high-waisted skirt. She carries a small taupe handbag on one arm. In the reflection, she is applying lipstick to her lips with one hand while holding the lipstick case in the other, giving the impression of checking her makeup before or after work. The setting is upscale and softly lit, with a large ornate gold-framed mirror, blurred cosmetic displays in the background, and a glamorous premium beauty-counter atmosphere. At the bottom of the mirror is a black and gold display stand labeled LUXE BEAUTÉ. On the counter, show exactly 8 visible cosmetic items in a neat arrangement: 4 gold lipstick tubes standing on the left, 3 open lipsticks in shades of mauve, pink, and coral near the center-right, and 1 rectangular perfume or cosmetic bottle on the far right. Also include a glass vase with pale blush roses at the lower right. Use soft bokeh lighting, glossy luxury materials, delicate linework, smooth anime rendering, elegant mature OL fashion, warm neutral tones with burgundy accents, and a sophisticated feminine mood.

entries.title: Windblown Blue Gown Desert Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-fashion full-body editorial photograph of a barefoot woman standing and stepping forward on rippled desert sand, wearing a dramatic flowing deep sapphire blue chiffon gown with a plunging halter neckline, wrapped waist, very high thigh slit, and an extremely long sheer train billowing powerfully to the right in the wind. Her dark brown hair is long and loose, blown sideways across the frame, and she wears delicate earrings, a bracelet, and a subtle necklace. Pose her in elegant side profile with her torso lifted, one leg extended through the slit, one hand lightly holding the fabric, creating a sense of motion and grace. Set the scene in a bright open desert or dry lakebed with pale sand, soft distant mountains low on the horizon, and swirling clouds of dust around her feet and behind her. Use warm late-afternoon backlighting with a hazy sunlit sky, soft golden-beige atmosphere, strong fabric translucency, cinematic movement, luxury fashion magazine styling, ultra-realistic texture, and a clean minimal background that emphasizes the dress and wind.

entries.title: Anime Band Finale at Budokan
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime concert illustration seen from behind the performers onstage, showing 4 teenage girls standing shoulder to shoulder at the front of a huge indoor arena, arms around each other in a triumphant post-performance moment. The camera is positioned slightly behind and below them, facing out toward the audience and the giant venue screen. The atmosphere is dazzling and emotional, filled with dense blue-and-gold confetti, sparkling particles, and strong white stage spotlights pouring down from above. The crowd fills the entire arena as a sea of tiny glowing blue lights. At center top, a giant rectangular screen displays elegant serif concert text: ELEMAYU, "1st LIVE at 日本武道館", 2024.6.15, and "SOLD OUT". On both upper side walls of the arena, the large venue name "日本武道館" is visible. The 4 girls all wear matching dark stage outfits: black or very dark navy hooded jackets with subtle decorative back prints, short pleated skirts, and live-performance styling. Count and depict all 4 members distinctly from left to right: 1) a girl with short wavy silver-lavender hair holding a bass guitar slung over her shoulder, 2) a girl with long straight black hair holding a red electric guitar, 3) a girl with fluffy shoulder-length blonde hair holding a dark guitar, 4) a girl with brown hair in a high ponytail, no visible instrument, raising one arm high and holding a drumstick or baton in celebration while the other arm wraps around the blonde member. Show their backs and silhouettes rim-lit by stage light, with soft highlights on their hair. Include stage equipment: a microphone stand and part of a bass neck at the far left, and a visible drum kit with cymbals at the right edge. The stage floor is glossy and reflective, covered with scattered confetti and several blue flower bouquets near the bottom foreground. Use rich midnight blues, violet shadows, warm golden sparkles, and cinematic bloom. The mood should feel like a sold-out dream performance finale, sentimental, victorious, and breathtakingly luminous, in highly detailed painterly anime style.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic anime-style illustration of a four-girl band embracing onstage before a sold-out arena crowd, ideal for concert key art or emotional music visuals.
