entries.title: Mixed-Media Editorial Shot with Cartoon Character
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Full-body fashion editorial shot of a confident young person model sitting casually on a concrete ledge, legs slightly apart, one arm resting on knee, the other relaxed, looking straight at camera with a calm dominant expression.

Wearing a light denim jacket over a plain white t-shirt, neutral shorts, bright socks, and modern sneakers. Clean styling, natural pose, wind slightly moving hair and fabric.

Beside and partially interacting with a stylized cartoon dog, positioned naturally as if sharing the same space.

The dog is illustrated in bold cartoon style with thick black outlines, vibrant neon color palette (blue, green, yellow accents), exaggerated proportions, expressive features, playful yet powerful presence.

Background: bright outdoor urban setting with clear blue sky, soft clouds, sunlit concrete textures, strong natural daylight, crisp shadows.

Fusion of hyper-realistic photography and graphic illustration, seamless integration between subject and cartoon.

Add graphic overlay elements: doodle arrows, scribbles, abstract shapes, comic-style symbols, dynamic motion lines.

High contrast, HDR lighting, sharp focus, fashion editorial composition, surreal mixed-media aesthetic, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution.

entries.title: Street Portrait with Churro
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, photorealistic outdoor portrait of a young East Asian woman standing on a sunlit street or plaza, framed from mid-thigh upward, with a softly blurred background showing a food stall or kiosk and a few indistinct people. She has a neat short bob haircut in dark brown with a side part, and she faces the camera in a relaxed upright pose. Her outfit consists of 2 visible clothing layers: a fitted ribbed turtleneck knit top in pale blue underneath a sleeveless A-line pinafore mini dress in light beige, with broad shoulder straps, 2 decorative round buttons at the strap attachments, and a prominent full-length front zipper with a ring pull. In one hand she holds 1 long churro in a tall white paper sleeve printed vertically with orange Japanese text reading チュロス and a small orange snack illustration near the bottom. Warm afternoon golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, natural skin tones, soft shadows, realistic fabric texture, fashion-street-snapshot aesthetic, high detail, DSLR-style portrait photography.

entries.title: Candid Bedroom Lounge Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, softly lit lifestyle photograph of a young woman lounging on a white bed in a minimal bedroom, shot vertically with a slightly wide lens from near her knees so her legs and oversized top dominate the foreground. She is lying on her back diagonally across the bed, wearing an oversized dark navy or black sweatshirt and very short light blue denim cutoff shorts with frayed hems, with bare legs visible in the foreground. Her arms are raised above and around her head in a relaxed, sleepy pose, one wrist bent loosely, and her face is mostly obscured by her arms and angle, giving an unposed, intimate feeling. Place the bed against a pale gray wall, with rumpled white bedding and large white pillows. On the left side near a window with sheer curtains, include a freestanding clothing rack holding exactly 8 visible hangers with neutral-toned clothes in black, white, beige, and gray, plus one blue garment draped over the top bar. On the right side behind the bed, include exactly 7 upright books lined on a narrow surface against the wall. Use natural daylight coming from the left window, soft shadows, muted cool tones, slight film-like grain, shallow depth of field, and a calm Japanese apartment aesthetic. Emphasize a relaxed weekend mood, understated realism, and the subtle sense of a presence caught in a private moment rather than direct eye contact.

entries.title: Japanese Graduation Photo Under Sakura
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft, realistic Japanese graduation-day photo in the style of vintage film photography, showing 6 teenage schoolgirls standing together outdoors in front of a school gate under full-bloom cherry blossoms. They wear matching Japanese high school uniforms: navy blazers, white shirts, burgundy ribbon bows, gray-blue plaid pleated skirts, navy knee-high socks, and black loafers, each carrying a large navy school bag. The group stands close together on the road at the entrance, with relaxed celebratory body language and a candid class-photo feel. At least 5 of the girls are making peace signs near their faces, and one girl on the far right raises her hand in a playful salute-like pose. Emphasize natural, flattering leg shapes, neat straight dark hair with soft bangs, youthful styling, and believable proportions. The composition is front-facing and full-body, with the students centered slightly left and the school gate on the right. Include a tall black gate pillar with vertical gold Japanese text reading "桜花女子高等学校" and a white ceremonial signboard beside it with large Japanese text reading "卒業証書授与式" and smaller school-name text below. Background filled with pale pink sakura trees in bloom, shallow depth of field, soft pastel tones, gentle spring haze, overcast bright daylight, subtle film grain, muted contrast, and an understated nostalgic atmosphere like an old-fashioned commemorative photograph.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic nostalgic group portrait of 6 Japanese schoolgirls in uniform posing with peace signs at a cherry-blossom-lined school graduation entrance.

entries.title: Vintage Little Prince Space Postcard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage illustrated postcard designed as a whimsical collaboration between The Little Prince and SPACEX, shown as the front and back of the postcard side by side on one canvas. Use warm aged paper with slightly worn edges, subtle grain, faint stains, and a nostalgic mid-century print feel. The left half is the postcard image: a deep midnight blue starry sky with small golden stars and a tiny ringed planet, a large white rocket standing upright on a launch pad with bright exhaust at liftoff, and a small blond child in a green outfit with a long golden scarf sitting on a rocky hill beside an orange fox, both seen from behind and looking toward the rocket. Add elegant hand-lettered quote text in the sky that reads To the stars, what matters is invisible., with smaller serif and script attribution beneath: "ANTOINE DE SAINT-EXUPÉRY" and "The Little Prince". Along the bottom of the left panel, include 2 brand names: "The Little Prince" in blue script on the left and "SPACEX" in bold blue futuristic capitals on the right, separated by a small gold star and a thin divider line. Beneath that, add the slogan in spaced small caps: EXPLORING WORLDS. CARING FOR WHAT MATTERS.. The right half is the postcard back on the same aged paper, with a centered heading "POST CARD" near the top and a small gold star ornament below it. Add a circular postmark near the upper center-right with 4 visible text parts arranged inside the stamp: "PLANET EARTH", "MAY 23", "2024", and "BEYOND". In the top-right corner, place a blue postage stamp with perforated edges showing the Little Prince standing on a tiny planet under stars, with 4 readable text elements: "1943", "Le Petit Prince", "SPACE", and a small star symbol. The right side should have 2 writing columns divided by a vertical line. In the left writing area, place a handwritten-style message beginning with "Dear friend," followed by this text in neat cursive line breaks: "One day, we'll leave Earth not to escape it, but to understand it better. The universe is vast, but kindness is our compass. Let's take care of our home, as we reach for the stars." Then sign it on 3 lines: "The Little Prince", "and", "SPACEX". In the right address area, write "To you," on the first line, then "Somewhere wonderful" and "In the Universe" on the next lines with horizontal guide lines. Add small gold star doodles and, at the bottom-right corner, a simple line drawing of a tiny round planet with little flowers sprouting from it. Keep the palette limited to cream, navy, soft gold, muted green, warm orange, and blue-gray, with crisp but painterly illustration, accurate decorative typography, and a magical, hopeful, literary-meets-space-exploration tone.
entries.description: A nostalgic illustrated postcard layout combining The Little Prince and a modern rocket launch, ideal for editorial art, themed prints, or brand-crossover concept visuals.

entries.title: Luxury Lavender Skincare Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Luxury feminine skincare advertisement, vertical 9:16 composition, ultra-realistic studio beauty product shot with dreamy soft focus and warm golden morning sunlight. Center a single elegant pump bottle serum in the foreground on a fluffy lavender-purple faux fur surface. The bottle is translucent pastel lavender glass with a shiny metallic gold pump and collar, premium glossy reflections, soft shadows, and subtle sparkle in the liquid. The front label reads LUMIÈRE in gold serif lettering, with smaller text below reading RADIANCE ELIXIR, then "NOURISH • HYDRATE • GLOW" and "FOR SOFT, SMOOTH & GLOWING SKIN," plus tiny size text at the bottom. Surround the bottle with a luxurious vanity setup: an ornate vintage mirror in the background, 1 ribbed glass candle jar with a lit flame on the lower left, 1 faceted glass perfume bottle with a gold neck on the right, strings of cream pearls draped across the surface, and airy white baby's breath flowers framing both sides and the lower right foreground. Use a soft beige and blush background with creamy bokeh and a cozy high-end beauty branding mood.

Add cute white and purple hand-drawn doodle elements: exactly 3 heart doodles, 2 sparkle/star doodles, 1 small zigzag doodle, 1 curved arrow pointing toward the bottle, and 2 short accent line clusters above the headline. Add exactly 4 handwritten paper-note stickers with torn edges and taped scrapbook styling: left note says "Self care ♡ Everyday", upper-right note says "For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin.♡", lower-right note says "Radiant Confident You ♡", and a purple heart-shaped sticker near the candle says "Glow is my favorite color ♡". Place large hand-lettered headline text across the upper half reading Glowy Skin In A Bottle in white brush-script with a soft lavender outline or glow. Beneath it, place a horizontal lavender paint-stroke banner with the subheading Nourish • Hydrate • Glow in white handwritten lettering. Clean composition, premium soft feminine branding, Instagram/TikTok-friendly viral beauty ad style, polished editorial product photography, pastel purple and gold color palette, cozy glamorous atmosphere.
entries.description: A premium pastel-purple skincare product advertisement with handwritten overlays and vanity props, ideal for beauty branding and social media promo visuals.

entries.title: Blue Couture Group Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxurious studio fashion portrait of four elegant young women posed closely together in a dramatic royal-blue fantasy setting, all wearing coordinated deep sapphire and midnight-navy couture evening gowns with glittering beadwork, floral appliqué, sequins, lace sleeves, sheer mesh details, and voluminous layered skirts. The scene is monochromatic blue with a cool, moody, high-end editorial color grade. Arrange the women in a tight triangular composition: two standing or elevated in the back and two seated in front on draped fabric, with varied graceful poses, one woman raising an arm above her head, one leaning slightly, one seated upright, and one resting her chin on her hand. Their dresses should each be distinct but harmonized, featuring ornate crystal embellishments, embroidered flowers, and fitted bodices. Add matching sapphire jewelry including dangling earrings, gemstone necklaces, and floral hair accessories. Use long flowing hair in mixed dark black and soft light brown tones, styled smooth and glamorous. Surround them with opulent set dressing: 2 classical urn vases filled with blue roses, 1 fluted stone column in the background, heavy shimmering velvet curtains, and abundant draped satin fabric pooling around them. Lighting should be soft and diffused with subtle highlights on satin and jewels, creating a regal, mysterious, romantic atmosphere. Shoot as a vertical fashion editorial portrait, waist-up to full seated composition, highly detailed fabric textures, polished luxury beauty campaign aesthetic, no visible text.
entries.description: A moody luxury fashion prompt for generating an elegant group portrait of women in coordinated sapphire gowns for editorial, beauty, or formal campaign imagery.

entries.title: 2x2 Beauty Portrait Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean 2x2 portrait collage of a young East Asian woman in a minimal studio setting with a soft white background, photographed in a high-end beauty editorial style. All four panels are tightly framed close-up or cropped bust portraits with soft diffused lighting, realistic skin texture, crisp pores, subtle natural freckles, glossy eyes, and sharp details around the eyelashes, lips, and hair strands. The overall color palette is pale, airy, and neutral with gentle pink accents, while the subject has straight black hair and wispy bangs in most panels. In the top-left panel, she faces forward with both hands pressed to her cheeks, elbows out of frame, creating a cute symmetrical pose; her face is largely covered by her hands, only the hair, ears, and sides of the face visible. In the top-right panel, show the clearest beauty portrait: direct eye contact, calm slightly melancholic expression, crossed fingers held in front of the lips, long translucent pale pink manicure, and exactly 4 chunky pink plastic flower rings across the fingers, with delicate makeup and softly parted lips. In the bottom-left panel, she leans on a white tabletop with one arm folded forward, wearing exactly 2 pink hair clips on the left side of her hair, casual and youthful styling, relaxed posture. In the bottom-right panel, show a cropped portrait with the hair tied back, one hand supporting the chin, wearing a fluffy off-white sherpa zip jacket over a light pink top, minimal makeup, and a quiet natural expression. Keep the composition editorial and balanced, with each panel separated by thin white gutters, ultra-realistic beauty photography, enhanced image clarity, deblurred details, natural skin, soft shadows, and premium cosmetics campaign quality.
entries.description: This prompt generates a four-panel studio beauty collage of a young woman with natural makeup and soft fashion styling, ideal for editorial portrait tests or cosmetics-inspired social media visuals.

entries.title: Spanish GRWM Morning Beauty Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical 9:16 TikTok-style GRWM beauty thumbnail set in a warm, sunlit Mediterranean-inspired bedroom. A stylish young woman with dark brown hair in a messy curly updo sits at a marble vanity, leaning forward with one arm folded and the other hand applying lip balm or lipstick to her mouth. Her face is covered by a centered rectangular blur block for privacy, but the rest of her styling is elegant and natural: tan glowing skin, delicate gold necklace with a small round pendant, thin gold bracelet, stacked gold rings, and a white lace camisole with thin straps. In the foreground on the vanity are exactly 7 visible beauty objects: 1 round tabletop vanity mirror on the left, 1 cup holding 5 makeup brushes, 1 clear glass dropper bottle, 1 tall white pump skincare bottle, 1 small black dropper bottle, 1 beige rounded cosmetic sponge or puff, and 1 pale green squeeze tube on the right. The background shows a softly blurred cozy bedroom with 1 arched window on the left, 1 leafy potted plant, 1 bed with white bedding and a mustard accent pillow, exposed wooden ceiling detail, and 1 framed landscape painting on the wall. entries.title: Red Vinyl Soundtrack Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic luxury product advertisement shot of a vintage wooden turntable playing a translucent bright red vinyl record in a warm, dimly lit living room. Behind the turntable, an upright album cover dominates the frame with a bold distressed red background and large condensed cream-white block lettering reading BELLA CIAO at the upper left, with smaller black text beneath reading SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE. The cover art shows a dark black silhouette of a hooded figure centered against the red field, with a row of small marching figures along the bottom edge and faint architectural line art on the lower left, evoking political resistance and dramatic soundtrack imagery. The turntable is shown in three-quarter view on a wooden table, with a brushed metal platter rim, black tonearm resting on the record at the right, and a small metallic control knob visible at front left. Use a shallow depth of field, premium editorial lighting, rich amber highlights, soft candle glow in the background on the right, shelves and home interior details blurred in the background, and a high-end fashion-campaign-meets-music-product aesthetic. At the bottom of the image, add a bold promotional banner overlay with large white condensed all-caps text reading SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE and a centered red rectangular button underneath with white all-caps text reading SHOP NOW. Include a small white Pollo.ai watermark in the top-right corner. Ultra-realistic photography, sharp focus on the vinyl and cover, moody luxurious atmosphere, social-media ad composition, vertical 2:3 format.

entries.prompt: A soft, editorial-style outdoor fashion photograph of a woman standing in a wildflower meadow in the mountains during daylight, shown from behind with her body turned slightly three-quarters to the side and her head angled back toward the camera. Surround her with dense natural grasses and blooming wildflowers, including visible white daisies and small yellow flowers in the foreground and midground. Use a wide open landscape, partly cloudy blue sky, warm natural sunlight, earthy tones, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, realistic photography, high detail, soft contrast, and a dreamy bohemian countryside mood.

entries.title: Cinematic Paris Fashion Shot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Dramatic, low-angle ground perspective full-body shot captured with a 50mm lens at f/1.4, featuring the specific uploaded face reference (neat beard, slicked-back hair, wearing stylish aviator glasses, tailored high-fashion modern clothing) standing on the platform of Trocadéro at night. He is dressed in a structured black velvet blazer over a black cashmere roll-neck sweater, tailored black trousers, and polished black boots, looking up intently at the fully illuminated Eiffel Tower, which dominates the background. Directly behind him is a deep sapphire blue Bugatti Chiron, reflecting the surrounding city lights. His foot is planted on the rear tire, with his body leaning casually back. The composition uses a shallow depth of field, rendering the distant Parisian street lights and crowd into a creamy bokeh. Spotlighting from city lamps creates dramatic, high-contrast shadows. 8k resolution, photorealistic, cinematic high-fashion editorial aesthetic.

entries.title: Sunlit Streetwear Jacket Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic lifestyle fashion photo of a woman standing indoors in a warm, sunlit modern loft living room, framed from mid-thigh up, facing the camera with her hands tucked into the pockets of an oversized black satin varsity-style bomber jacket. The jacket is the clear focus: glossy black fabric, ribbed collar and hem, snap-button front, slightly puffed sleeves, and large collegiate lettering across the chest that reads NEW YORK in bold orange letters with white outlines. Add a smaller orange-and-white sports patch on the upper sleeve and white block text on the opposite sleeve for an authentic team-jacket feel. Style the model with long, loose, softly wavy balayage hair in dark brown with caramel highlights, minimal jewelry including layered gold necklaces, and light gray sweatpants visible at the bottom of frame. Keep the face intentionally obscured with a centered rectangular blur block for privacy. The setting is a minimalist beige interior with tall industrial windows on the left casting strong morning sunlight and geometric shadows, a cream sofa with a pillow, a low coffee table with 3 stacked books and a dark bowl, pale walls, and a simple wooden side table in the background. Shoot in a high-end editorial e-commerce style with natural golden light, soft shadows, sharp jacket detail, shallow depth of field, neutral warm tones, and a clean premium streetwear aesthetic.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, photorealistic vertical smartphone photo of a young woman shopping in a cozy candle and home fragrance store, shot from a slightly elevated angle looking down at her upper body and torso. entries.title: Surreal Patio Portrait with Crow and Dog
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A slightly surreal but photorealistic portrait of a seated person in a quiet courtyard or patio, centered in frame, wearing a fitted white long-sleeve turtleneck top with delicate pink floral prints and a printed illustration of a girl on the chest, paired with loose cream floral pants. The person sits on a simple white metal chair and holds a small fluffy poodle-like dog in their lap; the dog has curly off-white fur and distinctly dyed orange ears. Perched on top of the person's dark hair bun is a black crow or raven, facing left, calm and balanced as if it naturally belongs there. The subject's pose is still, direct, and formal, creating an odd deadpan family-portrait feeling. Set the scene against a textured off-white stucco wall with exactly 4 notable decorative background elements: 1 brown sun-shaped wall ornament in the upper left, 1 small wall-mounted planter shelf with a small bird figurine and trailing flowers on the left, 1 tall arched window or mural on the right showing a bright blue sky with soft white clouds, and 1 white pedestal planter at lower right filled with long green leaves and exactly 2 pink flamingo ornaments. Include a bit of stone edging and dark greenery at lower left and a brown tiled floor. Lighting is soft natural daylight, slightly overcast, with muted colors, shallow depth of field, and a vintage editorial photography look. Composition should be vertical, full seated figure, straight-on, balanced, and quietly uncanny. Customize the main figure as a middle-aged woman, the bird as black crow, the dog breed as small poodle mix, the dog ear color as orange, and the outfit palette as white and faded pink florals.

entries.title: Surreal Archer With Birds and Animals
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal cinematic outdoor portrait of a masked archer standing in a dry field under a deep clear blue sky, framed from about the knees up in a wide horizontal composition. The central figure is a woman-like person in a vintage prairie-style dress and matching headscarf, aiming a simple wooden longbow toward the left side of the frame with an arrow drawn back to the cheek. Her face is fully obscured by a soft rectangular blur or blocky censorship patch, creating an uncanny anonymous effect. The dress is sage green with long puffed sleeves, a gathered waist tied with a sash, and a tiny repeating red-and-white floral dot pattern. A red cloth or scarf is wrapped around the lower face and neck beneath the green head covering. Surrounding her are 12 animals total: 8 white birds flying across the sky at different distances, 2 larger white birds standing on the ground at the right side, 1 deer head entering from the lower left foreground, and 1 sheep or goat head entering from the lower right foreground. Add 1 red-headed crane-like bird at the far right edge, visible in profile. The image should feel dreamlike, strange, and symbolic rather than realistic, with crisp midday sunlight, rich saturated colors, soft film grain, and a slightly vintage editorial-photography look. Use low-angle perspective, dynamic diagonal lines from the bow and arrow, and layered animal placement to create tension and motion. Dry grasses appear at the bottom edge, but the background is mostly open sky. Highly detailed fabric folds, natural bird wing positions, and a balanced surreal composition.

entries.title: Minimalist Fashion Moodboard Outfit
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean editorial fashion collage on a light gray-white background with a thin black rectangular border, styled like a minimalist magazine outfit board. Center the outfit as a flat lay style composition with 5 visible fashion items: a bright crimson red cropped zip-front jacket with a pointed collar and elastic hem placed slightly left and layered on top; underneath it, a fitted white long-sleeve crew-neck knit top visible at the shoulders and sleeves; below, a voluminous mid-calf A-line skirt in off-white with evenly spaced large black polka dots; at lower left, a structured small black handbag with short top handles and a subtle glossy crocodile texture; at lower right, one pair of black square-toe Mary Jane flats with wide straps and silver grommet-ring hardware. Add oversized very pale gray background typography reading MANGO stretched large across the middle behind the clothing. Place smaller black fashion-brand wordmarks around the layout: MANGO near the upper right of the outfit, "Stradivarius" near the handbag and again near the shoes, and "DOLCE & GABBANA" at the lower left near the skirt hem. The composition should feel balanced, chic, and contemporary, with soft studio lighting, no shadows or only faint soft shadows, crisp cutout edges, and a polished social-media fashion moodboard aesthetic.

entries.title: Surreal Map Dress Fashion Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-fashion editorial photograph of a female model standing in an arid desert landscape with distant mountains under a soft cloudy sky. She is wearing a spectacular, structured haute couture dress made entirely of folded vintage maps, featuring sharp, origami-like geometric layers and a strapless bodice. She has dark hair swept up, striking facial features, and wears large circular earrings resembling compasses. Surrounding her in the air are exactly 7 floating elongated compass needles with clock faces in the center. The image features cinematic late afternoon lighting, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the paper dress and the dry earth. Photorealistic, surreal fashion photography.

entries.title: Japanese Salaryman Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean anime-style male character design sheet for a modern Japanese office worker, with the character's face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur in every portrait.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character-reference sheet on a white background, approximately 16:9. Use thin black divider lines, neat Japanese editorial layout, and muted professional colors.

Layout: Place a left information column, three full-body character views across the center, and a right detail column. The overall look should resemble a polished commercial character settings document.

Left information column: At the top, draw a bordered profile card with exactly 4 labeled rows: name, occupation, height, and weight. Use Japanese text for the visible labels and values: 「名前: 高橋深月」 with small furigana above the name and "(Takahashi Mizuki)" underneath, 「職業: サラリーマン」, 「身長: 182cm」, 「体重: 68kg」. Below it, add a section titled 「キャラクター設定」 with exactly 4 bullet points describing him as a salaryman in his late twenties, calm and intellectual with a strong sense of responsibility, serious and trusted at work, and clean-looking with a trustworthy impression. At the bottom, add a section titled 「カラー設定」 with exactly 5 color swatches: hair light brown #8B6F5E, eyes brown #5A3E2B, suit gray #646A70, shirt white #FFFFFF, tie/shoes/belt black #111111.

Center character views: Show exactly 3 full-body views of the same man wearing a fitted gray business suit: left side view labeled 「側面図」, center front view labeled 「正面図」, and right back view labeled 「背面図」. The man is tall and slim, with light-brown center-parted hair, a white dress shirt, black slim tie with a tie pin, gray notch-lapel jacket, matching slim straight trousers with center crease, black belt, black dress shoes, and a simple analog wristwatch. In the side view, show one hand in pocket and a relaxed upright posture. In the front view, show one hand in pocket and the other relaxed at his side. In the back view, show the suit jacket seams and clean tapered silhouette.

Center annotation callouts: Add thin leader lines and Japanese labels pointing to the outfit and traits. Include callouts for hairstyle, expression, suit, necktie, pants, and shoes. The hairstyle note should describe a center part with naturally flowing hair; the expression note should describe a calm and slightly smiling trustworthy impression; the suit note should describe a crisp fitted silhouette; the necktie note should describe a black solid tie with tie pin; the pants note should describe slim straight slacks with a center crease; the shoes note should describe black straight-tip dress shoes.

Right detail column: Title the column 「ディテール」. Include exactly 4 rectangular detail panels stacked vertically: 1) close-up head and hair with blurred face, 2) close-up chest showing lapels, shirt, tie, tie pin, and pocket square, 3) close-up sleeve cuff and simple analog watch, 4) close-up fabric texture swatch. Add Japanese bullet notes beside these panels: bangs are center-parted and flow naturally, hair has neat straight texture, eyes are calm and composed, jacket has notch lapels and a pocket square, sleeves show four real buttons, watch is a simple analog type, fabric is a high-quality wool-blend suit material suitable for spring, autumn, and winter.

Bottom-right notes: Add a small bordered box titled 「備考」 with exactly 3 bullet points emphasizing cleanliness and trustworthiness, a basic refined business-suit style, and a simple but polished design.

Visual style: Semi-realistic anime illustration, clean line art, soft cel shading, realistic suit folds, elegant muted palette, magazine-like Japanese character sheet design, crisp legible typography, no decorative background, no watermark.
entries.description: Creates a detailed anime-style Japanese business character reference sheet with profile data, outfit callouts, color swatches, and detail panels.

jacket seams and clean tapered silhouette. center annotation callouts: add thin leader lines and japanese labels pointing to the outfit and traits. include callouts for hairstyle, expression, suit, necktie, pants, and shoes. the hairstyle note should describe a center part with naturally flowing hair; the expression note should describe a calm and slightly smiling trustworthy impression; the suit note should describe a crisp fitted silhouette; the necktie note should describe a black solid tie with tie pin; the pants note should describe slim straight slacks with a center crease; the shoes note should describe black straight-tip dress shoes. right detail column: title the column 「ディテール」. include exactly 4 rectangular detail panels stacked vertically: 1) close-up head and hair with blurred face, 2) close-up chest showing lapels, shirt, tie, tie pin, and pocket square, 3) close-up sleeve cuff and simple analog watch, 4) close-up fabric texture swatch. add japanese bullet notes beside these panels: bangs are center-parted and flow naturally, hair has neat straight texture, eyes are calm and composed, jacket has notch lapels and a pocket square, sleeves show four real buttons, watch is a simple analog type, fabric is a high-quality wool-blend suit material suitable for spring, autumn, and winter. bottom-right notes: add a small bordered box titled 「備考」 with exactly 3 bullet points emphasizing cleanliness and trustworthiness, a basic refined business-suit style, and a simple but polished design. visual style: semi-realistic anime illustration, clean line art, soft cel shading, realistic suit folds, elegant muted palette, magazine-like japanese character sheet design, crisp legible typography, no decorative background, no watermark. infographic / edu visual portrait editorial analog realistic magazine office

entries.title: Technical Fashion Specification Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Generate a single-page technical specification sheet, A3 portrait, aspect ratio 1:1.4, black line art on white background with Pantone chips.

Style: LX-DR-01, evening gown, 1970s Halston bias drape combined with 2025 circular design principles.

Layout:
 left: front flat and back flat at 1:6 scale
 center: detail views at 1:2 scale (cowl neck, bishop sleeve cuff, detachable train attachment, side slit)
 right: bill of materials, measurement chart, title block

1970s elements:
 - bias-cut silhouette with cowl neckline depth 18 cm from HPS
 - long bishop sleeves gathered into 6 cm cuff height with covered button closure
 - empire seam positioned 5 cm below bust line
 - floor length with 20 cm side slit at left leg
 - bias drape at hip

2025 elements:
 - shell 19 momme 100 percent recycled silk charmeuse with blockchain traceability, Pantone 19-5408 TCX Deep Emerald
 - lining 100 percent cupro bemberg Pantone 11-0602 TCX Gardenia
 - detachable train length 80 cm with hidden magnetic closure at center back waist
 - 3D-knitted internal bodice support at bust
 - zero-waste pattern layout noted at 92 percent efficiency
 - NFC authenticity chip encased in right side seam
 - printed QR code care label

Measurements size FR 38:
 center back length 150 cm from nape to hem, bust 1/2 43 cm, waist 1/2 34 cm, hip 1/2 46 cm,
 sleeve length 62 cm from shoulder point, sleeve cuff circumference 18 cm, sweep 1/2 75 cm, slit height 20 cm

Construction:
 French seams throughout body using 301 lockstitch at 14 spi, seam allowance 1 cm
 hand-rolled hem 3 mm at bottom and train edge
 invisible zipper center back length 55 cm
 bar tack at slit top

Materials and color:
 thread 100 percent silk size 120 to match shell
 hardware: two covered buttons 12 mm diameter one per cuff, six pairs neodymium magnets 8 mm diameter for train

Labels:
 main label center back neck, care label left side seam with text "Dry clean only. 100 percent recycled silk." in English and French and Italian

Render annotations in 8pt sans-serif horizontal with leader lines, no shading.

Generate a full-length editorial image, aspect ratio 3:4, of a female model age 24 height 178 cm measurements 86-61-88 cm.

Garment exact specification LX-DR-01:
 - bias-cut evening gown in 19 momme 100 percent recycled silk charmeuse with blockchain traceability Pantone 19-5408 TCX Deep Emerald, lining 100 percent cupro bemberg Pantone 11-0602 TCX Gardenia
 - cowl neckline depth 18 cm from HPS, empire seam 5 cm below bust line
 - long bishop sleeves gathered into cuff height 6 cm with two covered buttons 12 mm diameter one per cuff, sleeve length 62 cm from shoulder point, cuff circumference 18 cm
 - floor length center back 150 cm from nape to hem, sweep 1/2 75 cm, 20 cm side slit at left leg with bar tack at slit top
 - detachable train length 80 cm attached at center back waist with hidden magnetic closure using six pairs neodymium magnets 8 mm diameter
 - internal 3D-knitted bodice support at bust, French seams throughout with 301 lockstitch at 14 spi seam allowance 1 cm, hand-rolled hem 3 mm at bottom and train edge, invisible zipper 55 cm center back
 - zero-waste pattern layout 92 percent efficiency, NFC authenticity chip in right side seam, printed QR care label left side seam, main label center back neck, thread 100 percent silk size 120

Styling: paired with 1970s satin strappy heels in champagne, 2025 recycled gold ear cuffs, hair in low sleek chignon.

Pose: standing in contrapposto, left leg forward to show side slit, right hand lightly holding train to reveal magnetic attachment point, gaze to camera, professional runway posture.

Environment: 1970s marble staircase with brass railing, updated with LED cove lighting, evening ambient light.

entries.title: K-Pop Dance 16-Step Instruction Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
K-Pop Dance 16-Step Instruction Sheet (4×4 Grid)

[VISUAL STYLE]
High-end K-pop choreography guide in monochrome grayscale
Crisp, studio-lit composition with strong contrast
Modern, editorial + performance aesthetic
Clean white background, no distractions

[GRID LAYOUT, STRICT]
4×4 grid (16 equal panels)
Thin black divider lines
Each panel clearly numbered 1-16
Top-left: Step number + short title
Bottom-left: 3-4 short instruction lines
Overlay: arrows + motion guides (curved, straight, circular)

[CHARACTER]
Korean female dancer (K-pop idol look)
Slim, athletic build
Long styled hair (soft waves or straight, dynamic movement)
Confident, expressive K-pop performance energy
Same character across all 16 panels (consistent face and proportions)

[WARDROBE K-POP STYLE]
Fitted crop top (stylish, performance-ready)
High-waisted loose-fit jeans (street dance vibe)
Sneakers
Outfit should feel trendy, idol-stage inspired
Fabric reacts naturally to motion (subtle folds, movement)

🔢 [16 DANCE STEPS, SEQUENCE FLOW]
Starting Pose
Step Touch Right
Step Touch Left
Hip Sway Combo
Body Roll Down
Back Step Sweep
Quarter Turn Pivot
Hair Flip & Pose
Side Step Drag
Cross Behind Unwind
Body Wave Up
Hip Circle
Step Lock Step
Arm Sweep Pose
Chest Pop & Hit
Final Pose

[PANEL STRUCTURE, EACH FRAME]
Center: full-body pose (clear choreography position)
Bottom-left: short bullet instructions (clean typography)
Motion arrows showing direction, spins, and flow
Emphasize rhythm, weight shift, and sharp K-pop accents

[MOTION STYLE]
Mix of sharp hits + smooth transitions (K-pop signature)
Clean isolations (hips, chest, arms)
Expressive poses with attitude

[RENDER QUALITY]
Ultra-detailed, high-resolution
Sharp anatomy and pose clarity
Smooth grayscale shading
No blur, no distortion, no clutter

[RESTRICTIONS]
No background elements
No extra characters
No color (strict grayscale)
Maintain clean instructional aesthetic

entries.title: Dish-to-Couture Fashion Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image of the plated dish, transform the food into a luxury fashion concept board where the dish becomes the direct design inspiration for a couture evening gown. Keep the visual DNA of the ingredients and plating: convert the light green vegetable pieces into layered flowing silk and chiffon panels, the darker greens into a sheer deep green inner layer, the reddish sausage slices into subtle rust-red piping and small accent details, the sesame seeds into delicate bead embroidery, and the blue-and-white porcelain bowl pattern into a printed scarf collar, wide waist belt, and matching handbag. Present 1 full-body female fashion model in the center wearing the dress, with 4 detail close-up panels on the right showing the back view, the waist/belt construction, the embroidery texture, and the handbag. Add a left-side editorial layout with 1 large Chinese headline, 1 English subtitle reading "Fashion Inspired by Flavor," 1 short Chinese descriptive paragraph, and 5 vertical fabric/material swatches derived from the dish colors and bowl pattern. Clean high-fashion lookbook styling, elegant studio background, premium fashion design presentation.

entries.title: Luxury personal color profile layout
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
LUXURY PERSONAL COLOR PROFILE - EDITORIAL LAYOUT
Studio portrait of subject as anchor - skin retouched to luminous glass-like perfection, preserved natural structure, realistic pore texture, soft directional key lighting, no facial alteration. Background: warm ecru parchment with subtle linen grain texture. Layout reads like a Vogue Italia beauty supplement printed on heavyweight matte stock. Structured editorial grid, 3-column asymmetric, wide negative space, serif condensed display headers, all labels in spaced uppercase tracking, cohesive warm ivory/sand/ecru background system throughout all panels, ultra-photorealistic 8K, soft diffused studio lighting, flat elegant surfaces, no drop shadows.
PANELS:
1 UNDERTONE DIAGNOSIS - Tonal spectrum bar from cool ash to warm amber, precision needle marker on subject's reading. Labels: Cool / Neutral-Cool / Neutral / Neutral-Warm / Warm. Fine annotation text.
2 SEASONAL COLOR PALETTE - 10-12 fabric-textured swatches in subject's optimal season. Each labeled with poetic color name and HEX. Grouped: Power Colors / Softest Options / Harmonizing Neutrals.
3 COLORS TO AVOID - Desaturated row of clashing tones with fine editorial strikethrough. Clean, non-harsh presentation.
4 MAKEUP CARTOGRAPHY - Eyeshadow gradient dust swatches / blush tones fanned on skin strip / lip spectrum barely-there to bold / highlighter finishes labeled: champagne, rose gold, pearlescent ivory.
5 HAIR COLOR SPECTRUM - Curved gradient strip: base, dimension, highlight, contrast tones. Gold bracket indicators on best options.
6 JEWELRY & METAL GUIDE - Flat-lay editorial render: yellow gold, rose gold, oxidized silver, platinum finishes alongside complementary stone tones. Minimal styling.
7 YOU IN YOUR PALETTE - 3-4 editorial lookbook frames, subject in palette-correct outfits. Mood labels: Quiet Luxury / Off-Duty Editorial / Evening Presence.
8 CAPSULE WARDROBE GRID - Outfit flatlay: tops, bottoms, outerwear, shoes, bag - all palette-correct. Coordinating lines showing interchangeability. Net-a-Porter editorial aesthetic.
9 PRINTS & PATTERNS - 4 fabric print thumbnails: micro geometric, tonal abstract, classic stripe, floral scale. One-line styling note per print.
10 STYLE ARCHETYPE - Single typographic panel. Style identity title set large (e.g. "Modern Romantic / Warm Classicist"). Three defining aesthetic words. Four-line editorial wardrobe philosophy note.
RENDER SPECS: Ultra-photorealistic, 8K, editorial magazine print quality, warm neutral color grading, soft diffused studio lighting consistent across all panels, one serif display font + one fine sans-serif body font, no gradients, flat matte surfaces only.

editorial layout studio portrait of subject as anchor - skin retouched to luminous glass-like perfection, preserved natural structure, realistic pore texture, soft directional key lighting, no facial alteration. background: warm ecru parchment with subtle linen grain texture. layout reads like a vogue italia beauty supplement printed on heavyweight matte stock. structured editorial grid, 3-column asymmetric, wide negative space, serif condensed display headers, all labels in spaced uppercase tracking, cohesive warm ivory/sand/ecru background system throughout all panels, ultra-photorealistic 8k, soft diffused studio lighting, flat elegant surfaces, no drop shadows. panels: 1 undertone diagnosis - tonal spectrum bar from cool ash to warm amber, precision needle marker on subject's reading. labels: cool / neutral-cool / neutral / neutral-warm / warm. fine annotation text. 2 seasonal color palette - 10-12 fabric-textured swatches in subject's optimal season. each labeled with poetic color name and hex. grouped: power colors / softest options / harmonizing neutrals. 3 colors to avoid - desaturated row of clashing tones with fine editorial strikethrough. clean, non-harsh presentation. 4 makeup cartography - eyeshadow gradient dust swatches / blush tones fanned on skin strip / lip spectrum barely-there to bold / highlighter finishes labeled: champagne, rose gold, pearlescent ivory. 5 hair color spectrum - curved gradient strip: base, dimension, highlight, contrast tones. gold bracket indicators on best options. 6 jewelry & metal guide - flat-lay editorial render: yellow gold, rose gold, oxidized silver, platinum finishes alongside complementary stone tones. minimal styling. 7 you in your palette - 3-4 editorial lookbook frames, subject in palette-correct outfits. mood labels: quiet luxury / off-duty editorial / evening presence. 8 capsule wardrobe grid - outfit flatlay: tops, bottoms, outerwear, shoes, bag - all palette-correct. coordinating lines showing interchangeability. net-a-porter editorial aesthetic. 9 prints & patterns - 4 fabric print thumbnails: micro geometric, tonal abstract, classic stripe, floral scale. one-line styling note per print. 10 style archetype - single typographic panel. style identity title set large (e.g. "modern romantic / warm classicist"). three defining aesthetic words. four-line editorial wardrobe philosophy note. render specs: ultra-photorealistic, 8k, editorial magazine print quality, warm neutral color grading, soft diffused studio lighting consistent across all panels, one serif display font + one fine sans-serif body font, no gradients, flat matte surfaces only. infographic / edu visual editorial portrait beauty realistic studio magazine studio

entries.title: Luxury Fashion Color Analysis Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-end editorial "Color Analysis Board" from this portrait in a Dior / Ralph Lauren aesthetic. Clean beige/ivory background, warm tones, soft diffused lighting, ultra-detailed photorealistic quality, consistent lighting, minimal elegant typography, grid-based layout.

Main portrait: enhanced natural beauty (same identity, smooth skin, soft glow, realistic texture)Top section: "Your Best Colors" with fabric swatches with the best algorithm choices Undertone panel: warm / neutral / cool with marked result.
Colors to avoid
Neutrals that work
Prints that flatter
Makeup guide: eyeshadows, blush, lips, highlighter 
"You in your colors": multiple outfit best variations 
Hair colors: best .
Jewelry
Style notes

Capsule wardrobe: coordinated outfits, shoes, bags, accessories 
Style: best style for me

entries.title: Japanese Lifestyle Magazine Layout

entries.prompt: Use the person in the reference image as the main subject, preserving their facial features, hairstyle, and overall vibe. Include one main portrait photo, several smaller lifestyle/detail photos, clean editorial typography, headline, section label, multi-column body text, captions, generous white space, and a refined grid layout. entries.title: K-Pop Choreography Instruction Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
K-Pop Dance 16-Step Instruction Sheet (4×4 Grid)

[VISUAL STYLE]
High-end K-pop choreography guide in monochrome grayscale
Crisp, studio-lit composition with strong contrast
Modern, editorial + performance aesthetic
Clean white background, no distractions

[GRID LAYOUT, STRICT]
4×4 grid (16 equal panels)
Thin black divider lines
Each panel clearly numbered 1-16
Top-left: Step number + short title
Bottom-left: 3-4 short instruction lines
Overlay: arrows + motion guides (curved, straight, circular)

[CHARACTER]
Korean female dancer (K-pop idol look)
Slim, athletic build
Long styled hair (soft waves or straight, dynamic movement)
Confident, expressive K-pop performance energy
Same character across all 16 panels (consistent face and proportions)

[WARDROBE K-POP STYLE]
Fitted crop top, high-waisted loose-fit jeans, and sneakers
Outfit should feel trendy, idol-stage inspired
Fabric reacts naturally to motion (subtle folds, movement)

🔢 [16 DANCE STEPS, SEQUENCE FLOW]
Starting Pose
Step Touch Right
Step Touch Left
Hip Sway Combo
Body Roll Down
Back Step Sweep
Quarter Turn Pivot
Hair Flip & Pose
Side Step Drag
Cross Behind Unwind
Body Wave Up
Hip Circle
Step Lock Step
Arm Sweep Pose
Chest Pop & Hit
Final Pose

[PANEL STRUCTURE, EACH FRAME]
Center: full-body pose (clear choreography position)
Bottom-left: short bullet instructions (clean typography)
Motion arrows showing direction, spins, and flow
Emphasize rhythm, weight shift, and sharp K-pop accents

[MOTION STYLE]
Mix of sharp hits + smooth transitions (K-pop signature)
Clean isolations (hips, chest, arms)
Expressive poses with attitude

[RENDER QUALITY]
Ultra-detailed, high-resolution
Sharp anatomy and pose clarity
Smooth grayscale shading
No blur, no distortion, no clutter

[RESTRICTIONS]
No background elements
No extra characters
No color (strict grayscale)
Maintain clean instructional aesthetic
entries.description: Generates a 16-panel instructional grid for K-pop dance, including arrows, labels, and consistent character poses.

entries.title: Jomon Dogu Couture Moodboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the ancient clay figurine into a high-end fashion editorial moodboard for a couture collection inspired directly by its form and surface language. Keep the figurine visible on the board as the source artifact, then add 4 fashion looks derived from it: 1 central full-body hero look and 3 smaller collection looks below, each translating the figure's triangular headpiece, broad sculptural shoulders, rounded lower silhouette, and spiral/incised patterns into avant-garde garments and accessories. Present the result as a clean luxury brand presentation board with an editorial layout on a light background, mixing product-fashion photography and material research. Include a headline reading "JOMON FUTURES" with the subhead "14,000 YEARS OF BEAUTY. REIMAGINED." Add a short brand-style paragraph about an ultra-luxury haute couture collection inspired by the Jomon Dogu. Include 8 square close-up design-language panels extracted from the artifact's carved motifs. Add a "MATERIALS & TEXTURES" column with 6 swatches and labels: sculpted leather, raw clay silk, metallic clay weave, hand-beaded ceramic, organic wool felt, aged bronze hardware. Add a "COLOR PALETTE" row with 4 circular swatches in earthy clay, deep brown, warm ivory, and charcoal. Add an "ACCESSORIES & DETAIL" section with exactly 6 accessory items: ceramic & stone earrings, sculptural clay-leather bag, hand-built clay cuff, Jomon spiral brooch, bronze-clay necklace, sculpted strappy heels. Add a bottom "DETAIL CRAFTSMANSHIP" strip with 5 close-up panels: hand-embossed spirals, raised clay appliqué, ceramic bead embellishment, sculpted shoulder architecture, organic texture contrast. Overall aesthetic: museum artifact meets Paris haute couture, earthy and luxurious, highly detailed, premium fashion campaign board, elegant typography, realistic garments, tactile materials, and a refined editorial presentation.
entries.description: This prompt turns an artifact reference image into a luxury fashion concept board, useful for creating haute couture editorial presentations inspired by historical objects.

entries.title: Fashion Editorial Infographic Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Minimalist fashion editorial infographic, soft muted mauve/grey background, two stylish female models standing side by side centered, full body, confident poses, studio lighting, clean shadows, high-end fashion campaign look.
Left model: wearing a rust orange blouse with long sleeves tucked into dark brown tailored trousers, black pointed high heels, holding a structured handbag, minimal jewelry (earrings).
Right model: wearing a dark ribbed fitted top tucked into beige wide-leg pleated trousers, black wide-brim hat, hoop earrings, necklace, carrying a small handbag.
Around each model, neatly arranged outfit breakdown elements (floating items) with thin dotted connector lines pointing to the model:
Left side items: blouse, tailored trousers, handbag, heels, earrings
Right side items: hat, ribbed top, wide-leg pleated trousers, necklace, handbag, hoop earrings
Each item displayed as clean cut-out product shot, evenly spaced, symmetrical layout.
Typography: small elegant serif labels under each item (e.g., "blouse", "tailored trousers", "heels"), subtle and minimal.
Composition: balanced editorial layout, lots of negative space, premium magazine/catalog aesthetic, soft neutral tones, cohesive color palette.
Ultra-realistic, sharp focus, high resolution, fashion lookbook style, Pinterest/Instagram luxury brand vibe

entries.title: Premium Wireless Earbud E-commerce Infographic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-impact 9:16 vertical e-commerce infographic for Bolt True Wireless Earbuds with a premium lifestyle advertising aesthetic.
Composition & Framing
Full-body shot of a young woman (match face and identity exactly to the provided reference image - accurate facial features, skin tone, hairstyle)
Camera angle slightly low and close (fashion campaign perspective) to add depth and presence
The subject is sitting casually on the floor, one knee raised, one leg extended forward toward the camera
Foreground (Product Focus)
The woman is holding an open Bolt earbud charging case toward the camera
Inside the case: one earbud visible
The second earbud is worn in her ear
Case should be glossy white with subtle branding ("BOLT")
Add slight macro depth-of-field blur on the hand and case for cinematic realism
Subject Styling
Outfit: modern sporty streetwear
lightweight jacket (off-white / neutral tone)
crop top or sports bra
loose joggers (light pink or soft color)
white sneakers with visible texture
Expression: confident, relaxed, slight smile
Pose: natural, lifestyle-oriented - not stiff or overly posed
Background & Atmosphere
Clean studio background with soft gray gradient
Add:
rainbow prism lens flares
subtle light leaks
floating blurred earbuds and charging case in background
Ground surface slightly textured (studio floor look)
Lighting
Soft, diffused commercial lighting
Highlight:
skin texture
glossy earbud case
fabric details
Subtle rim lighting for separation from background
Typography Layout (Modern Sans-Serif, White)
Top Center (Behind Model):
BOLD HUGE TEXT:
"BOLT" (partially hidden behind subject)
Top Right:
Bolt Earbuds
True Wireless
Mid Left:
Powerful sound.
Effortless vibes.
Engineered for every beat of your day.
Mid Right:
BIG: 30
small: hours of playtime
Below that:
BIG: IPX5
small: water resistant
Bottom Right:
BIG: 1
small: year warranty
Style & Quality
8K ultra-realistic commercial photography
Sharp focus on face + earbuds
Slight depth blur for foreground and background elements
Clean Apple/Nike-style premium ad aesthetic
Balanced composition with strong negative space

entries.title: Premium Sports Infographic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A premium infographic-style visual featuring an oversized tennis racket placed beside a young woman. The racket is scaled to be nearly the same size as her entire seated body, creating a bold and surreal proportion. The woman sits casually leaning against the racket, one arm resting on the frame, interacting naturally with it in a relaxed yet stylish pose.
Her face must closely match the provided reference image - accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression - sharp, realistic, and visually appealing.
The tennis racket is ultra-detailed with visible string pattern, frame texture, grip wrapping, and realistic material finish. Clean, premium sports design with sharp detailing.
The model is wearing an attractive, modern outfit - a stylish fitted top paired with a skirt extending slightly over her knees - elegant, sporty, and visually balanced. Outfit should complement the racket's color palette.
Composition is modern and minimal, set in a clean studio or soft gradient background. Include subtle infographic-style elements such as thin annotation lines and minimal callouts highlighting features like keeping everything sleek and uncluttered.
Lighting is soft studio lighting with controlled highlights and shadows, giving a high-end commercial look. Balanced composition, sharp focus, and slight depth of field for realism.
Color grading is crisp and slightly vibrant, with a premium sports advertisement aesthetic.
Style: high-end product infographic, sports fashion editorial, clean UI-inspired annotations
Resolution: ultra high resolution, 4K, highly detailed, photorealistic
Optional boosters:
85mm lens, f/2.8
commercial sports ad
no distortion, accurate proportions
clean typography, modern layout

entries.title: Summer Menswear Lookbook Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using the provided reference image as the same person and body base, transform it into a clean men's summer fashion lookbook on a plain warm beige studio background. Keep the subject recognizable, with the face intentionally blurred in every look, and generate 8 full-body outfit variations arranged in a 4-by-2 editorial grid. Add handwritten stylist notes with arrows labeling the key clothing items for each outfit.

Top row look 1: cream knit polo, navy tailored shorts, white leather sneakers. 
Top row look 2: sage green linen shirt, white linen shorts, brown leather sandals, sunglasses hanging from the shirt. 
Top row look 3: off-white ribbed tank, brown pleated trousers, white canvas sneakers, cream canvas tote bag over one shoulder. 
Top row look 4: light camp-collar floral shirt, light blue denim shorts, tan suede loafers. 
Bottom row look 5: white graphic tee with green "WELLNESS CLUB" text, dark green athletic shorts, white running sneakers, white crew socks, light baseball cap, canvas tote bag. 
Bottom row look 6: navy short-sleeve overshirt worn open over a white tank, beige relaxed chinos, dark brown boat shoes. 
Bottom row look 7: cream textured knit short-sleeve shirt, light wash jeans, tan wallabees, light cap. 
Bottom row look 8: black fitted tee, white linen drawstring trousers, black slide sandals, black crossbody bag.

Make it look like a polished fashion styling guide with realistic proportions, soft even lighting, minimal shadows, and elegant handwritten annotations beside each person.

entries.title: Edible History Pop-Up Chocolate Book
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square 1:1 macro photography image of an open antique history book on a clean white background, styled like an edible history pop-up book. The book is thick, vintage, leather-bound, and lying open flat at 180 degrees. Its pages are aged parchment with yellowed paper, worn edges, and visible paper texture. On the left page, show an abundant, slightly messy cocoa harvest spread partially covering the printed text: exactly 5 whole or split cacao pods in deep red-orange and brown tones, 1 wooden bowl filled with cacao nibs, a large scatter of loose cacao beans, broken cacao shells, small piles of nibs, and several glossy green leaves tucked among the ingredients. Everything should feel organic, overflowing, and tactile. On the right page, create a large 3D pop-up sculpture of assorted Swiss chocolate built entirely from chocolate and confectionery materials: exactly 8 visible chocolate bars or bar segments in mixed dark, milk, and white chocolate, arranged in a bouquet-like upright structure with 5 large leaf-shaped cacao or chocolate leaves behind them, curled pale chocolate shavings at the base, scattered cacao crumbs, and a wrapped paper base with a vintage label reading "CHOCOLAT SUISSE" and smaller text "Maison de Qualité". Beside it, place a tiny 1:35 scale Victorian-era chocolatier gentleman in an apron, actively presenting and adjusting the chocolate display with both hands. Print on the right page in bold black serif text: "Vevey, 1875". Below that, include a short faded cursive lore paragraph about cacao and Swiss chocolate culture. The paragraph should read: "From the cacao pod's humble shell emerges a confection of elegance. In Swiss chocolate houses, cacao is refined into a treasured delicacy, shared in salons and homes alike, prized for comfort, celebration, and the craft of sweet invention." Lighting is soft, warm museum lighting focused at the center of the open book. Mood is educational, whimsical, and richly textural. Emphasize photorealism, shallow depth of field, miniature world aesthetic, premium editorial styling, and extremely high material texture fidelity.

entries.title: Fashion Height Comparison of Four Women
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean fashion comparison studio photo of 4 adult East Asian women standing side by side against a plain light gray seamless background, full body visible from head to shoes, photographed straight-on with soft diffused lighting and a polished commercial look. Above each woman, centered over her head in black serif text, place height labels reading exactly: 145cm, 155cm, 165cm, 175cm. Emphasize realistic proportional differences in height while keeping all four women slim, elegant, and similarly styled, with long dark brown to black softly wavy hair and neutral expressions. Their faces are obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks. The women stand very close together in a friendly pose, with subtle arm contact and one woman lightly resting an arm around another. Use a coordinated beige, cream, taupe, and soft blush wardrobe palette with smart casual feminine outfits and matching ivory loafers. Woman 1 under the 145cm label wears a short-sleeve cream ribbed knit top tucked into high-waisted light beige shorts with a fabric belt, plus a small quilted shoulder bag with a chain strap. Woman 2 under the 155cm label wears a white long-sleeve blouse with a bow tie at the collar and a taupe mini skirt with a slight flared hem, carrying a small light beige crossbody handbag. Woman 3 under the 165cm label wears a sleeveless blush-beige ribbed knit top and a simple ivory mini skirt. Woman 4 under the 175cm label wears a draped white V-neck blouse with sleeves rolled to the forearms, high-waisted taupe belted shorts, and a medium taupe shoulder bag. All 4 women wear cream or ivory horsebit loafers. Composition is vertical, centered, minimal, stylish, realistic, like a fashion catalog image comparing female heights.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic studio fashion image showing four women of different labeled heights, useful for social media comparison posts or editorial-style visual guides.

entries.title: Social Media Anime Fashion Lineup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean full-body anime fashion lineup on a white studio background with glossy floor reflection, showing exactly 4 human personifications of social media platforms standing side by side, each with a bottom label and small underline: X, Instagram, Threads, and TikTok. Style is high-detail modern Japanese illustration, streetwear techwear, crisp line art, soft painterly shading, fashionable idol-like poses, abundant platform-themed accessories, no scenery, no watermark. Character 1, X: tall slim young man in all-black layered techwear with oversized black jacket, straps, buckles, black cargo pants, black high-top sneakers, angular white X graphics across the coat and shoes, holding a black smartphone, black messy hair, cool detached pose, sparse black slash motifs and small UI fragments around him. Character 2, Instagram: trendy young woman in pastel neon colors, curly voluminous light brown hair, pink sunglasses on head, white crop top and high-waisted baggy white pants, translucent iridescent pink-orange-purple jacket, colorful belts and straps, pink-orange sneakers, carrying a compact camera, surrounded by exactly 5 Instagram-themed elements: one large Instagram logo near her head, one heart notification icon, one floating profile-window frame behind her, one small photo card, and one Instagram logo badge hanging near her waist; her bottom label is gradient orange-pink. Character 3, Threads: soft minimalist young man in loose all-white outfit, cream oversized shirt and wide pants, white sneakers, black shoulder bag with the Threads spiral logo, holding an open notebook or small book with thin cable-like black threads looping around his body, calm thoughtful pose with hand near chin, surrounded by exactly 3 speech bubbles containing ellipses; his bottom label is black. Character 4, TikTok: energetic young woman in black cyberpunk idol streetwear with vivid cyan and hot-pink accents, twin ponytails with colored streaks and ribbons, cropped black top, oversized black jacket, short black skirt with belts, fishnet/strap leg details, chunky platform sneakers, one leg lifted and one arm raised in a dance pose while holding a smartphone for a selfie; include TikTok logos, music notes, waveform graphics, play-button icons, cyan/pink ribbons and straps, plus a small floating TikTok app icon near her. Keep the four characters evenly spaced, full body visible from head to shoes, faces can be softly simplified or obscured for a concept-sheet look, with a bright white background and subtle floor reflections.
entries.description: Generates a full-body anime-style lineup personifying X, Instagram, Threads, and TikTok as fashionable streetwear characters for social media concept art.

entries.title: Party Sheep Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cute anime character design sheet for Party Sheep, an "AC Sheep" social-energy connector mascot, combining fluffy sheep features with neon party fashion.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character sheet on a clean white background, about 2:1 aspect ratio, polished concept-art presentation with pink, gold, black, and cream accents. Add small decorative sparkles, music notes, and wave marks around the header.

Header and typography: Large decorative title at top left reading "PARTY SHEEP" in a serif display font with a pink-to-gold feel. Under it, smaller text "AC Sheep," then large Japanese text "パリピ羊" in bright pink. Beneath the title, place a black ribbon banner with gold edges reading "The Social Energy Connector." Add a short descriptive paragraph: "A vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. Party Sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) is energy!"

Character: Depict one consistent chibi sheep-girl mascot with tan skin, big glossy pink eyes, one winking expression in the main front pose, sheep ears, tiny curved black horns, and extremely fluffy cream wool hair with bright pink curly streaks. Across the front of the wool hair, add a glowing neon pink wavy AC symbol like an electric waveform. Outfit: black cropped party jacket with gold studs, chains, star decorations, and neon pink details; black and pink patterned top; short ruffled skirt or shorts; chunky black platform boots with pink glowing soles; fingerless gloves; dangling accessories and charms. She holds a smartphone with a cute decorated case in some views. The mood is energetic, charismatic, warm, and playful.

Layout: Show exactly 4 full-body character views along the bottom row, each clearly labeled beneath in small serif text with pink star separators: 1) "FRONT VIEW" at far left, smaller full-body front pose flashing a peace sign and holding a phone, pink wireless-wave energy arcs near her side; 2) "3/4 VIEW" near center-left, larger main pose facing slightly right, winking, smiling with open mouth, holding up a peace sign and a smartphone, more detailed chains and charms; 3) "SIDE VIEW" center-right, profile view facing left while holding a phone, tail visible, pink wireless energy arcs behind; 4) "BACK VIEW" far right, rear view showing the back of the jacket with a large glowing pink waveform symbol, fluffy pink-and-cream wool from behind, tail, boots, and pink energy arcs.

Info card: At the upper center, include a rounded rectangle profile card with pink outline. It contains exactly 5 labeled rows: "SPECIES: Party Sheep (パリピ羊)"; "PERSONALITY: Outgoing, Warm, Charismatic"; "LIKES: Parties, People, Music, Good Vibes, QR codes, Dance, Sharing energy"; "DISLIKES: Awkward silence, Boring plans, Low battery"; "SPECIAL TRAIT: AC Wave Wool - energy flows through connection. The more friends, the brighter the wave!" Add a pink circular icon with a white AC waveform inside the card.

Color palette: At the upper right, create a "COLOR PALETTE" section with exactly 5 circular swatches in a row. Visible swatches should include near-black navy labeled "#1A1A2E," dark slate labeled "#2D2D44," hot pink labeled "#FF69B4," golden yellow labeled "#FFD700," and a fifth very light cream/white swatch for wool highlights.

Style: High-detail kawaii anime concept art, crisp clean linework, soft cel shading, tiny sparkles, glossy eyes, neon glow effects on the waveform, wireless arcs, boot soles, and jacket emblem. Use a professional character-sheet composition, with consistent proportions and details across all 4 views.

Constraints: Keep all text legible, keep the same character identity in every view, do not add extra views beyond the 4 labeled views, do not add extra color swatches beyond the 5 swatches, and avoid photorealism.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for generating a kawaii anime mascot character sheet with four views, profile notes, and a color palette.

entries.title: White-Haired Crystal Action Hero
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime-style action illustration of an elegant white-haired female adventurer stepping down toward the viewer from a jagged dark rock ledge, seen from an extreme low-angle worm's-eye perspective with a wide lens. She has very long flowing silver-white hair blown strongly to the left, pale skin, and a confident fashion-model/action-hero pose; obscure or simplify the facial features so the face is not the focus. Outfit: futuristic white expedition/tactical clothing with exactly 6 main visible outfit elements: a cropped white fitted top, a white oversized technical jacket, loose white cargo pants, black gloves, heavy white lace-up combat boots, and black harness straps with gold chain and dangling utility cords. Her front boot dominates the lower center foreground on the rock, one knee is raised high, her right arm reaches outward toward the viewer with spread gloved fingers, and her other arm trails back. Surround her with a spectacular explosion of translucent crystal and glass shards, with exactly 3 shard groups: large faceted crystal slabs behind her on the upper right, dozens of medium floating shards radiating around her body, and sparkling fine splinters and dust encircling the legs and boots. Use a bright icy palette of white, silver, pale gray, transparent blue highlights, black strap accents, and small gold hardware details. Lighting should be high-key and cinematic, with intense backlight, rim light through the hair, glittering specular reflections on every shard, and a clean pale gray-white background. Ultra-detailed anime rendering, crisp linework blended with painterly realism, dynamic motion, wind-swept hair, fabric folds, scuffed boot sole texture, shallow depth of field, sparkling particles, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.

entries.title: Handmade Play-Doh City Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a whimsical 3:4 editorial-style illustration of a five-year-old child sitting at a warm craft table, proudly creating a handmade Play-Doh version of London. The entire miniature world should clearly feel sculpted by a real child using colorful modeling clay, soft rounded edges, uneven shapes, tiny fingerprints, squishy textures, crooked little buildings, playful proportions, and charming imperfections throughout.

The clay city should be packed with delightful tiny details: recognizable landmarks, rivers, bridges, cafés, food carts, parks, trains, buses, apartment buildings, trees, street scenes, market stalls, miniature clay people, clouds, and cozy neighborhood moments. Everything should feel imaginative, dense, lively, and lovingly handmade rather than professionally modeled.

The child should look natural and believable, wearing simple everyday clothes with a joyful, curious expression while interacting with the miniature city. Avoid costume-like outfits or exaggerated styling.

Art direction: premium children's magazine illustration, handcrafted claymation-inspired aesthetic, cozy Scandinavian editorial atmosphere, miniature diorama photography feel, emotionally warm storytelling, highly detailed but soft and playful.

Lighting should feel bright, airy, and naturally diffused with soft indoor daylight, clean whites, fresh pastel Play-Doh colors, subtle cool-neutral tones, gentle highlights, and luminous soft shadows.

No logos, fake text, AI artifacts, hyper-detailed realism, or sterile perfection.

Bottom-right corner: add a small handwritten white crayon sentence:
"Let's play in London"
The handwriting should feel cute, childlike, uneven, and naturally imperfect.

entries.title: Watercolor Cottagecore Girl Lineup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a soft watercolor children's character lineup featuring exactly 5 variations of the same cute little girl in a cottagecore / mori-girl style, isolated on a plain white background.

Canvas: Wide horizontal canvas, about 3:2 aspect ratio, lots of clean white negative space, characters evenly spaced in a left-to-right lineup with no ground line.

Visual style: Delicate storybook watercolor illustration, pale warm colors, light brown pencil-like outlines, soft beige shadows, gentle paper texture, airy and nostalgic children's fashion catalog mood. Keep proportions childlike with large heads, small dot eyes, rosy cheeks, wavy medium-brown hair, and fluffy cream sheep-ear bonnets.

Subject details: Depict the same little cottagecore girl five times, each full body, around preschool age, with soft light brown wavy hair, a cream fuzzy lamb bonnet with floppy ears, simple round face, white socks, and brown or cream shoes. Use sheep / bear face motifs on small bags and aprons.

Five character poses and outfits, counted left to right:
1. A girl sitting on a wooden swing, wearing a sage green short-sleeve floral dress, cream socks, tan sandals, holding both swing ropes; a small wicker basket bag with a cute animal face hangs beside her. Her face is obscured by a soft beige square blur.
2. A standing girl in a lavender puff-sleeve blouse and long ivory suspender skirt, holding a small bouquet of purple lavender flowers in one hand and a wicker basket with animal face decoration in the other. Her face is obscured by a soft beige square blur.
3. A walking girl in blue denim overalls over a pale yellow shirt, holding a bubble wand near her mouth with several tiny translucent bubbles floating beside her; she carries a cream shoulder bag with a cute animal face patch.
4. A girl walking while eating an ice cream cone, wearing a peach gingham puff-sleeve blouse and long ivory lace skirt; she carries a wicker basket decorated with white flowers.
5. A girl in a blue sailor-style short-sleeve dress with a large cream bow, raising a small red-and-cream pinwheel high in one hand; she carries a cream crossbody bag with a cute animal face patch and wears dark Mary Jane shoes.

Constraints: Exactly 5 girls, no extra people, no text, no background props except the swing ropes and bubbles, no borders or watermark. Keep the composition light, balanced, and charming, like a children's clothing sticker sheet or fashion concept lineup.

entries.title: Painterly Boy Fashion Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a stylish children's fashion character sheet featuring a young boy in six separate full-body poses, drawn as loose painterly editorial illustrations on a clean white background.

Canvas: Vertical portrait canvas, about 3:4 ratio, with generous white space and no borders, props, scenery, captions, or logos. Arrange the figures in a balanced 2-row by 3-column grid, each figure isolated with a faint gray grounding shadow beneath the shoes.

Visual style: Modern Japanese lifestyle illustration, soft gouache and watercolor texture mixed with rough digital brush strokes, muted earthy colors, visible dry-brush edges, casual sketchbook looseness, fashionable but natural children's clothing, warm gentle atmosphere. Keep anatomy childlike and expressive, around preschool to early elementary age. Faces should be intentionally anonymized with a small soft square blur over each face, while hair, clothing, pose, and body language remain clear.

Subject details: The child has tousled dark brown short hair, a slim small build, white socks, chunky sneakers, and relaxed oversized clothing. Use neutral lighting with no strong cast shadows.

Layout and exact figure count: Include exactly 6 separate full-body illustrations:
1. Top left: side-view running pose facing left, wearing an oversized off-white hoodie or sweatshirt, muted dusty-rose shorts, striped white socks, and beige chunky sneakers; one knee lifted, arms bent, energetic motion.
2. Top center: standing pose facing slightly left, hands in pockets, wearing a loose dark blue-gray jacket over an off-white T-shirt, baggy beige pants, and black sneakers; calm casual attitude.
3. Top right: jumping pose with both arms raised in a V shape, wearing a dusty pink sweatshirt, olive-khaki shorts, striped socks, and white sneakers; joyful airborne posture.
4. Bottom left: crouching pose facing left, drawing on the ground with a stick, wearing a cream sweater with black horizontal stripes, olive green pants, and beige sneakers; focused quiet mood.
5. Bottom center: standing front-facing pose holding a red basketball with both hands, wearing a mustard yellow T-shirt, white shorts, striped socks, and gray sneakers; relaxed sporty look.
6. Bottom right: back-view walking pose facing right, wearing a navy baseball cap, cream long-sleeve shirt, dusty rose overalls, and black sneakers; one foot lifted mid-step.

Constraints: Use exactly six figures and no additional characters. Do not add text. Preserve the clean white background and painterly fashion-illustration mood. Keep clothing colors muted: cream, dusty rose, olive khaki, mustard yellow, beige, navy, dark blue-gray.

entries.title: Gothic Rainy Yami Sign Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a moody photorealistic cinematic portrait of Yami, a small gothic girl sitting on a rain-soaked riverside walkway at dusk, centered in the frame and facing the viewer. She has very long messy black hair falling over her shoulders, wears a layered black lace dress or mourning-style outfit with black shoes, and her face is deliberately hidden by a dark blurred square censor block, giving an eerie anonymous feeling. She holds one aged rectangular wooden sign with worn brown edges and off-white painted surface; the sign has handwritten Japanese brush text reading 今日は、泣いてもいい。理由なんて、あとからでいい。- yami plus a small black ink splatter beside the signature. Count exactly 3 main foreground objects: the seated girl, the wooden sign, and one dark plush rabbit doll sitting on the wet ground to her left with floppy ears, stitched X details, and a worn handmade look. The environment is rainy and melancholic, with glossy puddles reflecting the girl, sign, Japanese writing, and warm lamp glow on the pavement. Use a shallow depth of field: a blurred bridge or railing recedes along the left background, and exactly 2 visible old-fashioned street lamps glow warmly on the right side against a cold gray-blue overcast sky. Style should be realistic, dark, soft, emotional, slightly gothic, with muted colors, wet textures, bokeh lights, low camera angle, portrait orientation, and a quiet lonely atmosphere.
