entries.title: Retro Cheongsam Mother-Daughter Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on two real female photos uploaded by the user, generate a 2×2 four-grid mother-daughter portrait puzzle with the theme 'Retro Cheongsam Mother-Daughter Portrait'.

Character setting:
The young woman is the daughter, aged [28]; the older woman is the mother, aged [56]. Strictly preserve their respective real identity features, including face shape, facial features, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hairstyle, and overall temperament. The mother should retain a natural sense of maturity and slight traces of time, with very shallow nasolabial folds. The daughter should maintain young, natural, and delicate characteristics. It must be clear that it is the same pair of real mother and daughter in all four small images.

Overall style:
Retro Oriental cheongsam portrait, quiet, dignified, and gentle. The image has a slight film feel and a faint oil painting quality, with an overall realistic photographic texture, exquisite yet natural.

Clothing and hairstyle:
The mother wears traditional cheongsams in low-saturation colors such as light green-gray, lake blue, or dark green; the daughter wears improved cheongsams in coordinated colors like dark blue or navy. The two outfits belong to the same visual system. Hairstyles are treated naturally based on original hair length, overall tidy with a Chinese-style updos or retro short hair styling.

Background and texture:
The background is gray-green, blue-gray retro studio background, which can have slight canvas texture or wooden Chinese elements. Use soft studio light, the image is low-saturation, high-end, delicate, and realistic. No over-smoothing, no artificial faces, no watermarks.

Format:
Generate a 2×2 four-grid puzzle, each grid is a 3:4 vertical composition, with unified style and color tones, but natural variations in expression, angle, and interaction.

Content suggestions for the four grids:
1. Formal half-body photo looking at the camera.
2. Intimate interaction close-up.
3. Sitting and standing combined medium shot.
4. Complete double portrait showing the cheongsam styling.

entries.title: Manhwa Style Fighting Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Generate a high-quality cinematic storyboard collage in a 16:9 frame, composed of 8-10 connected panels. The entire image should be illustrated in a stylized Korean manhwa / webtoon-inspired comic style, with clean line art, soft cel shading, dynamic action composition, and expressive visual storytelling. Avoid photorealism. Do not use realistic human facial rendering. Keep faces slightly simplified, stylized, and illustrated, while maintaining attractive character design and strong emotional expression. No text, no subtitles, no captions, no watermark.

Scene concept:
A freestyle fight between a man and a young Chinese woman, with the woman clearly winning in the end. The tone is intense, stylish, energetic, and dramatic, with strong visual rhythm and clear action storytelling. The setting should be clean and minimal, such as an urban rooftop at dusk, a modern training arena, or an empty industrial platform.

Female lead:
A young adult Chinese woman in her early 20s, clearly adult, illustrated in a Korean comic style. She wears a pink Barbie-inspired sporty outfit with a fashionable, feminine look. Her design should feel youthful, agile, and confident. She has a light and nimble build, clear body lines, a slim and toned silhouette, and graceful but powerful movement. Her expression and posture should communicate calmness, sharp focus, and quiet confidence.

Male opponent:
An adult man with a physically stronger and more aggressive presence. He should appear forceful and intimidating at first, creating a visual contrast with the woman's agility, technique, and composure.

Storyboard progression:
Panel 1: Wide establishing shot. The man and the woman stand apart in a tense face-off, dramatic atmosphere, strong composition.
Panel 2: Close-up or medium shot details - stylized eyes, hands tightening, ready stance, subtle body tension before the fight begins.
Panel 3: The man attacks first with aggressive speed and force.
Panel 4: The woman dodges smoothly and precisely, using quick footwork and agile body movement.
Panel 5: A fluid exchange of action - blocks, slips, pivots, and evasive movement, shown with dynamic comic-style angles.
Panel 6: The fight intensifies. The woman remains calm and starts reading his rhythm.
Panel 7: Turning point. She finds an opening and counters with clean, skillful technique.
Panel 8: A visually striking action moment - spin, redirect, sweep, or takedown - showing her taking control.
Panel 9: The man is down or clearly defeated, breathing heavily or collapsed.
Panel 10: Final hero shot. The woman stands strong and composed under dramatic lighting, calm and victorious.

Visual style:
Korean manhwa / webtoon-inspired illustration, cinematic comic storyboard, polished line art, soft cel shading, dramatic lighting, dynamic motion, expressive posing, elegant action choreography, stylish panel composition, clean background design, high detail, vivid but controlled color palette

entries.title: Cinematic Dance Routine Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a cinematic 21-panel storyboard grid (3 columns × 7 rows) in a single image, styled like a professional sports photography sequence. Each panel is numbered 1-21 in the top-left corner with a bold white caption at the bottom in uppercase sans-serif text. The subject is a teenage female dancer (approximately 16-17 years old) performing a powerful contemporary/hip-hop fusion routine on a dramatic stage with dark atmospheric lighting, spotlight beams, and bokeh crowd in the background. Cinematic color grade: deep blacks, warm amber highlights, motion blur on fast movements. Each frame feels like a high-budget editorial sports photography shot.
Panel sequence:
FIRST BREATH - She stands center stage, eyes closed, head down, hands relaxed at sides
THE BUILD - Slow chest rise, arms beginning to lift outward, tension in the body
EYES OPEN - Extreme close-up of her eyes snapping open, fierce and focused
FIRST MOVE - Sharp head isolation snap to the right, hair whipping mid-air
ARMS BREAK - Explosive arm wave rippling from shoulder to fingertip, motion blur
BODY ROLL - Full torso body roll in side profile, spine arching beautifully
FOOTWORK - Ground-level shot of fast footwork, sneakers kicking up dust/light particles
FLOOR HIT - She drops to the floor in a controlled krump-style chest drop
STAGE OPENS - Wide shot showing her isolated on vast dark stage, spotlight above
THE SPIN - Mid-spin, skirt or outfit fabric wrapping around her body in motion
FREEZE - Sudden sharp freeze pose, one arm extended, other cocked at 90°
GLIDE - Side view of a smooth slide/glide across the floor, low to ground
SLOW MOTION - Extreme close-up hands in slow graceful motion through the air
THE JUMP - Full airborne leap, legs split, arms wide, peak of the jump
THE LAND - Powerful landing, one knee down, dust particle explosion around her
ATTITUDE - Low angle looking up at her standing dominant, chin down, staring into camera
THE BREAKDOWN - Crowd in background reacts, silhouettes with raised hands
FINAL SEQUENCE - Multi-exposure ghost effect showing 3 overlapping positions
LAST EIGHT - Teammates/other dancers blur into frame behind her, energy building
THE FINALE - Full extension final pose, arms stretched to ceiling, head thrown back
UNFORGETTABLE - Wide cinematic shot, spotlight beam, smoke/haze, text overlay reads DANCE
Style references: Cinematic sports editorial, Adidas/Nike campaign aesthetic, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, 85mm lens feel, 4K ultra-sharp. Consistent character across all frames.
entries.description: A comprehensive 21-panel storyboard prompt for a teenage dancer's performance, styled after high-end sports campaign aesthetics.

entries.searchText: cinematic dance routine storyboard a comprehensive 21-panel storyboard prompt for a teenage dancer's performance, styled after high-end sports campaign aesthetics. create a cinematic 21-panel storyboard grid (3 columns × 7 rows) in a single image, styled like a professional sports photography sequence. each panel is numbered 1-21 in the top-left corner with a bold white caption at the bottom in uppercase sans-serif text. the subject is a teenage female dancer (approximately 16-17 years old) performing a powerful contemporary/hip-hop fusion routine on a dramatic stage with dark atmospheric lighting, spotlight beams, and bokeh crowd in the background. cinematic color grade: deep blacks, warm amber highlights, motion blur on fast movements. each frame feels like a high-budget editorial sports photography shot. panel sequence: first breath - she stands center stage, eyes closed, head down, hands relaxed at sides the build - slow chest rise, arms beginning to lift outward, tension in the body eyes open - extreme close-up of her eyes snapping open, fierce and focused first move - sharp head isolation snap to the right, hair whipping mid-air arms break - explosive arm wave rippling from shoulder to fingertip, motion blur body roll - full torso body roll in side profile, spine arching beautifully footwork - ground-level shot of fast footwork, sneakers kicking up dust/light particles floor hit - she drops to the floor in a controlled krump-style chest drop stage opens - wide shot showing her isolated on vast dark stage, spotlight above the spin - mid-spin, skirt or outfit fabric wrapping around her body in motion freeze - sudden sharp freeze pose, one arm extended, other cocked at 90° glide - side view of a smooth slide/glide across the floor, low to ground slow motion - extreme close-up hands in slow graceful motion through the air the jump - full airborne leap, legs split, arms wide, peak of the jump the land - powerful landing, one knee down, dust particle explosion around her attitude - low angle looking up at her standing dominant, chin down, staring into camera the breakdown - crowd in background reacts, silhouettes with raised hands final sequence - multi-exposure ghost effect showing 3 overlapping positions last eight - teammates/other dancers blur into frame behind her, energy building the finale - full extension final pose, arms stretched to ceiling, head thrown back unforgettable - wide cinematic shot, spotlight beam, smoke/haze, text overlay reads dance style references: cinematic sports editorial, adidas/nike campaign aesthetic, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, 85mm lens feel, 4k ultra-sharp. consistent character across all frames. comic / storyboard cinematic editorial

entries.title: Gothic Villain Storyboard Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: {"type":"anime storyboard layout sheet","style":"monochrome pencil sketch, detailed line art, grayscale concept art, dramatic gothic fantasy atmosphere, manga storyboard presentation","subject":{"setting":"the front entrance of a massive gothic demon castle with towering cathedral-like spires, pointed arches, carved stone, huge double doors, long stone approach, and a cavernous sense of scale","theme":"ominous villain introduction before a battle","characters":[{"id":"character 1","description":"undead noble with a skeletal face, spiky short hair, pointed ears, ornate dark armor with bone and skull motifs, high collar, aristocratic vampire-like styling"},{"id":"character 2","description":"tall central vampire lord in an elaborate formal outfit with layered cape, high standing collar, cravat, vest, jewelry and medallion, regal and intimidating presence"},{"id":"character 3","description":"jack-o'-lantern headed figure wearing a dark cloak with a huge collar, carved glowing-smile pumpkin face, eerie and theatrical"}],"faces partially censored with soft gray rectangular blurs on 3 close-up panels":"true"},"layout":{"orientation":"vertical page","columns":"2","left column":"6 storyboard image panels stacked vertically","right column":"6 explanatory text boxes stacked vertically","sections":[{"title":"1 城の大扉が開く(サイドビュー・望遠)","position":"top row","count":1,"labels":["opening castle gate wide shot"],"image":"a long telephoto side view of the gigantic castle entrance, with the monumental front doors beginning to open and the architecture dwarfing everything around it"},{"title":"2 足元アップ(正面・超広角・俯瞰気味)","position":"second row","count":1,"labels":["feet close-up"],"image":"an ultra-wide low frontal close-up of 3 pairs of boots and the hems of capes as the villains approach over cracked stone pavement, emphasizing footsteps and menace"},{"title":"3 縦パン(足元→肩上・正面・広角)","position":"third row","count":3,"labels":["skeleton noble","vampire lord","jack-o'-lantern figure"],"image":"a dramatic low-angle three-character lineup framed from below, showing the 3 antagonists towering above the viewer against the cathedral facade"},{"title":"4 青髪骸骨の顔(アオリ・広角)","position":"fourth row","count":1,"labels":["skeletal face close-up"],"image":"close-up low-angle portrait of the skeletal blue-haired noble, with sharp shoulder armor, skull ornament, and the castle wall receding behind"},{"title":"5 ジャックランタンの顔(アオリ・広角)","position":"fifth row","count":1,"labels":["pumpkin head close-up"],"image":"close-up low-angle portrait of the jack-o'-lantern headed figure, showing the carved sinister grin and oversized collar against the towering architecture"},{"title":"6 サングラスドラキュラの顔(正面・アオリ・広角)","position":"bottom row","count":1,"labels":["vampire lord face close-up"],"image":"frontal low-angle close-up of the central vampire lord with elegant hair, pointed ears, ornate brooch, and enormous collar filling the frame"}],"ui components":{"count":6,"items":["6 numbered section headers","6 camera position notes","6 camera direction icons with arrows or angle markers","6 bordered explanatory text areas","6 storyboard image frames","1 full page border"]}},"composition":"clean production sheet layout with thin panel borders, dense Japanese annotations on the right, each illustration on the left corresponding to one text explanation, highly readable storyboard design","text":"all annotation text is in Japanese, printed in neat storyboard document formatting","quality":"highly detailed architectural draftsmanship, expressive perspective exaggeration, cinematic villain reveal, professional anime pre-production board"}

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Four-Armed Heroine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic dark fantasy light-novel cover illustration in a square format, featuring a fierce female warrior centered in a dynamic lunging pose inside a dim, ruined, cathedral-like or industrial gothic interior with a smoky blurred background and warm floating embers. She has long silver-white hair in a high ponytail whipping violently to the right, pale skin, and a deliberately obscured or featureless face. Her body is enhanced with four black mechanical arms in total, built from intricate clockwork and segmented metal joints, extending spider-like around her. She wears a tattered black dress-like battle outfit with armored corset detailing, belts, straps, a garter on one thigh, and biomechanical leg armor. Count exactly 4 arms visible: 2 upper arms and 2 lower arms; count exactly 4 glowing energy blades, one held in each hand, translucent neon blue with crystalline edges and magical circuitry-like light patterns. Emphasize the contrast between matte black metal, torn fabric, pale skin, and electric cyan weapons. The composition should feel cinematic, high-detail, intense, and heroic, with sharp focus on the character and soft depth-of-field in the background. Add ornate Japanese cover typography in metallic gold with subtle beveling and glow: at the top, small genre text 《バトルアクション》; below it, a large main title クアッドアームの静寂; beneath that, a smaller subtitle ~四本腕の女傭兵と錆びついた世界の約束~. Near the bottom, add a large centered quote in gold Japanese text 「僕は君の未来を高値で買いに来た」; directly below it, a smaller line --時計仕掛けの運命が、今動き出す. At the very bottom center, place the author name ざっ in large gold text with elegant ornamental divider lines on both sides. Use a luxurious fantasy-book-cover layout, moody sepia-and-charcoal palette with bright cyan highlights, ultra-detailed anime-inspired realism, and a polished GPT-image-2 editorial illustration style.

entries.title: Cinematic Editorial Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
- Character: Oriental female @image_1, black high ponytail, modified Cheongsam dark purple gown @image_2, gold vintage large hoop earrings, red lips, cold and noble temperament.
- Vehicle: @image_3 Huawei Zhijie R7, Nebula Purple paint, streamlined sedan silhouette, license plate with Chinese characters 'Zhijie R7'.

Scene: Outside a top-tier night award ceremony or international film festival venue. Marble plaza, flanked by media with long lenses and flashlights. Faraway buildings with giant light installations and a red carpet extension.

Storyboard plan, deep black high-end editorial layout, purple and gold color scheme title: "IGNITE · Zhijie R7 × Grand Ceremony Entrance Blockbuster Project"

Section 1 - Character and Vehicle Reference (professional lookbook layout style): Extracting from reference images - front/side of character, full side of vehicle, close-up of front, macro of earrings and handbag.

Section 2 - Divided into left and right parts:
Left: Real scene reference for environment (night lobby atmosphere photo).
Right: Top-down spatial floor plan. Notated with: spatial outlines (stairs/plaza/aisles), initial character position + dashed path arrows, 5 camera positions (number + abbreviation), camera direction arrows, product/prop anchors, highlighted core composition areas.

5-Frame Storyboard (2.39:1 CinemaScope):
Frame 1: Long shot · Moment door opens. Night plaza in a sea of flashes, door opens, purple interior ambient light lights up first, backlit silhouette, hair and hem blowing in wind.
Frame 2: Entrance walk · Low angle shot. Looking up from ground level as she steps down in stilettos, marble reflecting the hem, Zhijie R7 body in back as a glowing backdrop, flashes bursting in distance.
Frame 3: Turn back · 85mm portrait close-up. She turns sideways, looking directly at the camera, gold earrings glint in the flash, very slight curve of the mouth, expression controlling the scene.
Frame 4: Hero shot of car and person. She stands in front of the car, breeze blowing the dress, Zhijie R7 full side glowing behind, Nebula Purple paint and gown forming a high-end chromatic harmony, background media crowd blurred.
Frame 5: Departure end shot. She enters the car, door closes slowly, taillights light up, vehicle slowly drives away from the red carpet amidst flashes, leaving only light trails.

Lighting and Style:
Strong night side-backlight · Instant flash exposure feel. Deep black background · Purple car body as one of the only light sources. 2.39:1 anamorphic wide screen · Large aperture shallow depth of field. Keywords: Absolute protagonist aura · Event-level narrative · Movie premiere quality.

entries.title: Three Android Idol Girls on Concert Stage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime illustration of 3 humanoid AI assistant idol girls standing side by side on a glossy futuristic concert stage, shown in a straight-on front view with their full figures visible from head to shoes. They are designed as the same base android model with subtle personality differences expressed mainly through costume design, pose, and color balance rather than body type. All 3 have short silver-gray bob hair with soft waves, large over-ear mechanical headphones, pale skin, youthful idol styling, and sleek visible robotic limbs with glossy red-and-black plating and heart-shaped accent motifs. The setting is a large indoor live venue with steel truss rigging overhead, bright white and pink-purple stage spotlights, giant LED screens in the background, and reflective black stage flooring with glowing grid lines and mirror-like reflections. The overall mood is polished, cute, futuristic, and high-end, with dramatic concert lighting and crisp detailed rendering. The left girl wears a mostly black idol outfit with red accents: a cropped translucent black jacket over a short black dress or romper with a flared skirt, black armored thigh-high mechanical legs, chunky black platform boots, red gloves, and small heart details throughout; she stands with knees slightly inward and both hands pressed to her cheeks in a shy, affectionate pose, with a sweet blushing expression. The center girl wears a balanced red-and-white idol outfit: a white sleeveless top with red heart accents, a layered burgundy-red frilled mini skirt, fully exposed red-and-black robotic arms and legs, and red platform shoes; she stands in a neutral straight upright pose with one hand raised lightly near her face, presenting the clearest full-body view of the android construction. The right girl wears a mostly red idol dress with black lace-like detailing, a black waist belt, a flared skirt with white frilled underskirt, red-and-black knee armor, and red platform shoes; she stands elegantly with one arm bent near her chest and the other arm extended outward, as if introducing the audience. Keep the trio evenly spaced across the frame. Emphasize the contrast between soft idol fashion and hard mechanical anatomy, with 3 distinct costume variations in black-dominant, red-and-white balanced, and red-dominant palettes. Highly detailed anime key visual, ultra-clean linework, glossy materials, soft facial shading, sparkling highlights, cinematic stage atmosphere, and premium promotional art quality for the idol unit Hallucinations.

entries.title: Cozy AI Agents Studio Group Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, highly detailed anime-style illustration set in a cozy, cluttered indie workspace that feels like a book café mixed with a startup studio, lit by golden afternoon sunlight streaming through tall windows on the right and by 4 black industrial pendant lamps hanging from the ceiling, with string lights, overflowing bookshelves, plants, and handwritten motivational signs covering the background. Show 5 young women standing around a large wooden worktable, framed as a wide group portrait. The mood is whimsical, slightly satirical, and aspirational-but-chaotic. On the far left, place a tall woman with very long wavy auburn hair wearing a crown of white daisies and a sleeveless rust-brown dress with a white sunburst emblem on the chest and a dark belt at the waist; she holds a small handwritten note toward the viewer that reads exactly Claude is asking for your permission. In front of her on a side table is a glass cup of tea, a book stack, and a tiny potted plant. Next to her, place a punky blonde woman with twin ponytails tied with black bows, large black headphones resting around her neck, and an off-shoulder black dress marked with a bold white X on the torso; she stands confidently beside an open sticker-covered laptop with another large X logo. In the center rear, place a mysterious slim girl with extremely long dark navy-black hair, pale skin, and a gothic dark dress, standing quietly in front of a desktop monitor showing a blue glowing star or sparkle on a dark screen. To the right of center, place an elegant woman in a fitted red cheongsam-inspired dress with floral embroidery and a side slit, leaning one hand on the wooden table near an open notebook filled with sketches or writing. On the far right, place a casually dressed brunette with messy hair in a bun, wearing a white T-shirt with a black knot-like AI logo under an open beige overshirt, standing behind an open silver laptop with the same logo. Scatter many cozy desk objects across the main table: 2 mugs, 1 open notebook, 1 pen, 1 small black figurine, 1 closed book stack, and laptops. Add readable handwritten wall notes and signs throughout the room: "FOCUS SHIPS DREAMS" on the upper left, "SHIPPING IS MY CARDIO" on the left wall, "turn caffeine into code" near the top center, "be kind to your future self" near the window, "The Art of Asking Nicely" on a book spine at lower left, "WORLD'S OKAYEST MODEL" on a black mug near center-left, "MOONSHOT DIARIES" on a book stack near lower right, "Good Prompts Only" on a mug at lower right, and a sticky note at the bottom right reading "AGI is already for ready us" with a small doodle. Use painterly linework, intricate textures, expressive fashion styling, warm brown and amber color grading, soft cinematic depth, and a polished social-media-viral illustration aesthetic.
entries.description: A warm anime-style ensemble illustration of five personified AI assistants in a sunlit creative workspace, ideal for editorial memes, social posts, or concept art about coding-agent culture.

entries.title: Anime Last Supper Ensemble
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A dark, cinematic anime group portrait inspired by The Last Supper, set in a long stone banquet hall at night. Show exactly 11 seated or leaning female characters arranged shoulder to shoulder behind a long table covered with a white tablecloth, viewed straight on in a wide symmetrical composition. In the exact center is a blonde knightly woman in ornate blue-and-silver armor and a royal-blue dress, posed as the visual focal point with both armored arms extended along the table. In front of her sits a glowing golden chalice radiating warm light upward onto the faces and hands of the group. Behind them, three tall arched windows reveal a twilight landscape with a huge tree silhouetted against a dusky sky. The ceiling has dark wooden beams, and the side walls are lined with large shadowy framed paintings.

The 11 characters should feel like a crossover ensemble of iconic anime-style women with varied silhouettes, hairstyles, and fashion. From left to right: 1) a woman in a glossy red skintight futuristic suit, leaning forward with one hand on the table; 2) a dark-haired woman in muted military-style clothing close beside her; 3) a pale gothic girl in a black dress with long sleeves, hands lifted with delicate fingers; 4) a short blonde woman in a loose white T-shirt, casual and modern; 5) a tall red-haired woman in a white shirt standing slightly behind the others; 6) the central blonde armored knight in blue; 7) a black-haired woman in a black dress with gold accessories and a headpiece, raising one finger; 8) a glamorous woman in a red embroidered dress with long black hair; 9) a dark-haired woman in a low-cut black outfit leaning inward; 10) a teal twin-tailed virtual-idol-like girl in a sleeveless outfit; 11) a green-haired girl in a pale patterned dress seated with crossed legs at the far right, holding a wine glass. Keep all faces attractive anime faces, mature young-adult women, elegant rather than caricatured.

On the table, include exactly 11 place settings, 8 visible wine glasses with red wine, several loaves of bread and scattered rolls, plates, silverware, crumbs, and a few metallic goblets or cups. The warm chalice light should illuminate the center while the rest of the room falls into moody shadow. Use painterly realism, high-detail anime illustration, dramatic chiaroscuro, subdued brown and blue ambience with red accents, solemn yet slightly decadent atmosphere, ultra-wide panoramic framing, masterpiece quality.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic wide-format anime group banquet scene styled like The Last Supper, useful for crossover ensemble art and moody character lineup illustrations.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-energetic Japanese shonen manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge with explosive pop-art chaos and bright candy colors, in the style of a weekly comic anthology cover. The main focus is a trendy gyaru teenage girl at the center, leaning toward the viewer in a dynamic foreshortened pose, grinning widely with her mouth open and pointing directly at the camera with one hand while holding a pink toy hammer over her shoulder with the other. She has layered medium-length wavy hair in light brown with blonde and pink streaks, warm amber eyes, multiple colorful hair clips including stars and lightning bolts, earrings, rings, bracelets, necklaces, flashy nail art, and a bold street-fashion outfit: vivid pink satin bomber jacket, white cropped top, black belt with gold buckle, and mixed glam accessories. The cover logo dominates the top center in huge red Japanese lettering with thick black outline and yellow border reading バクアラ!?, with smaller text above it reading 週刊少年. At the upper left, add a loud burst caption reading 超豪華付録(ゴミ)付き!!! with a shocked cartoon trash can mascot. Along the left side place two giant sound-effect style callouts, ドーン! near the top left and バンバーン! in blue near the lower left. On the right side, create an oversized main headline in chunky black, yellow, white, and pink Japanese display type reading 笑って暴れて今日もカオス全開!!, surrounded by smaller promotional blurbs such as 全ページ抱腹絶倒!, 笑いすぎ注意報発令中ーっ!!, and 笑撃の新連載!. In the top right corner include a magazine issue box with the date 2026年4月22日号 and price 390円. Scatter exactly 3 supporting manga-style characters around the central girl: 1 silver-haired boy with goggles on the left aiming a spiral blaster toward the viewer, 1 cheerful purple-haired girl below him holding a dessert drink, and 1 orange-haired idol-like girl in headphones at the upper right making a peace sign. Fill the background and foreground with a dense collage of floating sweets, snacks, toys, doodles, and mascot faces, including donuts, cookies, chocolate bars, candy, pudding, ice cream, popcorn, planets, stars, speech bursts, and goofy creatures, all layered with thick outlines and halftone texture. Along the bottom, include exactly 7 small serialized feature boxes in a row, each with manga-style character art and Japanese titles, creating the look of a crowded anthology teaser strip. Use an ultra-saturated palette of hot pink, yellow, orange, red, cyan, and black, with maximal visual density, overlapping typography, comic speed lines, sticker-like elements, and a glossy printed magazine cover finish. Make it feel hilarious, rebellious, loud, youthful, and irresistibly cluttered, like a parody-yet-premium next-generation Weekly Shonen Jump cover.
entries.description: A loud, candy-colored parody manga magazine cover featuring a gyaru heroine, explosive Japanese headlines, and dense anthology-style teaser art for use in comic cover generation.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: {"type":"advanced character card","style":"clean fashion character design sheet, photorealistic studio catalog aesthetic, soft even lighting, minimal shadows, muted gray background, thin white panel dividers, polished single-canvas layout","subject":{"gender_presentation":"teen girl","age_appearance":"young teenager","identity":"face intentionally obscured and de-emphasized","hair":{"color":"dark brown","style":"center-parted long hair in two braids"},"outfit":{"count":5,"pieces":["oversized pastel lavender hoodie with drawstrings and kangaroo pocket","short white pleated skirt visible below hoodie hem","white crew socks","chunky white sneakers","no visible jewelry"]},"overall_look":"cute casual pastel streetwear, soft youthful styling"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"turnaround views","position":"left half","count":4,"labels":["FRONT VIEW","BACK VIEW","SIDE PROFILE","ACTION POSE"],"details":"full-body character shown in four separate vertical panels; front standing straight with arms relaxed, back standing straight, side profile standing neutrally, and playful action pose with one leg bent backward and body turned slightly toward camera"},{"title":"FACIAL EXPRESSIONS","position":"top right","count":5,"labels":["NEUTRAL","ANGRY","HAPPY","SAD","FOCUSED"],"details":"five tightly cropped head-and-shoulders portraits in a horizontal row, each with the same hairstyle and hoodie, subtle expression changes, face area softly blurred"},{"title":"ACCESSORIES","position":"bottom right","count":5,"labels":["lavender backpack","white smartphone","lavender scrunchie","white over-ear headphones","lavender compact camera"],"details":"accessories evenly spaced on gray background like product cutouts"}],"centerpiece":"the 4-view full-body outfit turnaround dominates the composition"},"color_palette":{"count":4,"colors":["pastel lavender","white","soft gray","dark brown"]},"prompt":"Create a single-canvas advanced character card for in a photorealistic studio fashion-sheet style. Show a consistent young girl with hair in two braids, wearing an oversized hoodie, a short white pleated skirt, white crew socks, and chunky white sneakers. Use a clean gray background with thin white dividers and neatly organized panels. On the left half, include 4 full-body turnaround panels labeled FRONT VIEW, BACK VIEW, SIDE PROFILE, and ACTION POSE. On the top right, include 5 headshot expression panels labeled NEUTRAL, ANGRY, HAPPY, SAD, and FOCUSED. On the bottom right, include 5 accessory items arranged horizontally: a lavender backpack, a white smartphone, a lavender scrunchie, white over-ear headphones, and a lavender compact camera. Keep lighting soft and even, composition symmetrical and professional, emphasizing 100% character consistency across all views. Preserve the minimal pastel aesthetic and use as the backdrop."}

entries.title: Anime Police Mannequin Fashion Display
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic high-end fashion store photograph of a life-size glossy white female mannequin styled as an anime-inspired police or security officer, shown from mid-thigh upward in a boutique interior with soft warm bokeh lights, clothing racks in the background, and a large window on the left. The mannequin has a smooth featureless face deliberately covered by a centered soft gray square privacy block, a short bob wig in dark ash gray, and a shiny peaked officer cap. Behind the cap is one large translucent acrylic halo panel with ornate white cutout filigree, like a decorative character prop. Outfit details: a crisp white button-up shirt, black-and-gold striped necktie with tie clip, black suspenders and harness straps with metal clips, high-waisted black pinstripe trousers, and a beige trench coat draped cape-like over the shoulders with dark sleeve panels and thin gold trim. Include exactly two small handwritten Japanese sound-effect texts, both reading 「キシッ」, one to the left of the shoulder and one to the right, each with two curved motion lines, suggesting creaking mannequin joints. Add exactly two visible retail price tags clipped to the outfit: one on the chest strap and one hanging near the lower right coat edge, with tiny barcode-like details. Use shallow depth of field, realistic reflections on glossy plastic skin, premium store lighting, vertical 4:5 composition, centered subject, and a polished photorealistic editorial style. Avoid adding extra characters, extra text, or a visible watermark.
entries.description: A photorealistic boutique display image of a glossy mannequin dressed in an anime-inspired officer outfit with acrylic halo prop and Japanese sound effects.

entries.title: Photoreal Anime Mannequin Display
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion-store mannequin display of an adult-sized glossy white female mannequin wearing an anime-inspired school-uniform cosplay, shot like a realistic retail product photo with shallow depth of field. The mannequin has a smooth blank face obscured by a soft gray rectangular blur, a short black bob haircut with bangs, and exactly 2 tall black furry animal ears on top of the head. Above the head is exactly 1 transparent acrylic halo panel on a thin clear support rod, with blue concentric ring graphics printed on it, like a prop accessory. Outfit: a navy sailor-style school uniform with white stripe trim, a bright blue neckerchief tied at the chest, a dark pleated skirt, and a loose light-blue kimono-style haori with dark navy lapels and cuffs; the left sleeve shows white floral motifs. Add a thin black ribbon choker tied in a bow around the neck. The mannequin has exactly 2 glossy white hands: the raised right hand delicately holds several thin blue cords or strings, while the lower left hand gathers the dangling cords near the waist. Include exactly 1 hanging white retail price tag on the chest area reading small product text and the price "¥24,800". Add manga-style white sound effects around the mannequin: exactly 4 instances of the Japanese text "キシッ" and exactly 4 small wavy squeak-mark clusters, positioned around the head, shoulders, and lower sides. Background: softly blurred upscale clothing shop interior with warm beige lighting, bokeh ceiling lights, racks of clothing, a tall bright window or light panel on the left, and muted garments on the right. Use realistic camera optics, natural reflections on the glossy mannequin and acrylic halo, warm indoor color grading, high detail fabric textures, and a slightly premium showroom atmosphere. Customize the character concept as anime halo cat-eared schoolgirl mannequin, the main outfit color as light blue and navy, the hair color as black, the price tag text as ¥24,800, and the sound effect text as キシッ.
entries.description: A realistic retail-store mannequin photo featuring an anime-style school uniform, cat ears, acrylic halo, price tag, and manga sound effects.

entries.title: Oil Pastel Fashion Illustration Style
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the subject from the uploaded photo into a fashion illustration created with thick oil pastels or wax crayons on textured paper.
Fashion Illustration Style: Editorial and stylish, focusing on the subject's outfit and overall look rather than background elements. Reminiscent of fashion magazine sketches.
Medium & Tools: Rendered with bold, chunky pastel strokes. Marks are grainy, textured, and uneven, leaving visible gaps and overlaps. No digital smoothness.
Linework: No black outlines or contour lines. Shapes are defined by overlapping pastel blocks of color.
Coloring: Flat matte fills in vibrant but muted tones. Slightly imperfect coverage, with paper texture peeking through. Minimal shading using broad pastel hatching, not gradients.
Details: Preserve the subject's hairstyle, clothing, accessories, pose, and expression exactly, but simplify them into bold pastel forms. Logos or numbers should appear as painterly pastel marks, not sharp text.
Background: Solid, off-white sketchbook paper. Only a light scribbled ground shadow to anchor the figure.
Overall Tone: Chic, modern fashion sketch aesthetic - stylish, minimal, and editorial.
Negative Prompt: No outlines, no contour ink. No gradients, no digital airbrush, no vector-smooth shapes.
entries.description: A stylistic prompt that converts a reference photo into a bold, textured fashion illustration using oil pastels or wax crayons.

entries.title: Korean Hanbok Fashion Triptych
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a realistic editorial fashion triptych showing exactly 3 full-body female models standing front-facing in traditional Korean royal hanbok, separated by two clean vertical white dividers. Canvas is a square 1:1 composition, photographed at eye level with symmetrical spacing, each model centered in her own vertical panel. The background is the same softly blurred palace courtyard for all three panels: dark red wooden doors, muted architectural details, gray stone floor, shallow depth of field, overcast natural light, refined museum-catalog mood. All faces should be intentionally anonymized with a smooth soft blur while preserving the hair, headpieces, clothing, hands, and posture in sharp detail.

Subject count and details: exactly 3 models. Left model: pale pink jeogori and long outer robe with wide sleeves, lavender and purple waist sash, pale blue underskirt, delicate white floral embroidery on the lower robe, hands folded at the waist, black updo hair with ornate gold floral hair ornaments on both sides and top. Center model: deep navy blue embroidered outer robe with wide sleeves, white sleeve linings, red underskirt, richly patterned red-and-blue waistband, gold floral embroidery on sleeves and lower front panel, hands folded, black updo hair with a gold ornament centered on top. Right model: pale mint-green outer robe with wide sleeves, red front skirt panel, pale blue sleeve linings and hanging ribbons, red patterned waistband, floral embroidery on the lower red panel and robe edges, hands folded, black updo hair with multiple gold ornaments across the crown and sides.

Visual style: photorealistic high-fashion historical costume photography, ultra-detailed fabric texture, satin and brocade sheen, intricate embroidery, balanced soft lighting, muted colors, realistic proportions, elegant upright posture. Keep the composition formal and symmetrical, with no text, no watermark, no extra people, no props, and no modern objects. Use 3 coordinated hanbok looks, with the main palette emphasizing soft pink and lavender, deep navy and crimson, and pale mint green and red. Set the location as a blurred Korean palace courtyard.
entries.description: A photorealistic three-panel fashion composition featuring full-length traditional Korean hanbok outfits in a palace courtyard.

entries.title: Party Sheep Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished kawaii anime character design sheet for Party Sheep, an "AC Sheep" mascot called パリピ羊, themed as a social energy connector with party, music, QR-code, and neon wave motifs.

Canvas: Wide horizontal white character-sheet canvas, approximately 2:1 aspect ratio, clean editorial layout with lots of white space, thin pink guide lines and tiny decorative sparkles, music notes, stars, and wavy accent marks. Use a bright Japanese pop-idol / street-fashion illustration style with crisp ink, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, and sticker-like presentation.

Layout: Place a large decorative title block in the upper left reading "Party Sheep" in ornate serif lettering, with "Party" in hot pink and "Sheep" in gold. Under it place "AC Sheep" and large Japanese text "パリピ羊". Beneath the name, add a black ribbon label with gold trim reading "The Social Energy Connector". Add a short description paragraph below: "A vibrant sheep who lives for connection and good vibes. Party Sheep brings people together, shares energy, and turns any moment into a celebration. 交流 (connection) は energy!"

Top info card: In the upper middle, draw a rounded rectangle profile card with pink outline. Include exactly 5 labeled rows: "SPECIES: Party Sheep (パリピ羊)", "PERSONALITY: Outgoing, Warm, Charismatic", "LIKES: Parties, People, Music, Good Vibes, QR codes, Dance, Sharing energy", "DISLIKES: Awkward silence, Boring plans, Low battery", and "SPECIAL TRAIT: AC Wave Wool -- energy flows through connection. The more friends, the brighter the wave!" Add a hot-pink circular icon on the right side of the card containing a white sine-wave symbol.

Color palette: In the upper right, add the heading "COLOR PALETTE" and exactly 5 circular color swatches arranged horizontally. Label the first 4 clearly as "#1A1A2E" dark navy, "#2D2D44" charcoal purple, "#FF69B4" hot pink, and "#FFD700" gold; include a fifth pale cream/white swatch at the far right, partially near the edge, labeled with a cropped hex beginning with "#FF".

Character views: Show exactly 4 full-body chibi character views along the bottom, each with a pink caption: 1) "FRONT VIEW" small front-facing pose at far left, 2) "3/4 VIEW" larger energetic pose near center-left, 3) "SIDE VIEW" profile pose near center-right, and 4) "BACK VIEW" rear pose at far right. The 3/4 view should be the largest hero pose.

Subject details: The character is a small tan-skinned sheep-girl mascot with floppy sheep ears, curly voluminous wool hair in cream blond with hot-pink lower curls, and a glowing pink AC sine-wave pattern across the bangs. She has huge sparkling pink eyes, one eye winking in the hero pose, an open cheerful smile, and a playful party expression. Outfit: black cropped streetwear jacket with gold studs, chains, star patches, neon pink wave graphics, and glossy highlights; black top with a visible QR-code chest panel; short layered skirt or shorts with frilly trim; chunky black platform boots with gold hardware and glowing pink soles; fingerless gloves; gold chains and charms; hoop earrings, one with a small disco-ball charm. She holds a black smartphone decorated with pink/gold stickers and QR-like details. Add neon pink wireless-wave energy arcs near her hand/tail area, and small music notes around her.

Style constraints: Match the clean character reference sheet look exactly: white background, no scene environment, no extra characters, no random text beyond the specified labels, no watermark, no photorealism. Keep all lettering legible, colorful, and integrated into the design.
entries.description: Generates a kawaii anime mascot character design sheet with four views, profile card, palette, and detailed streetwear sheep-girl styling.

entries.title: Cinematic Disintegration Fashion
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic, cinematic 8K image with high-contrast dramatic lighting and a photo-real digital painting aesthetic - use face reference exactly.

The young woman is shown in a full-body side profile facing right, performing a slow graceful walking pose with a powerful fashion-editorial presence, her face copied perfectly with slight glamorous styling, soft wavy hair flowing naturally in the wind, and no major alterations to identity. She wears a luxurious fitted midnight sapphire women's pantsuit with a sharply tailored long blazer, bold structured shoulders, sleek high-waisted flared trousers, and a black satin inner corset-style top for a modern cinematic luxury look. Her posture reflects deep emotion and confidence, with a calm sorrowful facial expression, eyes looking slightly downward, one hand gently moving forward while the other hangs naturally by her side.

Nearly half of her body is dissolving into extremely thick, cloud-like grey smoke filled with glowing yellow dust particles. Her left arm, shoulder, torso, legs, and part of her hair become transparent as they break into luminous particles, suggesting active disintegration.

Behind and partially surrounding her is a massive glowing eclipse-like ring, emitting fiery golden-white plasma light. This object acts as a powerful rim and backlight, dramatically illuminating the smoke, dust, and silhouette.

The setting is minimal and cinematic: a desolate concrete surface beneath a heavily overcast sky. The color palette is dominated by monochrome greys, deep blues, and whites, contrasted with intense amber-gold glow. Shallow depth of field, glow/bloom lighting, particle dispersion, cinematic composition, emotional atmosphere, ultra-detailed textures, and dramatic luxury fashion energy.

entries.title: Realistic High-End Nail Art Generator
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate a realistic close-up of hand nail art, with the theme inspiration: jellyfish.

The main subject is a close-up of a meticulously cared-for female hand. The nails feature high-end gel designs, centered around jellyfish, presenting an elegant, clean, refined visual effect characteristic of fashion magazines. Emphasize the detail of the nail art, the glossy texture, and the consistency with the theme's atmosphere.

Composition and Subject Requirements:
The focus is on the hand and nail close-up. Finger gestures are natural and elegant, conveying a sense of luxury. Each nail is designed around the theme, using combinations like hand-painted elements, solid bases with glitter/foil accents, and varied but cohesive styles. Designs should include premium base gel, delicate painting, and matching decorations like sequins or metallic foil. The style must be professional and sophisticated, not cheap or juvenile.

Lighting and Photography:
Soft natural light, no harsh shadows, shallow depth of field, and sharp focus on nail details and gloss. High-end beauty editorial style, professional commercial photography, realistic skin textures, and 4K ultra HD clarity.

Background:
A soft, blurred background that echoes the jellyfish without distracting from the main subject.

Overall Style:
Photorealistic, glossy gel finish, elegant, and clean. Avoid cartoon/illustration styles, distorted fingers, or low-quality textures.

Aspect Ratio: 3:4

entries.title: Vintage Yellow Couture Field Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic fashion editorial photograph of a stunning young woman standing in the middle of an endless yellow wildflower field beside a vintage yellow convertible car. She has a sharp jawline, pale porcelain skin, short sleek black bob hair with a side part, piercing blue-grey eyes, bold matte red lips, soft glowing skin texture, and elegant facial features inspired by high-fashion European beauty editorials. She wears an extravagant mustard-yellow couture tulle gown with dramatic layered ruffles, flowing fabric trails, fitted strapless corset bodice, luxurious textured details, and a sophisticated haute couture silhouette. The dress spreads elegantly across the flowers and grass, moving softly in the wind. The woman poses confidently in a calm editorial stance, body slightly turned while looking directly into the camera with a dreamy, powerful expression. One hand gently touches her face while the other lightly holds the flowing gown. Minimal gold jewelry, long glossy black nails, luxury vogue-inspired styling, soft glamorous makeup with warm tones and defined eyes. Behind her is a vintage yellow convertible parked naturally in the countryside landscape, roof down, blending perfectly with the warm yellow flower scenery. The man faces toward the right side of the frame with his head slightly tilted forward, creating a bold editorial silhouette. He has a messy hair with sharp texture and a perfectly groomed full beard with visible individual hair strands and detailed mustache definition.

He wears glossy dark Clubmaster-style sunglasses with subtle metallic bridge details and reflective lenses. His right hand is raised naturally toward his face, gently adjusting the sunglasses with partially bent fingers. The hand is sharply detailed, showing realistic skin texture, knuckles, and soft shadows.

The subject is dressed in a fitted matte black shirt with slight fabric texture, visible folds, and a cuff button catching a soft highlight. The entire image uses a high-contrast monochrome aesthetic with strong chiaroscuro lighting. A Rembrandt-style studio light from the right side creates crisp highlights on the forehead, cheekbone, nose bridge, beard edge, and hand while leaving the back side of the face and neck fading into deep shadow.

Shot with an 85mm prime lens at eye level using a shallow depth of field, keeping the face and sunglasses razor sharp while the edges fall subtly out of focus. The background is pure matte black with no visible texture or gradients, emphasizing the cinematic luxury fashion aesthetic.

Ultra-realistic editorial photography, premium eyewear campaign style, moody masculine portrait, luxury fashion advertisement look, sharp beard texture, glossy sunglasses reflections, dramatic studio shadows, clean monochrome tones, high detail skin texture, minimal composition, modern men's fashion branding

entries.title: Monochrome Luxury Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic black-and-white studio portrait of a confident bearded man wearing unique, thin-framed gold round sunglasses with dark tinted lenses and a tailored dark suit, captured in a close-up composition with a shallow depth of field. He is positioned slightly to the right side of the frame, photographed at eye level with an 85mm portrait lens look. His head is turned to the left in profile view, gazing off-camera with a calm, contemplative expression, chin slightly raised. His left hand is loosely clenched near his chin, adding intensity and sophistication to the pose. The lighting is classic Rembrandt-style side lighting, soft yet highly directional, creating deep cinematic shadows across the right side of his face and neck while illuminating the left side of his face, forehead, nose bridge, and knuckles. Strong catchlights in the eyes are essential. The portrait should feel moody, elegant, and editorial, with rich tonal contrast and crisp texture detail. His beard is meticulously groomed with visible individual hairs and realistic skin texture including pores, eyelashes, and subtle facial lines. He has a messy hair and wears a luxury metal wristwatch on his left wrist with reflective metallic surfaces, visible bezel details, and a polished bracelet. On the cuff of his dark jacket, a silver-toned Roman numeral "III" detail appears vertically in a bold serif style. The suit fabric is matte black with subtle folds and stitched cuff details. The watch crystal and metal edges catch highlights naturally while the clothing remains mostly matte. The overall palette is monochrome only: deep blacks, bright whites, and rich greys with very high contrast. The background is a dark studio backdrop with soft mottled texture fading into near-black shadows and a heavy vignette on the right side. Slight soft-focus blur appears in the extreme foreground near the bottom edge, adding depth and realism. Ultra-realistic photography, cinematic portrait style, luxury fashion editorial aesthetic, extremely detailed beard texture, realistic skin micro-details, sharp focus on the eyes and face, high dynamic range monochrome tones, no visible noise, no compression artifacts.

entries.title: Fashion Magazine Cover Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra realistic fashion editorial magazine cover featuring [REFERENCE PERSON] sitting confidently on a low wooden pallet bench in a modern creative studio environment. Subject wears an all black minimalist outfit consisting of a black denim jacket, oversized black pants, black t shirt, and black Converse style sneakers with white laces and rubber soles. Relaxed wide leg sitting posture, leaning slightly forward with one elbow resting on the knee and one finger touching the side of the temple, making direct eye contact with the camera. Expression is calm, intelligent, creative, and self assured.

Background features a matte black wall with colorful geometric vertical wooden art panels behind the subject, creating an artistic modern studio aesthetic. Warm cinematic indoor lighting softly illuminates the face and clothing while maintaining deep shadows and dramatic editorial contrast. Natural woven textured rug on the floor, cozy luxury creative studio vibe.

Magazine cover layout with giant bold beige typography at the top reading "PROFILE" in huge condensed sans serif font covering most of the upper background. Multiple clean editorial typography sections placed around the composition including profile name, creative bio, focus section, quote section, social media handle, follower count, and minimalist design headlines. Top corners include small editorial labels and publication date reading "MAY 2026".

Color palette includes deep black, warm beige, muted orange, brown, teal, and cinematic earthy tones. Composition is centered and symmetrical with a premium fashion magazine aesthetic inspired by GQ editorials, luxury streetwear campaigns, modern creator branding, and cinematic portrait photography.

Shot on 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, ultra detailed skin texture, realistic fabric folds, soft cinematic shadows, photorealistic lighting, luxury editorial photography, clean typography design, professional magazine cover composition, high detail, 8K, premium cinematic grading.

Use golden hour warm backlight, glowing haze, long architectural shadows, and shimmering reflections across the water. entries.title: Conceptual Fashion Shadow Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic conceptual fashion portrait using the exact same face as the reference image (same eyes, same beard, same hairstyle, same glasses, strict identity lock, no variation). A young man standing in a minimal studio under strong angled light. His shadow on the wall is fully alive and different, sitting on the ground with a withdrawn, introspective posture. ⚠️ Face rules: * identical to reference image * no distortion, no reinterpretation * same proportions, same gaze, same skin texture. 🔥 Outfit: Modern high-end streetwear with strong visual contrast: * cropped black bomber jacket (slightly glossy texture) * inner: fitted off-white tee (clean contrast) * pants: wide-leg cargos with structure (matte charcoal) * sneakers: chunky off-white premium sneakers * accessories: thin silver chain + subtle rings. 🎥 Lighting: * strong side light (45° angle) * sharp shadow separation * shadow darker, slightly softer edges * subtle rim light on subject. 🧠 Composition: * subject standing slightly right * shadow sitting on left wall * clean negative space * cinematic balance. ✍️ Typography: * Top: NOT ME (bold, tight kerning) * Below small: BUT STILL ME * Bottom integrated in shadow: OTHER (slightly transparent, large). 🎯 Style direction: * luxury campaign aesthetic * sharp focus, 8K * neutral beige background * high contrast but soft skin tones. editorial fashion campaign, Balenciaga style, high-end streetwear photography
entries.description: A complex conceptual fashion prompt featuring a subject and a living, introspective shadow with high-end streetwear styling.

entries.title: Anonymous Black Lace Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic full-body fashion editorial portrait of a young adult woman standing in a minimalist industrial studio with a dark gray concrete wall and polished concrete floor. She has long wavy dark brown hair, with her face intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular blur for anonymity. She wears an elegant black semi-sheer lace long-sleeve high-neck jumpsuit with wide-leg pants and visible opaque black underlayer, paired with black pointed stiletto heels. Pose her slightly angled toward the camera, one hand resting softly at the waist and the other arm relaxed at her side, with a poised high-fashion attitude. Use moody studio lighting from the upper left, soft shadows, subtle highlights on the lace texture, muted charcoal tones, shallow background detail, and a premium magazine look. Vertical composition, full body visible, centered slightly left, realistic photography, 85mm lens feel, high resolution, no text, no logos.

entries.title: Couture Leather Runway Model
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-fashion runway photograph of a tall, slender female model with a softly blurred, non-identifiable face walking confidently down a polished marble catwalk inside an ornate historic palace hall. She wears a dramatic couture ensemble: a wide-brim black hat with a black floral applique on one side, a structured metallic slate gray leather trench coat with a high popped collar, sharp tailored shoulders, fitted waist, black textured cuffs and side panels, and a large black jeweled floral embellishment at the waist. The long coat is open in motion, revealing a luminous ivory satin interior and slim glossy black leather trousers, paired with knee-high black leather boots and black leather gloves. Capture the coat flaring outward as she strides, emphasizing sweeping fabric movement, luxury materials, and sculptural tailoring. The setting has golden architectural trim, dark stone walls, a large abstract stone sculpture in the background, reflective marble flooring, shallow depth of field, soft runway lighting, realistic editorial fashion photography, full-body frontal composition, centered subject, elegant dramatic mood, ultra-detailed textures, 4:5 vertical aspect ratio.

entries.title: Minimalist Fashion Lookbook Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Minimalist fashion lookbook collage featuring 8 full-body female models standing against a warm beige studio background. Each model wears elegant, neutral-toned outfits styled in a modern classic aesthetic. Clothing includes silk blouses, cashmere sweaters, linen shirts, knit polos, cardigans, tailored trousers, pleated trousers, wide-leg pants, slim trousers, and an A-line midi skirt. Outerwear includes a houndstooth blazer and a long trench coat. Accessories include structured handbags, tote bags, top-handle bags, belts, wristwatch, and silk scarf. Footwear includes ballet flats, loafers, cap-toe flats, slingback flats, and pumps. Soft lighting, editorial style, clean composition, subtle shadows. Handwritten-style labels pointing to each clothing item. Neutral color palette (cream, beige, black, brown). High detail, fashion magazine aesthetic, 4k resolution.
entries.description: A professional fashion editorial prompt for creating a minimalist collage featuring multiple models in neutral-toned outfits with a clean, high-detail magazine aesthetic.

entries.title: Vogue Cover with Emily Blunt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-fashion Vogue magazine cover photograph, August 2025 issue, Vogue Hong Kong. 

Emily Blunt as a glamorous elegant woman with shoulder-length straight platinum blonde hair, wearing dramatic makeup, standing in a modern minimalist interior with metallic reflective walls and a reddish-brown carpet floor. 

She is wearing a luxurious avant-garde white textured cape/poncho made of thick chunky yarn, black long leather opera gloves, black tights, and black heeled boots. She is holding a brown leather leash in one hand and a small black handbag in the other.

Next to her is a large, beautiful Afghan Hound dog with long flowing silky fur in shades of beige, gold, and dark brown/gray, wearing a small gold collar, walking beside her.

The composition is cinematic and editorial, with soft dramatic lighting. Large elegant text at the top reads "VOGUE" in cream color with "HONG KONG" underneath. Date "AUGUST 2025" on the right. Bottom text in elegant serif font: "FALLING FOR EMILY BLUNT" and smaller credit "BY DOMEN & VAN DE VELDE".

Photorealistic, high resolution, fashion photography style like Annie Leibovitz or Mario Testino, sharp details, luxurious atmosphere.
entries.description: A photorealistic fashion photography prompt for a magazine cover featuring Emily Blunt and an Afghan Hound in an avant-garde style.

entries.title: Powder Blue Lolita Dress Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a full-body fashion portrait of a young woman wearing an elegant sweet lolita-inspired Victorian dress in powder blue and white. She stands centered in a graceful studio pose, lightly holding the sides of her wide bell-shaped skirt, with one arm extended delicately. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while her visible hair is a sleek short black bob with glossy highlights and straight bangs. The outfit has a sheer white high-neck blouse bodice with vertical pleats, pearl-like buttons, layered ruffles across the chest and shoulders, voluminous puff sleeves gathered with small bows, a pale blue corset-style waist panel with lace-up ribbons, long white ribbon streamers, a small blue flower brooch on the chest, and a dramatic ankle-length powder-blue skirt with deep folds. Add a vertical white lace trim down the center front of the skirt and a white lace petticoat peeking from the hem. She wears white lace-up platform shoes, delicate socks, a pearl bracelet, and small earrings. Use a dark starry black studio backdrop fading to a soft gray floor with a subtle reflection and shadow beneath her feet. Lighting should be soft, cinematic, and high-fashion, emphasizing satin fabric sheen, translucent sleeves, lace texture, and crisp ruffle details. Generate a polished photorealistic editorial fashion image, vertical composition, full body visible, no text, no logos.

Her hands gently hold the sides of the skirt outward, showing the flowing layered hem and translucent fabric. entries.title: Vogue Hong Kong Yacht Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed Vogue Hong Kong magazine cover featuring East Asian model Fish Liew with short, windswept black hair, sitting elegantly on the edge of a white luxury yacht. She is wearing a plain white short-sleeve Ralph Lauren Polo t-shirt with a small red polo player logo on the chest, paired with a flowing dark navy blue long wrap skirt with a high slit, barefoot. Her pose is relaxed and confident - one leg bent with foot resting on the yacht edge, the other leg dangling, one hand resting on her knee, the other arm leaning on the railing. Next to her is a large woven straw tote bag with bold yellow "POLO" lettering and a red knitted sweater draped over the chrome railing. The background is a vibrant deep blue ocean with gentle sparkling waves under bright daylight. The image has the classic Vogue magazine layout with large yellow "VOGUE" logo at the top, "HONG KONG" underneath, "SAIL INTO SPRING" headline, issue text "no.103.0 MARCH 2025", and "by ISSAC LAM" credit at the bottom. Cinematic lighting, sharp fashion photography style, elegant and fresh spring vibe.
entries.description: An elegant fashion photography prompt for a magazine cover featuring a model on a luxury yacht with a fresh spring vibe.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
{
 "style": {
 "genre": "high-end food advertisement meets playful editorial",
 "aesthetic": "glossy campaign photography with hand-drawn doodle overlays",
 "film": "medium format, sharp and vibrant, commercial quality",
 "no_text": true,
 "no_logos": true,
 "no_brand_names": true,
 "no_overlays_except": "hand-drawn doodles only"
 },
 "doodles": {
 "style": "casual hand-drawn pen sketches, slightly imperfect, charming",

 ],

 },

 },

entries.title: Mint Retro EV by the Sea
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic lifestyle image of a cute compact retro-futuristic electric hatchback in pale mint green parked on a sunny coastal road beside a sparkling blue ocean. A young woman with short blonde hair stands leaning casually against the passenger side near the front door, wearing a light mint green short summer dress with a matching cardigan and beige platform sandals; her face is softly anonymized/blurred. The car has rounded bubble-like styling, smooth glossy paint, large rounded windows, cream interior seats, a brown steering wheel and dashboard, covered rear wheel arches, circular aero wheel covers, subtle chrome trim, and a friendly cute design. Compose the scene in a wide horizontal 3:2 frame with the car filling most of the left and center, the woman on the right, ocean horizon in the background, bright midday sunlight, crisp reflections on the bodywork, shallow realistic depth, clean vacation mood, high-end automotive photography, natural colors, realistic proportions, no text, no logos emphasized.

entries.title: Surreal Top-Down iPhone Fashion
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-realistic top-down photograph of a young male model with a clean skin fade and short curly textured hair, standing in a confident, relaxed pose directly on the glowing screen of a giant iPhone 16. The phone screen is active, displaying a dark-themed Spotify playlist with the song title "Sajanka - Sun is Coming" clearly visible beneath him. He wears 2025 AirPods Max in a neutral metallic finish, an oversized white hoodie-style shirt with subtle drape, black athletic shorts, and crisp white Air Jordan sneakers. The top-down high angle flattens the scene and emphasizes the surreal scale-the model's feet rest on digital buttons and album art. Lighting is soft, minimal, and diffused, with a cool neutrality that makes the white clothing and bright screen pop without harsh shadows. Colors are constrained: brilliant white, deep black, titanium grey, and a small vivid accent from the Spotify album cover. Textures contrast smoothly: matte cotton fabric, glossy headphone surfaces, and the glass screen's slight reflectivity. Style is sleek, minimal, fashion-forward, and futuristic, blending tech advertising aesthetics with editorial portraiture. The mood is confident, fresh, and effortlessly cool.
entries.description: A creative fashion prompt featuring a model standing on a giant iPhone screen with a futuristic tech aesthetic.

entries.title: Luxury Perfume Fashion Mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the product base, transform the simple perfume-bottle shot into a studio-quality fashion advertising mockup. Keep the perfume bottle design, label text, black cap, amber liquid, and glass shape accurate and readable, but place it in the foreground being held close to the camera by one model's hand. Add exactly 1 fashion model in the background, posed dynamically in a low-angle wide-lens composition, wearing a bright orange suit with a black shirt, black belt, and glossy black dress shoes. The model should stand in a confident editorial stance with one leg extended forward and the product exaggerated in scale by perspective. Use a clean warm beige studio backdrop, professional softbox lighting, crisp commercial product reflections, shallow depth of field, and a premium luxury fragrance campaign look. Keep the face unobtrusive or softly blurred so the product remains the hero. Overall mood: bold, modern, high-fashion, polished studio mockup.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Neon Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young woman facing the camera with a confident, composed expression. Symmetrical composition, strong presence.
She wears a transparent futuristic jacket with glowing neon edges in green and orange, slightly reflective with a subtle holographic feel. Beneath it, a sleek black fitted outfit with a softly illuminated chest logo.
Oversized modern sunglasses with faint reflections. Glossy, clean makeup with smooth, detailed skin. Hair styled in soft, voluminous waves.
Background is a deep dark teal gradient with a cyberpunk atmosphere, featuring soft volumetric smoke and faint light trails drifting behind her to create depth and motion.
Lighting is cinematic and studio-quality, with a strong key light on the face, subtle rim lighting enhancing the neon edges, and soft shadows for depth. High contrast with a clean, premium aesthetic.
Ultra-detailed textures, sharp focus, realistic skin detail, refined fabric rendering, and soft neon glow diffusion.
Style: high-end fashion campaign, cyberpunk aesthetic, minimal yet powerful composition, luxury sportswear branding vibe.

entries.title: Surreal Ivory Bridal Sandal Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A surreal, high-end studio product scene featuring a pair of oversized ivory lace high-heel sandals placed horizontally on a clean surface. The sandals are richly detailed with floral embroidery, pearls, and rhinestone embellishments, giving a luxurious bridal aesthetic. The background is a smooth pastel mint-green gradient with soft, diffused lighting and subtle shadows.

Three miniature women interact with the giant sandals, creating a whimsical scale contrast. All women wear chic neutral outfits (beige jackets, white tops, blue jeans) and stylish sunglasses, paired with similar ivory embellished heels matching the main product.

One woman stands on the left holding a rope, grounded and steady. Another woman is hanging from the rope, suspended mid-air and leaning against the side of the sandal, interacting directly with it. The third woman stands confidently on the right near the heel, posing with attitude.

The rope stretches across the scene, slightly curved, adding dynamic tension and guiding the viewer's eye. Composition is balanced and cinematic, with strong negative space in the upper frame. Focus is sharp on the sandals with shallow depth of field for background softness.

Style: ultra-realistic, editorial fashion photography, surreal scale, clean minimal aesthetic, premium product advertising.

Camera: 85mm lens, eye-level angle, shallow depth of field.

Lighting: soft studio lighting, high-end commercial look, gentle highlights on textures.

Aspect ratio: 9:13 vertical.

entries.title: Luxury Streetwear Sneaker Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic fashion editorial shot of a young male model with short curly hair and light stubble, wearing yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses and a monochrome beige athleisure outfit (relaxed sweatshirt and joggers), paired with chunky off-white sneakers.

Composition:
Full-body shot, slightly low angle. The model is leaning casually with hands in pockets against a giant oversized sneaker positioned vertically behind him, as if it's a sculptural object. The sneaker is hyper-detailed, modern chunky sole design, soft matte texture, neutral tones matching the outfit.

Pose & Expression:
Relaxed, confident stance, body slightly tilted back, one leg subtly forward. Calm, minimal expression, looking directly at camera.

Background:
Minimalist studio with a bold, saturated red backdrop and glossy reflective floor creating a clean mirror reflection beneath both the model and the oversized shoe.

Lighting:
Soft diffused studio lighting with subtle highlights and controlled shadows. Even illumination, high-end campaign look, no harsh contrast.

Style & Aesthetic:
Luxury streetwear campaign, surreal scale contrast (giant object vs human), clean composition, strong negative space, editorial photography, ultra-sharp focus, natural skin texture, 8K resolution.

Color Palette:
Monochrome beige outfit and shoe contrasted against vivid red background for strong visual impact.

Keywords:
surreal fashion, oversized object, modern streetwear, minimalism, reflective floor, high-fashion campaign, product-focused composition, cinematic lighting

entries.title: Premium Fashion Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Subject & Composition: A high-end fashion studio portrait of a confident woman wearing a premium athletic matching set. entries.title: Fashion Editorial Color Box
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the person in the input image as the ONLY subject. Preserve their identity and facial features clearly.

Create a hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric (a hollow cube / tilted cube set). Each render MUST randomly choose:
1) a bold single-color box (monochrome environment, vivid and saturated),
2) a dynamic "cool" fashion pose (gravity-defying or extreme stretch / leap / sideways bracing against the walls),
3) a dramatic camera angle (wide-angle 24-35mm equivalent, tilted horizon, strong perspective).

The subject appears full-body and sharp, wearing an avant-garde fashion styling that feels modern and editorial (clean silhouette, stylish layering, premium fabric texture). Keep clothing tasteful and fashion-forward. The subject's pose should feel athletic, stylish, and unusual-like a magazine campaign shot.

Lighting: studio quality, crisp and cinematic; strong key light with controlled soft shadows, subtle rim light; realistic reflections and bounce light from the colored walls. Ultra-detailed skin texture, natural pores, realistic fabric weave, clean edges, high dynamic range. 
Composition: subject centered with plenty of negative space and strong geometric lines; the box perspective frames the subject. 
Color: the box color is a SINGLE bold color and MUST be different each run (random vivid hue). The subject's outfit contrasts well with the box color.

Output: hyper-real, photorealistic, 8k detail, editorial campaign quality, sharp focus on subject, no motion blur, no distortion of face, natural proportions.
entries.description: An editorial prompt that places a subject into a surreal, monochromatic geometric room with high-fashion poses.

entries.title: Chibi Fashion Girl With Leopard Accents
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body cute chibi fashion illustration of a stylish young woman standing in a playful over-the-shoulder pose on a clean warm off-white background. She has an oversized head, tiny body, huge glossy eyes, long lashes, softly blushed cheeks, and a coy smile, looking back toward the viewer with a flirty confident expression. Her hair is dark brown and styled in 1 very large messy high bun with loose wispy strands flying around the face, tied with 1 leopard-print scrunchie or ribbon. Add 2 small gold hair clips on the side, one star-shaped and one circular. She wears 3 earrings visible on one ear: 2 small hoops and 1 dangling star charm earring. Outfit: an oversized black off-shoulder long-sleeve top slipping off one shoulder, 1 pair of high-waisted baggy cream jogger pants with cuffed ankles, 1 thin belt or drawstring detail, 1 decorative hip chain hanging from the waistband, and 1 large leopard-print sash tied at the back side of the waist with long flowing tails. Shoes are 1 pair of black platform sneakers with white soles and small gold star accents. Her hands are tucked casually into her pockets, one leg straight and the other lifted slightly forward as if mid-step. Include 1 small hand-drawn black heart doodle floating beside her head. Style is polished anime-inspired fashion sketch, ultra-clean line art, soft cel shading, delicate warm highlights, elegant trendy proportions, boutique sticker illustration aesthetic, minimal background, centered composition, high detail in hair wisps and accessories.

entries.title: Forbes-Style 30 Under 30 Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-realistic editorial magazine cover in the style of Forbes, photographed as a formal indoor business portrait. A confident young woman named MIRA sits centered in a beige upholstered armchair in a luxurious modern interior with dark stone or wood walls and a softly blurred plant in the background. She has long, voluminous, softly wavy dark brown hair with a middle part, light warm skin, and a poised, calm expression. She wears a fitted black dress, a black blazer, and a delicate gold necklace with a small oval pendant. Her posture is elegant and composed, seated slightly back in the chair with one arm relaxed on the armrest. Use warm cinematic lighting with soft highlights on the hair and face, shallow depth of field, premium color grading, and sharp fashion-editorial detail. Design the image as a complete magazine cover with large white serif masthead reading Forbes across the top, small uppercase date text "MAY 2025" in the top right, and the left-side feature line "30 UNDER 30" in a refined serif layout with the number 30 repeated large. Add left-column small cover text: "MEET THE NEXT GENERATION OF GAME CHANGERS RESHAPING THE FUTURE." Add a large lower-left headline in pale yellow serif text: MIRA. Beneath it, add the subheadline: "FOUNDER. CREATOR. VISIONARY." Add another lower-left text block: "BUILDING BRANDS. INSPIRING MILLIONS. DEFINING THE FUTURE." On the right side, add the stacked headline: "YOUNG ENOUGH TO CHANGE THE WORLD" and below it another text block: "BOLD IDEAS. REAL IMPACT. BOUNDLESS POTENTIAL." Keep the layout balanced, luxurious, aspirational, and authentically like a high-end business magazine cover.
entries.description: A polished business-magazine cover portrait for creating a Forbes-style young founder feature with premium editorial typography and luxury lighting.
