entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body street fashion photo of a young skater standing on a concrete beachside boardwalk at sunset, with tall palm trees silhouetted in the background and a warm pastel sky fading from peach to pale gold. The subject faces the camera in a relaxed editorial pose, one hand in a pocket and the other holding a worn skateboard vertically by the trucks. He wears a lavender knit beanie over shaggy medium-length dark hair, an oversized cropped faded tan workwear overshirt with two chest flap pockets and a small square logo patch, a plain white T-shirt visible underneath, a black-and-white checkerboard belt, extremely oversized dark indigo baggy jeans with contrast stitching and large utility-style patch pockets, and checkerboard slip-on skate shoes. The jeans should be the hero piece: extra wide leg, pooled and draping heavily over the shoes, exaggerated volume but believable denim structure. entries.title: Fashion Product Campaign Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean editorial collage of 6 fashion-and-beauty product campaign visuals on a light gray studio background, arranged in a balanced magazine-style grid with rounded rectangular image blocks and generous white space. Add elegant serif text at the top left reading "GPT image 2.0" with a smaller handwritten script subtitle reading "Prompt Template". Each panel should combine an oversized foreground product held close to the camera with a full-body fashion model in the background, using forced perspective so the product looks much larger than the person. Use sharp studio lighting, soft shadows, glossy commercial retouching, high-end advertising aesthetics, and vibrant color styling.

Panel 1: a close hand holding a tall rectangular pink lip gloss tube with metallic cap, label visible, in front of a female model wearing a bold monochrome red outfit with a red jacket and shiny red pants, standing in a dynamic leaning pose with pink platform heels.

Panel 2: a close hand holding a frosted skincare essence bottle with a black cap, luxury minimalist label, in front of a female model wearing a red tailored pantsuit and red heels, posed in a fashion-forward stride or lunge.

Panel 3: a close hand holding a square bottle of red nail polish with a black cap and luxury branding, in front of a female model wearing a coral pleated midi skirt, teal top or jacket, a dark quilted handbag, and heeled sandals, posed as if walking.

Panel 4: a larger bottom-left hero panel featuring a close hand holding a large white-and-green pump bottle of facial cleanser with pharmacy-style branding, in front of a female model crouching low in green track pants, white crop top, blue jacket, and white sneakers, with a wide-angle fashion pose.

Panel 5: a close hand holding a red glass skincare serum dropper bottle with white text, in front of a female model in a teal satin-like blouse and flowing coral or red skirt, posed in motion.

Panel 6: a close hand holding a white low-top sneaker with a black swoosh, in front of a female model wearing a white cropped jacket, white top, and dark pleated skirt, posed in a graceful editorial stance.

Overall composition should feel like a social-media-ready campaign template for agencies: modern, premium, minimal, stylish, commercial, and highly polished. Keep the background uncluttered, faces intentionally soft or de-emphasized, and emphasize the contrast between the oversized products and the fashion models behind them.
entries.description: A polished editorial-style collage of six oversized product-and-model ad compositions, ideal for beauty, skincare, and fashion campaign mockups.

entries.title: Fashion Portrait at a Waterfall
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic fashion photograph of a young woman standing on a wet dark rock ledge in front of a towering waterfall inside a rocky gorge. Full-body shot, wide horizontal composition, subject placed slightly right of center, with the waterfall occupying most of the left and center background as a huge curtain of white rushing water and mist. The scene feels moody, elegant, and realistic, with natural overcast lighting, cool gray tones in the environment, and subtle contrast against the warm skin tones. She has a slim athletic figure, long legs, and dark hair tied in a high messy ponytail. Her face is turned slightly to the side for a composed editorial pose. She wears a dark brown asymmetrical one-shoulder ruched crop top, a beige high-waisted wrap mini skirt with a thin belt and short built-in shorts, and strappy high-heel sandals. Her skin and outfit are slightly wet from the spray. Pose with one leg extended forward, hips angled, one arm relaxed by her side, the other resting naturally, creating a confident luxury fashion-editorial silhouette. Background details include 1 large waterfall, 1 slick black rock wall on the right, and 1 wet reflective stone platform underfoot. Ultra-realistic photography, high detail, shallow depth of field but with the waterfall still recognizable, soft mist, water droplets, dramatic natural texture, premium magazine shoot aesthetic, muted earthy palette, no text, no extra people, no props.

entries.title: Editorial Fashion Ballerina
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A graceful ballerina kneeling elegantly on a pure white seamless studio backdrop, her eyes gently closed in serene concentration, head slightly tilted. She has a sleek, tight ballet bun with no loose strands, flawless skin with subtle natural makeup. She wears a form-fitting black spaghetti-strap leotard with delicate thin straps, semi-sheer fishnet tights that accentuate her long legs, and beautiful pale pink satin pointe shoes with long matching ribbons gracefully wrapped and tied around her ankles. In her hands she holds a large piece of flowing black sheer chiffon fabric captured mid-motion, the fabric swirling and draping dynamically around her body and arms as if dancing in the air. Soft directional lighting from the upper left creates gentle highlights and soft shadows that sculpt her form beautifully, high-contrast editorial lighting with clean gradients. Elegant and refined kneeling pose, one knee down, the other leg elegantly bent, toes perfectly pointed in pointe shoes. Minimal and modern high-fashion dance aesthetic, clean studio setting with no distractions, pure white background. entries.title: Japanese Rainwear Catalog Layout
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean, high-end Japanese fashion catalog page on a soft warm light-gray background, featuring a coordinated rainwear set laid flat as a product editorial. The central focus is 1 women's hooded raincoat in a muted dusty blue tone, shown front-facing and neatly arranged with sleeves slightly bent inward. The coat is mid-thigh length with a full front zipper, snap-button storm placket details near the collar, a large structured hood, adjustable drawcords at both the hood and waist, two vertical zip pockets, subtle seam construction, and a slightly longer curved back hem with a darker inner lining visible at the bottom opening. Above and to the right, place 1 matching wide-brim rain hat in the same dusty blue, angled slightly, with a darker contrasting brim underside and a small black tag on the crown. Use soft diffused studio lighting with gentle realistic shadows to give a premium product-photography look.

Add editorial typography and callouts around the products in a minimalist Japanese layout. In the upper left, place a small Japanese tagline reading "雨の日も、わたしらしく。" above a large serif English headline reading "OUTDOOR SET UP". Beneath it, add a short vertical block of Japanese body copy describing the stylish functional raincoat-and-hat set. In the lower left, add a serif subheading "DETAILS" with 2 circular inset detail photos stacked vertically: the top circle shows a close-up of the hood and front fastening area with drawcord hardware; the bottom circle shows water droplets beading on the blue waterproof fabric. To the right of each circle, place short Japanese explanatory text. On the right side of the page, add 2 product callout labels in serif English with thin leader lines: "HAT" near the upper-right hat with a short Japanese description below, and "COAT" near the lower-right side of the coat with a short Japanese description below. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with elegant negative space, refined magazine styling, realistic garment textures, and a modern outdoor-luxury aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese editorial product sheet for a blue raincoat and matching hat, ideal for fashion catalog, brand lookbook, or e-commerce campaign visuals.

entries.title: Minimalist Fashion Editorial Split Panel
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Left panel: Show a young man from the back standing inside a clean, minimal café or takeaway shop interior. He is wearing an off-white oversized t-shirt with a " SHAMUS "logo printed large across the back,
and a matching light beige cap with the SHAMUS logo on it. The environment should have light wooden
counters and shelves, warm natural lighting, and minimal branded packaging displayed on the shelves
in the background. The mood should feel clean, airy, and contemporary. Right panel: Show a cropped
lifestyle shot of a person standing near a wooden doorway or wall, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt
and loose black pants, holding a white paper takeaway bag with a die-cut handle. The " SHAMUS" logo
Only the lower torso and hand should be visible for a stylish editorial composition

entries.title: Mixed-Media Fashion Editorial and Cartoon Fusion
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Full-body fashion editorial shot of a confident young woman with long wavy dark brown hair, striking sharp facial features, defined cheekbones, deep-set eyes with a calm dominant gaze, sunglasses perched on top of her head, standing in a powerful pose - one hand resting on an open scissor door, body slightly turned, looking straight at camera with a composed, fierce expression. Wearing a fitted black long-sleeve racing jersey with gold sponsor logos (Alpinestars collar detail), black racing gloves, with a white, black, and red Sparco racing suit draped and hanging off her body, and black racing shoes. Clean editorial styling, natural confident stance, wind slightly moving her dark wavy hair. Beside and partially interacting with a stylized cartoon Cat, positioned naturally as if sharing the same space. The Cat is illustrated in bold cartoon style with thick black outlines, vibrant neon color palette (neon green, blue, yellow accents), exaggerated proportions, expressive features, playful yet powerful presence. Background: bright indoor motorsport garage pit lane setting with large industrial windows flooding soft diffused daylight, glossy reflective concrete floor, a neon green Lamborghini Huracán with open scissor door partially visible. Fusion of hyper-realistic photography and graphic illustration, seamless integration between subject and cartoon. Add graphic overlay elements: doodle Gugu arrows, scribbles, racing-themed abstract shapes, speed lines, comic-style symbols, dynamic motion lines, checkered flag doodles. High contrast, HDR lighting, sharp focus, fashion editorial motorsport composition, surreal mixed-media aesthetic, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution.

entries.title: Surreal Orange Puffer Bus Stop Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal high-fashion editorial photograph on an empty roadside in a bleak Icelandic-looking landscape under a flat gray overcast sky. Center the composition on a small brutalist concrete bus stop shelter with stained weathered walls and a simple bench inside, and place 1 slender adult man inside the shelter wearing a tailored black suit, black shirt, and black shoes, standing casually and looking to the side. Draped over the entire bus stop is 1 enormous oversized puffer jacket in vivid burnt orange, inflated and tent-like, forming a monumental sculptural canopy over the shelter; the collar gapes open above the roof, the sleeves slump down on both sides to the wet pavement, and the glossy quilted nylon shows realistic wrinkles, puffed chambers, seams, snaps, and fashion-product detail. The road in the foreground is dark and rain-slick, with subtle reflections and a cold damp atmosphere. In the background, show low barren hills with traces of snow and a remote windswept shoreline feel. Shoot it like a luxury magazine fashion campaign with cinematic realism, centered framing, muted natural light, strong contrast between the monochrome environment and the orange coat, minimal color palette, slightly monumental scale distortion, and crisp editorial photography detail.

entries.title: Fashion Editorial Outfit Breakdown
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, extract only the outfit and turn it into a clean fashion magazine product showcase on a light warm-beige background. Remove the person entirely and display the clothing as separate laid-flat items: 1 cropped short-sleeve top centered near the top and 1 pair of shorts centered below it. Preserve the vivid multicolor art print from the reference, but present the garments neatly, as if for an editorial catalog page, with soft studio shadows. Add 1 circular fabric-detail inset at the lower left showing a close-up of the print. Add elegant editorial typography and thin callout lines, with 4 text blocks total: a large headline block at upper left reading "COLORFUL ART SET UP" with small Japanese copy above and below, 1 right-side block labeled "TOPS" with Japanese description, 1 lower-right block labeled "BOTTOMS" with Japanese description, and 1 lower-left block labeled "FABRIC" with short Japanese description. Keep the overall look refined, minimal, premium, and like a clothing introduction page in a magazine.

entries.title: Photorealistic beauty campaign portrait prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Photorealistic close-up beauty campaign portrait of a stunning young Western woman with long, voluminous curly dark hair, defined cheekbones, thick expressive eyebrows, and flawless luminous skin. Her features are sharp yet feminine, with a confident, slightly rebellious expression.

She wears a premium black and hot-pink baseball cap featuring bold, glowing hot-pink 3D lettering "SHARON" on the front, designed like a high-end streetwear brand logo. Trendy translucent pink-tinted round glasses sit perfectly on her face. A beige band-aid is placed on the bridge of her nose and another on her left cheek, adding a stylized edgy aesthetic. A lit cigarette rests between her slightly parted lips, revealing perfect white teeth.

Highly detailed miniature anime-style figurines (cute detective-inspired girl character: short brown bob haircut, oversized sparkling blue eyes, round glasses, bright red overalls, white shirt, yellow gloves) interact playfully across the composition: one sitting on the brim of the cap, one climbing her ear, one pulling her lower lip, one tucked inside her shirt collar, and one posed on her shoulder. A bold, oversized cyan pencil is tucked under the cap strap, acting as a striking graphic element.

Wardrobe styling: luxury streetwear aesthetic - black structured jacket layered over a crisp white-and-pink striped collared shirt, finished with a neatly tied pink scarf.

Color palette: deep blacks, vibrant hot-pink highlights, electric cyan accents, and warm yellow pops for contrast.

Lighting: high-end studio lighting with soft frontal illumination and dramatic rim lighting for depth and separation. Clean white seamless background.

Composition: ultra-sharp focus, editorial framing, luxury fashion advertisement style, cinematic depth, hyper-realistic textures (visible skin pores, detailed fabric weave, individual hair strands), 8K resolution, extremely intricate detailing.

Mood: bold, playful, high-fashion, Gen-Z luxury streetwear campaign, blending realism with surreal miniature storytelling.

entries.title: Raiden Shogun Beach Cosplay Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo of a glamorous beach cosplay portrait inspired by Raiden Shogun from Genshin Impact. A single adult woman sits on a large dark seaside rock in a three-quarter front pose, one hand resting behind her on the rock and the other relaxed near her side, with one thigh raised prominently toward the camera. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor centered over the face. She has very long, rich violet-purple hair with magenta highlights, styled with a thick braid draped over one shoulder and loose windswept strands flowing to the right, decorated with blue flower hair ornaments and gold accessories near one side of the head. She wears an elegant lavender, lilac, and deep purple Raiden Shogun-style cosplay outfit: a low-cut kimono-inspired bodice, translucent flowing sleeves, layered sash and obi with ornate circular gold-and-purple emblem at the waist, a jeweled choker with a purple gem, dangling blue-and-gold earrings, a black armored-looking forearm piece, and sheer purple thigh-high stockings with garter straps and decorative patterns. The lighting is natural golden beach daylight with soft highlights on skin and fabric, shallow depth of field, and a luxurious editorial look. The background is a softly blurred shoreline with pale sand, shimmering water, sea mist, and a distant rocky island or cliff. Compose it as a full magazine cover with elegant fashion typography in dark royal purple. The masthead is huge across the top reading COSPLAY, with small top-left text "COSPLAY REALM MAGAZINE" and small top-right text "JANUARY 2024". Add left-side cover lines: "RAIDEN SHOGUN", "COSPLAY BY SAKURA", "BEHIND THE SCENES AT THE BEACH", and "EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW" followed by smaller text "Sakura talks about her love for Genshin Impact". Add right-side cover lines: "GENSHIN IMPACT" with smaller text "SPECIAL EDITION", and at lower right "TOP COSER OF 2024" with smaller text "Sakura's rise to stardom". Place a realistic barcode with small pricing text in the bottom-left corner. Overall style: ultra-realistic cosplay photography, glossy magazine cover design, cinematic, sensual but tasteful, premium fashion editorial, high detail fabrics and accessories, sharp subject with softly blurred ocean background.
entries.description: This generates a realistic fashion magazine cover featuring a Raiden Shogun-inspired beach cosplay portrait, ideal for editorial mockups and cosplay-themed cover art.

cosplay-themed cover art. create a high-fashion magazine cover photo of a glamorous beach cosplay portrait inspired by raiden shogun from genshin impact. a single adult woman sits on a large dark seaside rock in a three-quarter front pose, one hand resting behind her on the rock and the other relaxed near her side, with one thigh raised prominently toward the camera. her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor centered over the face. she has very long, rich violet-purple hair with magenta highlights, styled with a thick braid draped over one shoulder and loose windswept strands flowing to the right, decorated with blue flower hair ornaments and gold accessories near one side of the head. she wears an elegant lavender, lilac, and deep purple raiden shogun-style cosplay outfit: a low-cut kimono-inspired bodice, translucent flowing sleeves, layered sash and obi with ornate circular gold-and-purple emblem at the waist, a jeweled choker with a purple gem, dangling blue-and-gold earrings, a black armored-looking forearm piece, and sheer purple thigh-high stockings with garter straps and decorative patterns. the lighting is natural golden beach daylight with soft highlights on skin and fabric, shallow depth of field, and a luxurious editorial look. the background is a softly blurred shoreline with pale sand, shimmering water, sea mist, and a distant rocky island or cliff. compose it as a full magazine cover with elegant fashion typography in dark royal purple. the masthead is huge across the top reading cosplay, with small top-left text "cosplay realm magazine" and small top-right text "january 2024". add left-side cover lines: "raiden shogun", "cosplay by sakura", "behind the scenes at the beach", and "exclusive interview" followed by smaller text "sakura talks about her love for genshin impact". add right-side cover lines: "genshin impact" with smaller text "special edition", and at lower right "top coser of 2024" with smaller text "sakura's rise to stardom". place a realistic barcode with small pricing text in the bottom-left corner. overall style: ultra-realistic cosplay photography, glossy magazine cover design, cinematic, sensual but tasteful, premium fashion editorial, high detail fabrics and accessories, sharp subject with softly blurred ocean background. product marketing portrait editorial fashion entries.title: Vogue Style Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic fashion magazine cover featuring the uploaded woman (strict identity lock - preserve exact facial features, skin tone, hair texture, and natural beauty with high fidelity).
She is styled in a modern elegant black outfit (minimalist blazer), posing confidently with a soft, intense gaze toward the camera.
Lighting is warm golden hour, soft directional light hitting the face and hair, creating natural glow and depth.
Hair is voluminous and slightly messy, styled in a high-fashion editorial way with natural movement.
Background is softly blurred urban café environment with warm tones, shallow depth of field, creating a premium lifestyle aesthetic.
Composition is clean and centered, portrait framing, 4:5 ratio, sharp focus on face with creamy bokeh background.
Add high-end magazine typography layout:
Large elegant serif title at top: "FASHION"
Small "VOGUE style" subtitle near top
Right side text: "NEW SEASON NEW YOU"
Bottom bold headline: "MODERN ELEGANCE"
Add small editorial quotes and minimal text blocks for realism
Include barcode at bottom corner
Color grading is warm, cinematic, slightly contrasty with rich skin tones and soft highlights.
8K resolution, ultra-detailed, fashion editorial photography, magazine cover style, premium luxury aesthetic.

entries.title: Luxury Skincare Advertisement
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
High-end luxury skincare advertisement featuring a giant, oversized bottle of 'VELORA Hydrating Skin Cleanser' standing approximately 3 feet tall on a premium stone pedestal. The bottle design is sleek and modern, with a glossy finish, and its color perfectly matches the outfit of the model - a soft satin dress in warm champagne gold tones, reflected identically in the bottle's body color for a cohesive fashion-forward aesthetic. 

In the background, a stylish Western woman with glowing sun-kissed skin and blonde hair styled in a loose messy bun wears gold-accented sunglasses and a flowing satin dress. She leans elegantly over the oversized bottle, reaching toward the pump with a relaxed, confident pose, creating a striking forced perspective illusion that emphasizes scale and interaction.

The setting is a warm, editorial-style studio environment with earthy luxury tones - beige, sand, terracotta, and soft gold hues. In the foreground, premium natural elements such as sliced oranges, dripping golden honey, chamomile flowers, and smooth stones are arranged artistically on textured sand, enhancing the organic skincare narrative. Subtle condensation droplets are visible on the bottle, adding realism and freshness.

Lighting is cinematic and inspired by golden hour, with soft shadows and a warm glow that highlights both the product texture and the model's skin. The composition includes intentional negative space for branding text. 

Overlay minimal, elegant advertising text in modern serif font:
'VELORA - Pure Hydration, Elevated.'
'Skin that glows naturally.'

Ultra-realistic, 8K resolution, sharp focus on product details, shallow depth of field, editorial fashion campaign, luxury skincare advertisement, premium branding, Vogue-style composition.

entries.title: Editorial Perfume Bottle in Golden Fur
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxurious editorial product photograph of a single perfume bottle nestled into dense, plush faux fur in rich golden caramel and honey-brown tones. Center the composition on one clear oval glass bottle filled with warm amber liquid, with a glossy rounded black cap and a clean white rectangular label. The label text should read BYREDO at the top, BAL D'AFRIQUE large in the middle, and EAU DE PARFUM in small text near the bottom. Shoot it as a close-up still life with soft studio lighting, subtle highlights on the glass and cap, gentle shadows in the folds of the fur, and a warm cinematic color palette. The bottle should sit slightly embedded in the fur so the surrounding texture frames it from all sides, creating a premium fashion editorial mood, minimal composition, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the label, and a high-end beauty campaign aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a high-end editorial beauty product shot of a perfume bottle surrounded by warm textured fur, ideal for luxury fragrance advertising and social media campaigns.

entries.title: High-Fashion Editorial Portrait Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-fashion editorial portrait of a woman in a minimalist studio setting. She is leaning slightly forward and tilting her head, creating a dynamic, asymmetrical composition. Her expression is neutral and confident, with a slightly intense gaze directed toward the camera.

She wears a structured, oversized gray blazer with a subtle textured pattern over a soft white dress. Around her neck is a sheer black scarf that drapes loosely and flows downward, adding contrast and movement. Her hands are partially tucked into the blazer, with sheer black gloves visible.

Her hair is styled in a slightly messy, effortless updo with loose strands framing her face. She wears bold, modern silver earrings. Her makeup is natural and dewy, with softly defined eyes and neutral lips.

The lighting is soft and diffused, creating gentle shadows and a clean, editorial feel. The background is minimal, featuring smooth, light gray tones with subtle curved shapes that add depth without distraction.

The color palette is muted and sophisticated: gray, white, and black dominate the scene. The overall mood is elegant, contemporary, and slightly moody, resembling a luxury fashion magazine shoot. Style keywords: fashion editorial, minimalist, soft lighting, neutral tones, modern elegance, high detail, shallow depth of field, studio photography, cinematic composition.
entries.description: A detailed fashion photography prompt for generating a luxury editorial portrait in a minimalist studio setting.

entries.title: Luxury Minimalist Footwear Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper realistic luxury editorial advertisement for Nike, executed with a restrained, high-fashion aesthetic. A male leg is suspended mid-air at a precise 45-degree angle toward the camera, styled with immaculate white athletic crew socks featuring a subtle, tonal Nike logo. The composition is clean and intentional, with generous negative space. The sneaker occupies the lower half of the frame, positioned slightly off-center for a balanced editorial layout. The footwear is a premium Nike low-top silhouette with glacier teal suede overlays and off-white tumbled leather panels. The iridescent chrome Swoosh reflects soft, diffused studio lighting, creating a refined, mirror-like highlight without harsh glare. Shot with a shallow depth of field: the sneaker remains perfectly sharp, while the leg transitions into a soft, elegant blur. Background & Atmosphere: A deep matte charcoal background with a subtle gradient falloff. No visible graffiti or noise-only a faint, almost imperceptible texture to avoid flatness. A soft vignette gently draws focus toward the sneaker. Lighting: Soft, controlled, diffused lighting from camera-left. Low contrast compared to sports ads, but with precise highlight control. Gentle specular highlight on chrome Swoosh. Soft glow on white leather. Minimal shadow harshness. Studio-quality, fashion editorial lighting. Typography & Layout (Luxury Minimalism). Top center (very small, spaced serif): "PRECISION · FORM · MOTION". Center-right headline (elegant hierarchy): "FORM" (ultra-bold, clean sans-serif), "IN MOTION" (thin, high tracking). Microtext (extremely subtle, small scale): "Engineered simplicity. Refined movement." Graphic Style: No bright accent colors. No arrows or aggressive elements. No clutter. No zine-style overlays. Pure, editorial restraint. Bottom-left Lockup: "LESS, BUT BETTER." (bold, minimal sans-serif). Subline (small, refined): "Every detail serves a purpose." Branding: Upper right: Nike wordmark and Swoosh in soft white or light gray. Small, understated-never overpowering Finish. Photorealistic, high-end commercial photography. Luxury fashion campaign aesthetic. Ultra-clean composition. 4K resolution. Vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. Optimized for premium digital campaigns and editorial placements
entries.description: A sophisticated editorial prompt for a high-fashion sneaker advertisement with precise technical lighting, layout, and typography instructions.

entries.prompt: A stylish man standing beside a matte gold luxury sports car (Porsche 911 style) in a vast desert landscape during golden hour. entries.title: Cinematic Summer Lifestyle Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cinematic, high-end lifestyle visual of a young woman walking along a sunlit road on a hot summer day. She is mid-action, drinking from a chilled Pepsi can, with visible condensation droplets emphasizing the heat and refreshment contrast. She has wireless earbuds in her ears, immersed in her own vibe.

Her face must closely match the provided reference image - accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression - polished, natural, and visually appealing.

She is wearing a coordinated red outfit: a stylish crop top (half sleeves, ending above the belly) paired with a short skirt that extends to just above the knees. The outfit is modern, clean, and fashion-forward. She also wears a matching cap, adding a sporty street-style aesthetic.

Environment: an open road under strong sunlight, subtle heat haze in the background, warm tones suggesting a hot day. The lighting is bright and slightly harsh, with realistic shadows and highlights on skin and clothing.

The Pepsi can is detailed with a crisp logo, metallic reflections, and condensation. Her interaction with it feels natural and candid, like a moment captured during a walk.

Composition is dynamic and lifestyle-oriented, with slight motion (hair movement, walking posture). Background softly blurred for depth, keeping focus on the subject.

Color grading: warm, summery tones balanced with the bold red outfit and cool blue of the Pepsi branding for contrast.

Style: cinematic lifestyle photography, commercial beverage ad, street fashion aesthetic

Resolution: ultra high resolution, 4K, highly detailed, photorealistic

entries.title: Japanese AI Product Landing Page Hero
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a polished Japanese landing page hero image for a fictional premium consumer tech product brand called DOKUMI. The page should look like a modern beauty-tech and food-safety product website, in a soft warm beige and ivory palette with elegant editorial styling, lots of whitespace, and subtle luxury cosmetics branding. Use a wide desktop web layout screenshot with a top navigation bar, a large left-aligned headline block, and a right-side lifestyle product photo composition.

The top header contains 8 visible navigation elements in a single row: the brand logo text "DOKUMI" at far left, then "ABOUT", "PRODUCT", "FEATURE", "INGREDIENT", "VOICE", "Q&A", then a small user account icon, and a rounded red call-to-action button labeled "今すぐ購入する" at the far right. Beneath the button area on the upper right, add a vertical red ribbon badge with white Japanese text reading exactly 4 stacked text groups: "発売記念", "限定", "20%", "OFF", plus small "CAMPAIGN" text below.

The hero section is split into two main columns. On the left, place a very large Japanese headline in elegant Mincho-style serif typography over three lines: "一口目は、", then "AIが先に。" with dramatic scale and generous spacing. Below it, add a smaller two-line Japanese subheading describing AI-based detection of food toxins, foreign substances, and allergens before eating, in a refined gray tone. Under that, place 2 horizontal CTA buttons: a filled red rounded button labeled "今すぐ始める" with a right arrow, and a white outlined rounded button labeled "詳しく見る" with a right arrow.

Below the buttons, add a row of 3 rounded white feature cards with thin borders and simple black line icons. The 3 cards are: 1) shield icon with title "AI画像解析" and a smaller subtitle about detecting toxins with high precision, 2) clock icon with title "3秒判定" and a smaller subtitle about instant results just by holding it up, 3) smartphone icon with title "スマホ連携" and a smaller subtitle about automatic history saving in the app.

At the bottom of the hero, add a row of 3 statistic cards with rounded corners and thin borders. The 3 cards read: 1) "累計販売台数※1" with large number "23,500" and smaller "台突破", 2) "満足度※2" with large number "94.3%", 3) "リピート率※2" with large number "81.2%". To the right of these cards, place 2 small footnote lines in Japanese: "※1 2026年4月時点 自社調べ" and "※2 2026年3月調査 N=180".

On the right side, create a soft, glamorous lifestyle photo scene. Show a stylish young woman with shoulder-length softly curled brown hair, fair skin, and a large red polka-dot bow headband. She wears an off-shoulder white ruffled blouse and rests her face lightly on one hand at a glossy tabletop. Her face is obscured by a centered rectangular skin-tone privacy block. In front of her on the table sits a sleek white handheld scanner device with a rounded vertical body and a small dark lens opening near the top rim accented in red. Next to the device is a realistic glossy red apple. Near the device, overlay a dark blue circular callout badge with white Japanese text reading "毒性チェック" and "わずか3秒", with a small plus sign beneath.

Use soft natural window light from the left, faint diagonal light streaks on the background wall, gentle shadows, realistic product rendering, and a premium e-commerce LP aesthetic. The composition should feel clean, aspirational, and slightly playful, like a startup landing page for an unusual AI gadget. Include all visible Japanese text exactly where specified.
entries.description: A premium Japanese e-commerce hero image for a fictional AI food-safety scanner, suitable for startup landing pages and concept product marketing.

entries.title: Inclusive Indian T-Shirt Brand Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean premium fashion campaign banner shot against a warm beige textured plaster wall, featuring 3 Indian men standing side by side full torso to upper thigh, evenly spaced across the frame, all with their hands in their pockets and looking slightly away from the camera. The styling is minimalist, editorial, and aspirational, with soft natural studio lighting and muted earthy tones. On the left, a lean man with short curly dark hair wears a slate blue crew-neck t-shirt and off-white trousers; in the center, an athletic man with short black hair wears an ivory cream crew-neck t-shirt and dark charcoal trousers; on the right, a heavier relaxed-build man with medium-length wavy dark hair wears a faded charcoal crew-neck t-shirt and light beige trousers. The t-shirts should look well-fitted on different body types, with realistic cotton texture, subtle folds, and clean hems. entries.title: Luxury Fashion Magazine Cover Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high fashion editorial magazine cover inspired by luxury fashion publications. Use the reference image of the male subject. Black and white portrait photography with a clean off white studio background. Subject is posed confidently from a low angle, looking slightly upward, sharp jawline, soft parted lips, tousled wavy hair with natural volume. Outfit includes a dark turtleneck layered under a textured tailored plaid blazer. Lighting is soft yet dramatic, creating sculpted facial shadows and elegant contrast. Magazine layout design with oversized serif masthead text at the top reading "VOGUE", partially hidden behind the subject's head. Minimal premium typography across the page. Add side text "FASHION", issue date "2026 MAY", left side headline "27 DIFFERENT STYLES", and bold bottom right cover line "LOOK FAMOUS". Include a small red translucent square overlay on one eye area with the word "CATCHY". Style should feel premium, modern, cinematic, clean composition, sharp focus, ultra realistic skin texture, editorial luxury aesthetic, balanced negative space, timeless fashion cover design. Vertical magazine ratio, high resolution.

entries.title: Office Style Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxury fashion magazine cover photographed in a modern executive office, featuring a stylish young East Asian businesswoman standing beside a wooden desk in a confident editorial pose. She has long, smooth, dark brown to black hair parted slightly off center, falling over both shoulders, and wears a fitted ribbed knit short-sleeve top in deep navy, tucked into a high-waisted ribbed pencil skirt in black. Add a delicate silver necklace with a small key pendant. Her body is angled slightly toward camera, with one hand lifted loosely near shoulder height and the other hand pointing down toward papers on the desk, conveying poised authority and effortless elegance. The setting is a refined corner office with warm wood bookshelves filled with books, a tufted brown leather executive chair, a polished wooden desk with neatly arranged documents and dark desk pads, and a tall window on the right revealing a soft blurred city skyline. Use soft natural daylight from the window mixed with warm interior tones, shallow depth of field, premium magazine photography, polished skin, realistic fabric texture, tasteful retouching, and a sophisticated editorial mood. Overlay elegant serif magazine typography: a very large masthead at the top left reading OFFICE STYLE, small issue text at the top right reading MAY/JUN 2024 VOL.28, and 5 cover lines total: on the upper right, "Modern Professional Wardrobe" with the smaller subtext "Refined pieces for confident everyday elegance."; on the upper left, "THE POWER OF PRESENCE" with the smaller subtext "Style is not just what you wear-it's how you carry yourself."; on the left middle, "DESIGNED FOR IMPACT" with the smaller subtext "Clean silhouettes. Timeless colors. Endless possibilities."; across the lower left in very large serif type, CONFIDENT & CAPABLE; and on the lower right, "FOCUS ELEVATE ACHIEVE" with the smaller subtext "Professional style that moves with you.". Vertical portrait layout, high-end fashion magazine cover composition, clean spacing, muted luxury palette, realistic office styling, chic corporate femininity, confidence in motion.

entries.title: Office Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-fashion editorial magazine cover set inside a modern open-plan office, photographed in a polished realistic style with soft commercial lighting and a luxury fashion mood. Center the full-body figure of a tall slim East Asian businesswoman walking confidently down the aisle between desks as if on a runway, shoulders back, arms relaxed, gaze forward. She wears a fitted ribbed knit short-sleeve top in powder blue, tucked into a long high-waisted ribbed mermaid skirt in white, with clean white pointed heels. Her hair is dark brown to black, styled in a high ponytail. The office around her is bright, elegant, and contemporary, with rows of desks on both sides, flat computer monitors, ergonomic white-and-gray office chairs, glass meeting room walls, warm wood panels, ceiling strip lights, and several blurred office workers seated and working, plus one suited figure standing in the background. Compose it like a premium fashion magazine cover with the woman dominating the center frame and the office receding in perspective behind her. Add large masthead text across the very top in oversized pale blue serif letters reading OFFICESTYLE. Add small white cover line text near the upper left: SUMMER 2024, and near the upper right: "FASHION & INSPIRATION". On the left side, place a large white serif headline broken over three lines: "Grace in Motion", with 2 smaller Japanese teaser blocks beneath it. On the lower left, add a blue serif subheadline: "Blue & White" with 2 lines of smaller Japanese text below. On the right side, add a white serif headline: "Modern Elegance" with 2 lines of smaller Japanese text below. In the lower right corner, place a large pale blue circle containing the white serif text "More inside" with 3 short lines of smaller Japanese teaser text beneath. Keep the overall palette airy and refined, dominated by blue, white, gray, and soft beige, with a clean magazine-cover layout, luxurious typography, subtle depth of field, and an aspirational office couture aesthetic.

entries.title: Pink Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A glossy high-fashion magazine cover portrait in a vertical format, styled like a premium beauty and fashion publication. Show a young woman from the chest up in a soft glamorous studio setup, turning slightly sideways with one hand raised near her lips in a coy elegant pose. Her face is intentionally obscured by a solid rectangular block in a muted warm beige tone, centered over the face area. She has long, softly wavy light brown hair with pink rim lighting catching the strands, large thin silver hoop earrings, and long manicured pale pink nails. She wears a fluffy fuzzy knit sweater in blush pink with oversized sleeves and a cozy luxurious texture. Use a monochromatic pink palette with warm rosy lighting, soft glow, shallow depth of field, beauty-retouch polish, and editorial fashion photography aesthetics. The background should be a smooth pink gradient with subtle studio haze and light bloom. Design it as a magazine cover with layered typography: a very large pale pink masthead reading "GPT" across the top, with elegant serif text "image 2.0" in the upper right. Add small upper-left text reading "MAY 2024" and "FASHION & BEAUTY MAGAZINE". Add three side feature blocks: left upper "Special Interview" with Japanese text beneath and "8P"; left lower "Trend Report" with Japanese text beneath; right middle "Beauty Update" with Japanese text beneath; right lower "Style Guide" with Japanese text beneath. At the bottom, place a large dramatic serif headline reading "The Power of Confidence." with "The Power of" in black italic serif and "Confidence." in oversized deep pink italic serif. Beneath it, add the Japanese subheadline "自分を信じて、もっと輝く私に。" Keep the cover luxurious, feminine, trendy, and polished, like a contemporary Japanese fashion magazine.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished pink-toned fashion magazine cover with a cozy glamorous model and editorial typography, ideal for beauty branding or mock publication covers.

entries.title: Japanese Koinobori Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover photographed in a bright, airy outdoor setting with a pale blue sky and softly blurred modern railing in the background, portrait orientation. The masthead is enormous across the top in elegant soft pink serif letters reading "L'Allure", with small Japanese text above it and a bracketed Japanese subtitle at the top right. The issue information appears on the upper left as a large black "5" with smaller stacked text beside and below it indicating May 2026, No.156, and a May 2026 issue line. The cover features two adult East Asian women standing side by side from about mid-thigh upward, posed like a luxury editorial cover. Their faces are intentionally obscured by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks. Lighting is soft, natural, and flattering, with a refined premium magazine aesthetic.

The woman on the left wears a navy blouse with dramatic koi-scale sleeves in navy, white, and silver, styled with a bow or scarf-like neckline, tucked into a long flowing off-white skirt with a wide waistband. She carries 1 fish-shaped handbag: a navy and cream koi-inspired purse with a round eye detail, scale pattern, tail fin silhouette, gold hardware, and a thin chain strap hanging from her hand. Her hair is dark brown to black, loosely tied in a low messy bun with soft strands framing her face. Her pose is elegant and slightly angled, one hand near her chin.

The woman on the right wears a crisp white blouse with a soft bow-tie or vertical ruffle/placket detail at the front, paired with a striking koi-inspired skirt or dress panel featuring 2 main colors, coral pink and deep blue, with layered fish-scale motifs and a circular eye-like ornament at the waist. She holds 1 structured handbag: a rectangular white bag with coral pink koi face paneling, blue accents, gold hardware, top handles, and a shoulder strap. Her dark hair is tied back in a low ponytail. She stands facing slightly left with relaxed hands and a calm editorial expression implied by pose.

The fashion concept is themed around koi streamers and carp motifs, transforming traditional Japanese koinobori imagery into sophisticated contemporary womenswear. The palette is soft sky blue, blush pink, navy, white, cream, and coral red. Fabrics appear smooth, elegant, and lightly flowing, with printed or embroidered scale patterns. The overall mood is graceful, feminine, seasonal, and upscale, balancing tradition with modern fashion.

Add multiple Japanese cover lines in a realistic editorial layout. On the left side, include 4 grouped text blocks: 1 feature header in red and black about moody carp streamer fashion, 1 smaller blue subhead about inheriting traditional beauty with a fresh elegance balance, 1 black text block about basics and updates for women in their twenties, and 1 blue makeup feature line about translucent early-summer makeup. On the right side, include 3 grouped text blocks: 1 red "Cover Story" heading with larger black Japanese headline text beneath, 1 blue text block about conservative style that shines in fresh greenery, and 1 pink boxed reader gift notice with black Japanese text below about luxury brand new bags and accessories. Near the lower left, place 1 circular pink badge with white and cream Japanese text about a special walking guide supplement. Across the lower center, place a large dramatic Japanese main headline in pink and black serif and brush-style type, spanning most of the width.

Design this as a realistic premium women's fashion magazine cover for L'Allure, themed around koinobori-inspired spring fashion, featuring May 2026. Keep the text predominantly in Japanese, the masthead in large pink serif type, and the composition clean, aspirational, and luxurious.

entries.title: Japanese Fashion Cover with Koinobori Dresses
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A fashion magazine cover styled like a luxurious Japanese women's magazine, photographed in soft natural daylight against a pale blue sky with a faint city skyline blurred in the background. The masthead is huge and elegant across the top, reading Lumiére in oversized soft pink serif lettering, with small Japanese cover text above and around it, plus a small issue marker on the upper right reading "5", "May 2026", and "No.218". Center the cover on exactly 2 young adult Japanese women standing close together from about thigh-up, facing camera in a poised editorial pose, with their faces intentionally obscured by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks. The woman on the left wears a flowing pale blue dress inspired by koinobori carp streamers: high Mandarin-style collar, sleeveless inner dress, long sheer cape panels draping from the shoulders, elaborate layered metallic and satin fish-scale appliqué across the bodice, a large stylized fish eye motif on the chest, more scale detailing and fin-shaped ornamentation at the hip, and a cinched waist with decorative jeweled clasp. Her dark hair is in an elegant updo with loose wisps, and she wears dangling earrings. The woman on the right wears the same design concept in pale pink and white, also with a high collar, translucent cape-like side panels, layered fish-scale bodice, a visible fish eye motif near the waist sash, soft pleated skirt, tassel ornament at the belt, and matching dangling earrings; her dark hair is also swept into a refined updo with a few loose strands. The overall styling is airy, graceful, feminine, and sophisticated, mixing traditional Japanese elegance with modern couture. Use a pastel palette dominated by baby blue, blush pink, white, and subtle gold trim, with bright but diffused lighting and a premium glossy magazine editorial finish. Include visible Japanese cover lines arranged like a real magazine layout: one left-side block introducing the cover girls, one large main headline block across the lower half, one right-side vertical cluster of smaller teaser text, and exactly 2 pale blue circular callout badges on the right side containing Japanese text; the upper badge advertises a special appendix gift set and includes exactly 2 small product images of pouch-like accessories, and the lower badge contains a shopping-plan checklist with exactly 3 checkbox lines. Add a small pink ribbon-like label above the main headline. The composition should feel clean, aspirational, and seasonally themed around Golden Week and koinobori fashion.

entries.title: Deconstructed High-Fashion Collage Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cinematic, high-fashion portrait of a young woman gazing slightly upward with a contemplative expression. The composition blends fine art and multimedia collage-her face subtly layered with delicate architectural blueprints, geometric grids, and technical schematics. The edges dissolve into an expressive burst of charcoal and white paint splashes, creating a deconstructed, artistic frame.

Hyper-realistic orange autumn maple leaves float gently around her hair and neck, adding motion and contrast. She wears a thick, textured brown knit scarf. Lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, with ultra-sharp focus on the eyes and finely detailed, lifelike skin textures. The color palette leans toward muted earth tones, accented by vibrant orange highlights. Shot in an editorial photography style, 8K resolution, crisp and highly detailed.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for a high-fashion portrait that integrates architectural blueprints and multimedia collage elements, featuring dramatic lighting and autumn accents.

entries.title: Luxury Paris Beauty Campaign
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxurious high-fashion beauty campaign photograph in a sunlit Parisian marble bathroom, featuring an elegant woman in a sheer ivory silk robe leaning with folded arms on a polished marble counter. Her dark brown hair is styled in a loose, romantic updo with soft wisps around the neck. The mood is serene, refined, and ultra-premium. On the left, a tall window reveals a softly blurred view of the Eiffel Tower and Paris rooftops in warm morning light. On the right side of the counter sits 1 glass vase filled with white roses and 1 luxury skincare serum bottle with a gold dropper cap, positioned prominently like a prestige product ad. The room includes cream and gray veined marble walls, gold fixtures, a mirror, and glowing wall sconces. Use soft golden natural light, airy highlights, subtle reflections, shallow depth of field, cinematic editorial composition, realistic skin and fabric textures, understated French elegance, beauty advertising aesthetic, photorealistic luxury lifestyle imagery.

entries.title: Royal Blue Couture Group Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxurious editorial fashion portrait of 4 elegant young women posed together in a dark royal-blue baroque interior, styled like a haute couture group photoshoot. The scene is monochromatic in deep sapphire, midnight blue, and silver tones, with heavy velvet drapery, floral arrangements, a classical column, and ornate metallic vessels in the background. All 4 women wear distinct navy and cobalt evening gowns with elaborate embellishment: crystal beading, sequins, embroidered floral appliqué, layered tulle, satin, and sheer lace. The top-left woman has very long black hair and wears a dramatic long-sleeved sheer lace gown with floral embroidery and a fitted corset-like bodice, raising one arm above her head in a regal pose. The top-right woman has long wavy light brown or blonde hair and wears a sleeveless spaghetti-strap satin gown with blue flower appliqués at the bust and waist, seated upright with a poised expression. The bottom-left woman has long straight black hair and wears a structured satin dress with thin straps, jeweled floral ornaments across the bodice and skirt, and a voluminous gathered skirt. The bottom-right woman has long dark hair and wears an off-shoulder sheer glittering gown with translucent embroidered sleeves, leaning forward slightly with one hand near her chin in a soft, contemplative pose. All 4 wear coordinated sapphire gemstone jewelry including earrings, necklaces, and decorative hair accessories. Composition is a tightly framed vertical portrait with layered seated poses, rich fabric pooling across the foreground, soft diffused studio lighting, high detail, glamorous luxury campaign styling, moody shadows, polished skin, and a refined opulent atmosphere.

entries.title: Office Muse Fashion Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished high-fashion magazine cover portrait of a beautiful young office woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling window in a bright modern corporate office, photographed in a refined editorial style. She faces slightly toward the camera with a calm, elegant, confident expression, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She has long dark brown hair styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder. She wears a fitted ribbed mock-neck knit top in deep navy blue with short sleeves and three gold shoulder buttons on the left side, tucked into a high-waisted black pencil skirt with a slim black belt. Her right hand is raised, holding a folded light-colored cleaning cloth against the glass, suggesting a symbolic lifestyle-fashion scene rather than literal cleaning; her left arm rests naturally by her side. Warm daylight streams in from the window, creating soft highlights on her clothing and skin, subtle reflections on the glass, and a luminous cityscape of tall office buildings outside. The interior background is softly blurred, showing a minimalist office with 1 potted plant, 1 desk, and 1 office chair. Compose the image vertically like a premium magazine cover, full body cropped around mid-calf, with the model centered slightly right to leave room for typography on the left. Add elegant editorial cover text in a Japanese fashion-magazine style: a very large serif masthead reading Office Muse across the upper left, with "Office" in white and "Muse" in deep blue; small uppercase text at the top left reading "CITY LIFE / BEAUTY / CAREER"; small issue text at the top right reading "JUNE 2024" and "VOL. 28". Include 5 additional text blocks: 1 Japanese subtitle under the main title, 1 left-column beauty section with the heading "BEAUTY" and Japanese body text, 1 left-column career section with the heading "CAREER" and Japanese body text, 1 large lower-left headline reading "Focus On You" with a short Japanese subline, and 1 lower-right circular callout with the heading "Interview" and Japanese text inside a translucent pale circle. Add 3 small blue rectangular tags near the lower left reading SKINCARE ROUTINE, WORK SMARTER, and MINDFUL LIFE. Overall mood: sophisticated, feminine, aspirational, urban, graceful, professional, luxurious, clean natural light, realistic digital photography with subtle fashion-retouching, premium Japanese magazine cover design.

small uppercase text at the top left reading "city life / beauty / career"; small issue text at the top right reading "june 2024" and "vol. 28". include 5 additional text blocks: 1 japanese subtitle under the main title, 1 left-column beauty section with the heading "beauty" and japanese body text, 1 left-column career section with the heading "career" and japanese body text, 1 large lower-left headline reading "focus on you" with a short japanese subline, and 1 lower-right circular callout with the heading "interview" and japanese text inside a translucent pale circle. add 3 small blue rectangular tags near the lower left reading skincare routine, work smarter, and mindful life. overall mood: sophisticated, feminine, aspirational, urban, graceful, professional, luxurious, clean natural light, realistic digital photography with subtle fashion-retouching, premium japanese magazine cover design. product marketing fashion editorial magazine portrait beauty realistic office city

entries.title: Office Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined Japanese fashion magazine editorial cover set inside a bright modern office corridor, featuring a full-body portrait of a beautiful professional woman walking confidently toward the camera. She wears a sleek monochrome gray office outfit: a fitted ribbed mock-neck short-sleeve knit top with a diagonal shoulder strap detail accented by 4 metallic buttons, a high-waisted gray pencil skirt, and a matching gray belt with a rectangular buckle. She carries a folder and documents in one hand, with the other arm relaxed mid-stride. Her hair is long, dark brown, and styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder, with soft neat bangs. The mood is elegant, mature, feminine, and quietly powerful. The setting is a sophisticated open-plan office with glass meeting rooms on the left, desks and seated coworkers on the right, soft daylight mixed with clean overhead office lighting, subtle indoor plants, and a shallow depth of field that keeps the woman sharply in focus while the background remains softly blurred. Compose the image vertically like a premium magazine cover, with the model centered and occupying most of the frame from head to knees, polished editorial retouching, realistic fabric texture, flattering natural skin tones, and understated luxury styling. Overlay stylish magazine typography in Japanese and English: a large serif headline reading Update across the upper left, smaller Japanese copy above it, a script subtitle reading "The Office Muse," a right-side teaser block with "NEW BASIC, NEW ME.", a left feature block titled "Focus on DETAIL", a mid-left article box titled "My Work Style", a lower-right feature titled "Style Tip", a small right-side box titled "Scene PRESENTATION DAY", a circular callout near the lower left reading "CHECK!", and small footer text with page number 25. Use a luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, clean layout, restrained grayscale palette, editorial balance between text and subject, realistic photography, high detail, soft contrast, and an aspirational office-wear campaign feel.

entries.title: Luxury Fur-Lined Loafer Lifestyle Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, editorial-style lifestyle product photo shot indoors from a low close-up angle, focused on a woman's lower legs and feet as she tries on 1 pair of black leather backless loafers with tan faux-fur lining. One loafer is worn on the right foot and the left foot is bare, hovering just above the textured cream shag rug, while the second matching loafer lies on the rug in the lower left foreground. The shoes have smooth black leather uppers, a rounded almond toe, open mule-style heel, plush brown fur spilling out around the opening, and a small polished gold horsebit hardware detail across the vamp. The model wears cropped medium-blue denim jeans with a raw frayed hem. The setting is a cozy minimalist interior with a cream rug featuring 2 thin irregular black lines, a neutral wall, and a leaning rectangular mirror with a medium wood frame in the upper right background, softly reflecting the rug and part of the scene. Use soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, realistic skin texture, muted beige and black palette, relaxed candid composition, premium fashion catalog mood, high detail, photorealistic.

entries.title: China Southern A380 Takeoff at Pudong
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic aviation photograph of a China Southern Airbus A380 rotating for takeoff at Shanghai Pudong International Airport, captured from the side in a telephoto spotter style. The aircraft is climbing slightly nose-up just above the runway with landing gear still extended, all four engines visible, white fuselage with a deep blue cheatline, large Chinese airline lettering on the forward fuselage, English airline name along the side, and a bright blue tailfin with a red kapok flower logo. Show the airport terminal buildings in the background and a tall air traffic control tower on the right side, under clear daylight with mild haze and realistic airport atmosphere. Include runway edge details, taxiway signs, dry grass foreground, and at least 2 small background aircraft near the terminal, one plausibly resembling an older China Eastern livery. Natural documentary photography, sharp detail, accurate proportions, realistic lighting, 3:2 composition, no illustration styling, no dramatic sunset colors.

entries.title: Luxury Magazine Cover With Featured Book
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic premium magazine cover in the style of an international design and business publication, shot as a sophisticated editorial still life. The cover features a dark, moody interior with shallow depth of field and warm ambient lighting. Center-right, standing upright on a glossy black marble table, is a cream-colored paperback book titled The Pathless Path by Paul Millerd. The book is angled slightly to the left so both the front cover and spine are visible. The cover illustration is minimalist navy-blue line art showing an office interior with an open door leading into a winding outdoor path, framed pictures on the wall, a water cooler, a desk with stacked papers, and a person slumped in an office chair. The author's name appears near the lower left of the front cover, and the title also runs vertically on the spine. To the left of the book on the marble surface is a small stack of 4 books, softly out of focus, and in the lower-left foreground sits 1 dark coffee cup on a saucer. Behind them is a dim, elegant room with blurred shelving and a soft green plant shape in the background. The magazine masthead dominates the top: MONOCLE in very large white serif letters across the width, with small white issue text at top left reading MAY 2024 • ISSUE 167 and small white tagline text at top right reading "THE ENTREPRENEURS' MAGAZINE". Beneath the masthead is a thin rule and a category line in small gold serif text with 6 categories separated by dots: "AFFAIRS • BUSINESS • CULTURE • DESIGN • ENTERTAINING • FASHION". On the left side, large white serif cover headline text reads "Rethinking Success". Below it is a white serif subheadline about leaving the default path behind and building a life and work that matters, followed by a small gold page number. Further down the left column are 4 editorial teaser blocks, each with a gold circular icon and gold uppercase heading, white descriptive text, and a gold page number. The 4 headings are "ESCAPE THE DEFAULT", "WORK WITH PURPOSE", "A NEW STORY", and a boxed teaser "DESIGN SPECIAL". At the bottom right is a realistic barcode block with small pricing text above it and a small issue number beside it. The overall layout should feel like a real luxury magazine cover mockup: crisp typography, elegant serif fonts, black, white, cream, and gold palette, glossy reflections on the marble, cinematic shadows, subtle product reflection beneath the book, and high-end editorial photography styling.
entries.description: This prompt generates a photorealistic premium magazine cover mockup featuring a prominently displayed nonfiction book in an elegant editorial interior, ideal for publishing, branding, or promotional visuals.

entries.title: Futuristic Brand Visual Manual
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a sophisticated multi-page brand visual manual for a company named "Any Brand Name". The overall brand persona should be playful, futuristic, vibrant, and highly designed, striking a balance between "toy-like energy" and the "sophistication of a high-end creative tech brand." The visual style should use bold and experimental brand language, including: high-saturation bright colors, simple geometric shapes, modern typography, dynamic visual rhythm, and slightly surreal image expression. The overall atmosphere should convey: creativity, youthfulness, rhythm, tactile experience, and conceptual avant-garde. The expression needs to integrate the fun of consumer products, the presentation of fashion brands, and the language of contemporary digital design. The brand manual should reflect: extreme focus on product details, diverse visual experimentation, packaging design exploration, editorial style photography, immersive retail experience, and cross-platform brand application. The final presentation should construct a confident, contemporary, unified, and complete brand worldview-both easy to understand and approachable, yet possessing a strong sense of art direction, maintaining high visual consistency while showcasing aesthetic standards at a high-end creative studio level.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for creating a sophisticated brand visual manual that balances toy-like energy with high-end tech aesthetics.

entries.title: Luxury Perfume Editorial Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-end luxury perfume advertisement in a vertical smartphone-friendly editorial layout. Show a close-up, cropped portrait of an elegant woman from the back-left side, with only the lower half of her face and shoulder area visible, her head turned slightly away so her ear, jawline, neck, and shoulder are prominent while the upper face is mostly out of frame. Her hair is styled in a soft, voluminous brunette updo with loose, polished strands. She wears a silky ivory spaghetti-strap slip dress. Her skin is luminous with warm, diffused highlights. In one hand she delicately holds a rectangular glass perfume bottle near her neck and collarbone, fingers graceful and refined. The bottle contains pale golden liquid, has a faceted transparent cap, and a cream square label that reads LUMIÈRE with smaller text below reading "EAU DE PARFUM". Use a minimalist fine-art beauty campaign aesthetic with soft beige, champagne, ivory, and blush tones, bright natural studio lighting, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, crisp glass reflections, and a clean off-white background. Leave generous negative space on the right side for ad copy. Add elegant serif headline text on the right in a muted taupe color, split across 3 lines reading A scent that lingers in silence.. Include a subtle premium fashion-magazine feel, ultra-realistic skin texture, luxury product photography, and polished commercial beauty retouching.

entries.title: Moroccan Restaurant Brand Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image of the couscous dish as the hero food photo, transform it into a polished one-page brand identity board for a Moroccan restaurant named La Casbah. Keep the dish itself recognizable, but integrate it as the main visual in the top-right hero area and build a complete premium branding presentation around it on a warm beige editorial layout with refined Moroccan-inspired styling. Add a top-left brand block with the restaurant name as a large serif logotype, a small geometric emblem above it, and the French tagline "SAVEURS D'AILLEURS, SOURIRES D'ICI." Include a short French brand paragraph and a bold closing sentence beneath. Then create a structured grid brand guide with exactly 9 sections: 1) "LOGO PRINCIPAL" showing the main logo on a light background, 2) "VARIATIONS" with 3 logo variations - one red square version, one green square version, and one circular seal version, 3) "TYPOGRAPHIES" showing 3 text styles - titles, subtitles, and body copy, 4) "PALETTE DE COULEURS" with 6 color swatches labeled Casbah Red, Sahara Sand, Olive Green, Spice Orange, Mint Green, and Charcoal, each with hex codes, 5) "INSPIRATION" with 3 image tiles - Moroccan arch tilework, colorful spices, and fresh mint leaves, 6) "PACKAGING" with 3 mockups - paper takeout bag, food bowl with sleeve, and takeaway coffee cup, 7) "MERCHANDISE" with 3 mockups - apron, tote bag, and cap, 8) "RÉSEAUX SOCIAUX" with 3 social post designs using the food and ingredient imagery plus short French marketing copy, and 9) "VOIX DE LA MARQUE" with 4 brand voice traits and short French descriptions. Add a minimalist quote block on the right reading "BIEN MANGER. SOURIRE. RECOMMENCER." Finish with a full-width deep red footer band containing the logo centered and subtle Moroccan geometric patterns. Overall look: luxury restaurant branding board, clean agency presentation, cohesive Moroccan visual identity, elegant typography, realistic mockups, soft natural textures, editorial spacing.

entries.title: Surreal Cowboy Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal fashion portrait of a mysterious cowboy figure centered in the frame, shot from the chest up against a vivid cobalt-blue daytime sky with a few soft white clouds. The person's face is completely obscured by a tall vertical rectangular blur block running from the forehead past the nose and mouth, creating an anonymous censored identity effect. They wear a glittery red cowboy hat with a pale white crown, a black scarf or bandana wrapped around the neck and lower face, and a bold red western-style jacket or shirt covered in white horse illustrations and floral-patterned motifs. Layer the neck and chest with heavy maximalist jewelry: 1 oversized long pearl strand hanging low, at least 4 shorter pearl necklaces stacked at the collar, and 1 ornate gold statement necklace with coin-like dangling elements. Place 2 pale pink horse heads behind the figure's shoulders, one on the left and one on the right, facing slightly outward like surreal companions or sculptural props. In the lower background, include 2 red sports cars partially visible, one on each side, blending into a red desert-like horizon. Use a dreamy retro-futurist western aesthetic with glossy textures, soft focus, slight chromatic aberration, and a lo-fi editorial look. Symmetrical composition, centered subject, saturated colors, strange luxurious mood, high-fashion surrealism, cinematic portrait photography.
entries.description: This prompt generates a stylized surreal western fashion portrait with anonymous censoring, pink horses, layered pearls, and red sports cars for editorial or concept-art use.

entries.title: Japanese Aqua Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover illustration in elegant contemporary editorial style, vertical full-page composition. The cover title is a huge teal serif masthead reading "AURA" across the top. In the upper right, include 4 stacked issue details: "6", "June 2025", "No.126", and a small boxed label "アウラ", followed by the price line "特別定価 ¥980". The background is a bright pale blue sky with soft white clouds. Center the portrait of an androgynous, ethereal young model, shown from chest up, wearing a crisp white tailored jacket with subtle gold piping, a white shirt, a vivid aqua-teal vest or tie layer, and a gemstone-like star brooch at the collar. The character has very long, layered, windswept hair in icy white with pale aqua tint, with glossy strands flowing across the shoulders, and fair luminous skin. The face is largely obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in muted gray-blue to pale pink gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and upper cheeks; the visible lower face shows a soft mouth and refined chin. One hand is raised near the lips in a thoughtful fashion-portrait pose. Use delicate anime-inspired linework, airy lighting, translucent highlights, and luxury beauty-editorial rendering. Add 3 left-column cover blurbs in Japanese with teal headlines and smaller black body text: first, "透明感をまとう 初夏のスキンケア" with 2 smaller lines beneath; second, "好印象をつくる 爽やかカラー術" with 2 smaller lines beneath; third, "プロが教える 美しい髪の条件" with 2 smaller lines beneath. Add a teal circular badge on the right with 4 lines of white text: "Special Interview", "風と光と、", "自分らしさと。", and "ソラが語る 日常と美学". Near the lower center, place a small italic English line "Cover & Special Feature" above the large Japanese main headline "ソラ、という名の透明感。" with the first word in teal and the rest in black. Under that, add 2 lines of smaller Japanese subheadline text. Along the bottom edge, create 3 feature teasers with pale italic English category labels and Japanese copy beneath: left label "Fashion", center label "Beauty", right label "Trend", each with 2 short Japanese lines. Overall mood: serene, luxurious, airy, refreshing early-summer beauty fashion cover with cohesive aqua-and-white color design.
entries.description: This prompt generates a refined anime-style Japanese beauty and fashion magazine cover, useful for editorial mockups, character branding, and cross-media visual identity.

entries.title: Luxury Perfume Splash Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a luxury cinematic fragrance advertisement for a dark glass men's perfume bottle labeled DIOR and SAUVAGE. The composition is a widescreen premium product shot with the bottle placed slightly right of center, standing upright on a glossy wet black surface, angled subtly toward the viewer. The bottle is deep smoky navy-black transparent glass with a reflective metallic cap featuring circular ridges, elegant serif lettering on the front, and warm amber light glowing through the base. Surround the bottle with one dramatic splash of liquid frozen in motion, with countless sparkling golden droplets and streaks exploding upward and outward around the lower half of the bottle. Use a dark, moody, high-contrast background with a blurred rocky or citylike silhouette and glowing sunset light in the distance, dominated by black, bronze, amber, and gold tones. On the left side, add refined luxury ad typography in a spacious layout: a large serif headline reading SAUVAGE, a smaller serif brand line below reading DIOR, one thin horizontal divider line beneath, and a small uppercase sans-serif tagline reading THE POWER OF INSTINCT. Add a minimalist luxury monogram mark near the lower left. Emphasize glossy reflections, sharp bottle edges, realistic liquid physics, sparkling highlights, cinematic backlighting, shallow depth of field, and premium high-end beauty campaign styling.
entries.description: A high-end cinematic fragrance advertisement featuring a dark perfume bottle, golden water splash effects, and elegant editorial typography for premium e-commerce or brand campaigns.

entries.title: Low-Angle Redhead Cargo Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic fashion-photo style full-body cropped portrait of a young woman shot from a dramatic low angle against a bright blue sky with 2 soft white cloud patches. She is turned mostly away from the camera in a three-quarter back view, looking over her shoulder, with long wavy auburn red hair falling to mid-back and moving naturally in the breeze. She wears a fitted black ribbed long-sleeve crop top that exposes the waist, olive green cargo pants with a low-rise fit, 5 visible belt-mounted utility pouches around the waistband, 2 visible back flap pockets, and 1 visible side cargo pocket on the left thigh. She also wears a pair of glossy black leather gloves, with one gloved hand raised near her neck and jaw and the other lowered near her thigh. Emphasize a cinematic, confident pose, natural daylight, realistic skin texture, detailed fabric stitching and seams, slightly sensual editorial styling, clean outdoor background, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the body and clothing, high-resolution photorealism.
entries.description: This prompt generates a photorealistic low-angle outdoor fashion portrait of a red-haired woman in a black crop top, gloves, and tactical cargo pants, useful for editorial or character-style image creation.

entries.title: Luxury Leather Fashion Collage Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxury fashion editorial ad collage for LOEWE, shot in a moody high-end magazine style. Center a seated young woman wearing an oversized black leather coat and black leather gloves, posed slightly forward with crossed arms and tousled dark hair blowing in the wind. Her face is mostly obscured and de-emphasized, creating an anonymous editorial feel. She holds or rests a black leather handbag with a gold chain and a dangling gold anagram charm. Place the large white serif wordmark LOEWE prominently across the center of the image, overlapping the model. Build the background as a dramatic outdoor scene at dusk with a cloudy sky, rocky ground, and a sculptural stacked stone pedestal on the left topped with a large gold abstract monogram ornament. Compose the whole image as a torn-paper mixed-media collage with exactly 5 visible material fragments surrounding the main figure: 1 black embossed leather swatch at bottom left, 1 warm brown leather swatch with embossed logo at lower left foreground, 1 cream woven fabric swatch at bottom right, 1 dark olive textured torn-paper panel on the right side, and 1 small beige leather swatch layered over the right side panel. Use a muted earthy palette of black, charcoal, bronze, cream, brown, and stormy blue-gray, with cinematic lighting, rich texture detail, premium product-photography finish, and a refined surreal luxury campaign aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium editorial-style fashion advertisement collage for a luxury leather brand, ideal for campaign visuals, social ads, and magazine-inspired marketing.
