entries.title: Luxury Leather Fashion Collage Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-fashion luxury editorial advertisement in a vertical format, featuring a mysterious female model from mid-torso up, centered and slightly turned to the side, wearing an oversized dark olive leather jacket with a high collar and prominent buckle strap detail near the neck. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while her dark wavy shoulder-length hair remains visible and voluminous. She carries a slouchy black leather shoulder bag with a gold chain strap and a small gold logo near the bottom corner. Place the large serif brand name LOEWE across the center in elegant white uppercase letters, overlaying the figure. Build the entire composition as a tactile collage made of torn and layered fabric and leather swatches: exactly 8 visible material fragments surrounding and partially overlapping the subject, including beige linen at the top left, olive stitched leather panels on the left, soft beige fabric at the lower left edge, dark brown embossed leather with a monogram motif at the upper right, rocky coastline photography at the right and lower right, a textured taupe stitched textile across the lower center, a dark denim-like fragment at the lower left, and a deep brown leather panel at the bottom right. In the background, reveal a dramatic coastal landscape with rocks, ocean waves, and a moody cloudy sky lit like late afternoon or sunset. Use rich earthy tones, muted olive, dark brown, taupe, black, and warm highlights. The overall look should feel premium, cinematic, moody, artisanal, and minimalist, like a luxury fashion campaign combining leather craftsmanship, collage art direction, and editorial photography.
entries.description: This prompt generates a moody luxury fashion advertisement with a leather-clad model, handbag, torn material collage layers, and premium brand-editorial styling for social ads or campaign visuals.

entries.searchText: luxury leather fashion collage ad this prompt generates a moody luxury fashion advertisement with a leather-clad model, handbag, torn material collage layers, and premium brand-editorial styling for social ads or campaign visuals. a high-fashion luxury editorial advertisement in a vertical format, featuring a mysterious female model from mid-torso up, centered and slightly turned to the side, wearing an oversized dark olive leather jacket with a high collar and prominent buckle strap detail near the neck. her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while her dark wavy shoulder-length hair remains visible and voluminous. she carries a slouchy black leather shoulder bag with a gold chain strap and a small gold logo near the bottom corner. place the large serif brand name loewe across the center in elegant white uppercase letters, overlaying the figure. build the entire composition as a tactile collage made of torn and layered fabric and leather swatches: exactly 8 visible material fragments surrounding and partially overlapping the subject, including beige linen at the top left, olive stitched leather panels on the left, soft beige fabric at the lower left edge, dark brown embossed leather with a monogram motif at the upper right, rocky coastline photography at the right and lower right, a textured taupe stitched textile across the lower center, a dark denim-like fragment at the lower left, and a deep brown leather panel at the bottom right. in the background, reveal a dramatic coastal landscape with rocks, ocean waves, and a moody cloudy sky lit like late afternoon or sunset. use rich earthy tones, muted olive, dark brown, taupe, black, and warm highlights. the overall look should feel premium, cinematic, moody, artisanal, and minimalist, like a luxury fashion campaign combining leather craftsmanship, collage art direction, and editorial photography. product marketing fashion editorial cinematic

entries.title: Luxury Handbag Sunset Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Luxury fashion advertisement, vertical editorial product ad shot at golden hour on a high-rise balcony overlooking a modern city skyline at sunset. A stylish woman stands in a confident three-quarter pose, framed from mid-thigh up, with her face obscured by a simple rectangular block matching warm brown-orange tones. She has long, softly wavy brunette hair lit by warm backlight from the setting sun. She wears a black tailored blazer over a fitted white scoop-neck ribbed top and high-waisted light beige trousers, with one hand in her pocket and the other holding a structured taupe leather handbag with a top handle, flap closure, polished gold clasp hardware, and a hanging leather tag. The bag is the visual hero and should look premium, elegant, and sharply detailed. Use cinematic warm lighting, soft rim light on the hair, subtle luxury color grading, shallow depth of field, and blurred skyscrapers in the background. Compose the layout like a premium brand campaign with large text and icons on the left side. At top left, place a refined serif monogram logo: L. Below it, large white serif headline text stacked in uppercase: CARRY CONFIDENCE. EVERYDAY.. Beneath that, add a short white serif body copy in 4 lines: Timeless design. Effortless elegance. Made for every moment that moves you forward.. Add exactly 3 circular line icons with labels arranged vertically: premium leather, timeless design, made to last. At the bottom left, place the brand name in large elegant serif capitals: LUMIÈRE, with smaller uppercase tagline below: BAGS THAT DEFINE YOU.. Add a bordered call-to-action button reading "SHOP THE COLLECTION" with a small right arrow. Overall style: upscale, aspirational, polished e-commerce campaign, photorealistic fashion ad, luxurious but modern, clean typography, balanced negative space, magazine-quality composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished vertical luxury fashion advertisement for a premium handbag brand, ideal for e-commerce campaigns and social media ads.

entries.title: Minimal Slot Machine Attribution Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean minimalist static ad on an off-white light gray studio background with a centered editorial layout. At the top, place a large luxury-fashion-style serif headline in black reading Stop gambling with your ad spend., with the word "gambling" set in italic serif for emphasis. In the middle, show a vintage metal slot-machine window viewed straight on, slightly weathered and realistic, with 3 vertical reels inside a rectangular steel housing and a lever with a black knob on the right side. The 3 reels must display, from left to right, "$", "$", and "?". Make the rightmost reel background pale pink while the first 2 reels are aged white. Add a hand-drawn neon-pink annotation style over the image: 1 arrow-and-note on the left pointing to the first reel reading your attribution, 1 starburst scribble above the pink question-mark reel, 1 arrow from the question-mark reel to a circled note on the right reading actual revenue, and 1 large curved arrow in the lower left pointing toward the body copy area. Below the slot machine, center a short sans-serif paragraph in black reading See which campaigns drive revenue, not just clicks. Connect Meta, Google, and Stripe in 60 seconds.. At the bottom center, place a simple black analytics-style bar logo icon followed by the bold sans-serif brand name Humblytics. Use strong text fidelity, polished product-ad composition, soft studio shadows, restrained palette of black, steel gray, off-white, and hot pink, and a modern direct-response ad aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished static marketing ad with a vintage slot machine metaphor, handwritten annotations, and strong centered typography for analytics or attribution software promotions.

entries.title: Minimalist AI Fashion Comparison Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist fashion moodboard on a pale sage green background, laid out as a wide horizontal comparison sheet with four portrait panels of young male models wearing oversized white sports T-shirts. Use a soft editorial studio look with cool periwinkle-blue backdrops inside the portrait frames, subtle film grain, muted contrast, and a highly consistent color palette of sage green, cyan trim, off-white, deep shadow, and blue-lavender. On the far left, include 1 large cropped reference portrait that is partially cut off by the canvas edge, showing the left side of a dark-skinned male model's shaved or closely buzzed head, ear, jawline, neck, and shoulder in profile, wearing a white shirt with a bright aqua ribbed collar; place 2 overlapping semi-opaque rectangular blocks over the face area, creating a graphic censorship/collage effect. To the right, place 3 rounded-corner portrait cards in a row, evenly spaced, each featuring a different young male model from the chest up against the same blue studio background: card 1 shows a light- to medium-skinned man with short slicked-back dark hair, facing slightly left, wearing a white athletic shirt with aqua collar trim and a small Nike swoosh on the lower right chest; card 2 shows a light-skinned man with medium dark hair swept back, turned three-quarters left, wearing a white Nike shirt with a black swoosh centered on the chest; card 3 shows a dark-skinned man with a short fade haircut, turned three-quarters right, wearing a white Adidas shirt with a cyan Adidas logo centered on the chest and a small hoop or cross earring. Add 3 face-obscuring gradient rectangles, one over each smaller portrait face, in dark green fading to gray-green, aligned vertically like graphic overlays. Include 2 thin horizontal divider lines across the full composition, one near the top and one near the lower third, in a slightly lighter sage tone. At the bottom, add small uppercase monospaced editorial text: near the lower center-left write "MJ REFERENCE" and near the lower right write "KREA // GPT 2". The overall image should feel like a premium AI-fashion comparison board, graphic design presentation, or concept consistency sheet, with clean spacing, flat background, and polished art-direction.
entries.description: A clean editorial comparison layout showing four stylized male portrait panels with sportswear branding, useful for moodboards, AI concept consistency presentations, and fashion aesthetic studies.

entries.title: Monochrome Tennis Streetwear Moodboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean editorial fashion concept board on a pale powder-blue background with a minimalist green monochrome palette, combining 4 full-body lifestyle photos of the same youth streetwear tennis-inspired character arranged in a horizontal layout. On the far left, a tall vertical photo panel partially overlaps the background, showing a standing model in an oversized light gray-blue Nike windbreaker, mint green shorts, white crew socks, and white sneakers, holding a white tennis racket at their side and a small mint towel or accessory in the other hand. The character's head is replaced by a large white doodle coffee-cup face icon with a smiling expression and ruler-like tick marks across the top rim. To the right are 3 rounded-rectangle photo panels, evenly spaced. In panel 1, the model sits in a folding chair reading a magazine and holding a green mug, with a dark Nike duffel bag on the floor and a few scattered cups nearby; the white doodle cup head has 2 steam squiggles rising above it. In panel 2, the model stands beside a pyramid made of approximately 28 stacked green and white paper cups, one arm resting on the top; they wear a soft green Nike T-shirt and shorts set, white socks, and white sneakers; a small white typographic logo in the upper left reads like a cafe or service-court brand mark. The doodle cup head here is a simple smiling cup with a wide rim. In panel 3, the model leans casually with crossed legs, holding a green cup, next to a small wire cart containing green tennis balls and topped with a retro CRT television; they wear a white polo shirt, mint shorts, white socks, and white sneakers. The doodle cup head in this panel has horizontal stripe bands across the top. Keep all faces fully replaced by the graphic cup icons, with no real facial features visible. Use a soft studio setup, flat even lighting, subtle shadows, matte textures, and a highly consistent mint, sage, olive, and white color story. Add thin white horizontal guide lines across the blue background near the top and bottom. Place small gray editorial footer text at the bottom: on the left, "MJ REFERENCE"; on the right, "KREA // GPT 2". Overall style: premium streetwear campaign moodboard, playful surreal branding, minimalist graphic design, polished commercial photography, high consistency across all 4 looks.

entries.title: Three Beauty Mobile Landing Pages
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished promotional mockup showing 3 tall smartphone screens displayed side by side in a vertical triptych layout, each presenting a modern beauty brand landing page for a lip product. The overall composition is editorial, minimal, and premium, designed like a social media showcase of mobile web designs. The left panel sits on a soft lavender-to-blush gradient background and shows a black-framed phone with a cream and blush beauty website for Kosas. At the top of this panel, small elegant serif text reads Fresh Pout.. The phone screen features a cropped close-up beauty image at the top, a bold headline reading "Lips in their fullest expression." with "fullest" in italic serif styling, a rounded dark call-to-action button, a strip of 3 lip close-up thumbnails, 3 labeled benefit tabs reading "Plumps," "Tingles," and "Shines," and a row of 5 shade or effect icons underneath. The middle panel sits on a lavender-to-deep-violet gradient background and shows a second black-framed phone with a more typographic landing page. Above it, serif text reads Claude Code. The screen includes a cropped portrait image at top, a very large bold black stacked title reading "LIP PULSE." with a pink italic script-style line "is here." beneath it, a rounded dark button, a dark section with the phrase "Lips in their fullest expression.", and a product grid near the bottom containing 6 shade cards arranged in 2 rows of 3. The right panel sits on a dark navy textured background and shows a third black-framed phone with a pink-forward e-commerce style page. Centered above it, monospaced white text reads GPT Images 2.0. This screen prominently displays the product hero section with the brand name "Kosas," a large title "The Lip Pulse," a pink lip gloss tube angled to the right, small feature icons, a shade strip of 6 lip swatches near the middle, and a lower promotional block with additional pink product imagery. Keep the layout symmetrical with exactly 3 phones, one per panel, each fully visible and vertically oriented. Use high-end cosmetic campaign aesthetics, clean spacing, fashion-web typography mixing serif and bold sans serif, soft pink and cream UI palettes, subtle shadows, and a sleek product-design presentation suitable for showcasing AI-generated mobile website concepts.
entries.description: A premium triptych mockup of three smartphone beauty website designs, ideal for showcasing AI-generated cosmetic brand landing page concepts on social media.

entries.title: Luxury Fashion Book Spread
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-end editorial fashion photograph shown as an open large-format hardcover magazine or art book lying flat on a clean off-white surface, viewed from directly above. The two-page spread contains 2 full-page portraits of the same elegant woman with her face obscured by a soft square blur, creating a privacy-censored look. On the left page, she stands against a pale stone or concrete architectural wall wearing a structured long-sleeve dress in soft slate gray, with a fitted bodice, round neckline, sharply tailored seams, and an exaggerated sculptural bell-shaped skirt; the camera angle is slightly low, making her neck appear long and her posture statuesque. On the right page, she is photographed from the back in a dramatic black evening gown with a very deep open back, wide shoulder straps, and a voluminous full skirt, standing in front of a classic paneled wall or door in a dim, moody interior. Use luxury fashion magazine styling, minimal composition, muted tones, soft natural-looking light, refined shadows, realistic paper texture, visible book gutter, slightly curved pages, and crisp print detail. The overall mood is sophisticated, couture, cinematic, and understated, like a premium fashion editorial spread.

entries.title: Retro Sci-Fi Newspaper Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a monochrome retro sci-fi broadsheet newspaper front page for a fictional space game, titled The Gradient News & Observer, with dense editorial layout, distressed ink texture, engraved line art, and mock classified-news typography.

Canvas: Tall vertical newspaper page, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, off-white paper background, black ink only, slightly aged print texture, thin decorative borders, tiny registration marks, halftone dots, honeycomb grid motifs, technical diagram ornaments, and vintage newspaper engraving style.

Masthead: At the very top, a large ornate banner with the title "THE GRADIENT NEWS & OBSERVER" in bold decorative serif lettering. Under it, a ribbon slogan reads "ALL THE NEWS THE VOID ALLOWS." Add small sci-fi ornaments: a planet landscape vignette on the left, a satellite dish on the right, star-map nodes, filigree curls, and rules. Beneath the masthead, include an edition strip reading "FRONT-PAGE EDITION - TWELVE HOURS ENDING 2026-05-15 19:17 UTC."

Layout: Use exactly 10 bordered article panels beneath the masthead. Arrange them as: 2 large lead stories across the upper half, 5 narrow vertical story cards in the middle row, and 3 wider panels in the bottom row. Every panel should have its own small category tag, bold condensed all-caps headline, columns of tiny readable-looking body text, decorative dividers, and one or more black-and-white sci-fi illustrations.

Article count and visible content:
1. Large upper-left lead article, category "COMBAT WIRE," headline: "IZMIR YBEL STACKS OFFENSIVE GARRISONS IN CONTESTED BORDERLANDS; DOGTOWN PROBE LOST IN TWIN SKIRMISHES." Include a huge hovering fortress or orbital platform above an industrial city gate, with roads receding toward it.
2. Large upper-right lead article, category "OPEN CHANNEL," headline: "DISTRESS CALL FROM DEEP SECTOR DRAWS VOLUNTEER RESCUE OFFER." Include a deep-space station, a rescue ship, asteroid debris, and a bright explosion or distress flare.
3. Middle-row first narrow card, category "FRONTIER JUSTICE," headline: "THE CONSPICUOUS PILOT JOE CHRISTMAS HOLDS THE OPEN CHANNEL." Include a skull-and-wings emblem, a small spacecraft, a planetary horizon, and a tiny monitor graphic.
4. Middle-row second narrow card, category "SHIPYARD," headline: "EIGHT KESTRELS OFF THE LOT IN A SINGLE HALF-DAY." Include a crashed or parked angular ship on rocky ground.
5. Middle-row third narrow card, category "CARTOGRAPHY," headline: "P-1 LOGS 703 SECTOR HOPS ACROSS THE HALF-DAY." Include a small explorer craft flying above a hex-map planet surface.
6. Middle-row fourth narrow card, category "PUBLIC AFFAIRS," headline: "PILOT FILES OPEN-CHANNEL BUG REPORT ON MOBILE CLIENT." Include exactly 3 stacked numbered ship/profile rows labeled "1 AZURE HAULER," "2 CHARTREUSE HAULER," and "3 JADE HAULER."
7. Middle-row fifth narrow card, category "CORPORATE AFFAIRS," headline: "EIGHT NEW CORPORATIONS CHARTERED IN TWELVE HOURS." Include small spacecraft thumbnails and industrial silhouettes.
8. Bottom-left wide panel, category "MARKET UPDATE," headline: "MARKET UPDATE - TWELVE-HOUR GALACTIC INDEX." Include a table with columns such as "MEASURE," "VALUE," "TOP OF THE BOARDS," "PILOT," and "SCORE," plus a small bar/line chart and a long cargo ship illustration.
9. Bottom-middle panel, category "OPEN-CHANNEL CONFIDENTIAL," headline: "TWO NAMES, ONE ENDORSEMENT, ELEVEN SECONDS APART." Include a badge-like pilot emblem and a round capsule or pod drifting in space.
10. Bottom-right panel, category "THE MEGA-PORT SET," headline: "THE MEGA-PORT SET FILES AN RSVP." Include a uniformed captain portrait in the upper right, a star-network diagram, and a sleek landed spacecraft.

Visual style: 19th-century newspaper meets dieselpunk space opera; dense black ink crosshatching, stipple shading, halftone screens, fine technical linework, distressed letterpress, narrow gutters, ornate corner brackets, and bold condensed headline fonts. Make the page feel authentic, busy, collectible, and slightly humorous, like an in-universe gazette.

Constraints: Use only black, gray, and off-white. Keep all 10 panels visible and separated. No modern glossy color, no photorealism, no watermark, no extra panels. Body text may be tiny pseudo-newspaper copy but headlines and main masthead must be legible. Maintain the fictional sci-fi newspaper theme and the exact masthead slogan.

entries.title: Celestial Gacha Angel Character
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a full-body vertical character concept illustration of an elegant futuristic Chinese gacha-game style celestial nun or angel named Luna, standing front-facing in a perfectly centered symmetrical pose on a pale reflective floor. She has extremely long flowing silvery white with faint lavender-blue highlights hair cascading past her knees, a luminous thin halo above her head, and a soft blank pale-lavender square obscuring the face area instead of visible facial features. Her outfit is a layered white ceremonial dress with translucent veils, sheer cape panels, crystalline fabric, a fitted bodice, long detached sleeves, high collar with black inner chest panel, silver cross-like ornaments, thin dark belt, tiny red accent ribbons, and white high-heeled boots. The dress and veil should contain delicate glowing constellation-line patterns, star sparkles, prismatic refractions, and pale violet-blue magical light, with fabric edges drawn as transparent glassy polygons. Use a very bright ethereal palette of white, ice blue, pale lavender, silver, and tiny red accents. The background is a minimal sacred sci-fi temple interface: soft white walls, faint circular halo diagrams behind the head, thin vertical guide lines, tiny decorative symbols, and subtle Chinese-style side inscriptions reading 彼岸代光 on both left and right. Style: high-end anime mobile RPG character key art, intricate but airy linework, luminous fantasy fashion design, delicate gradients, glossy reflection under the feet, soft bloom lighting, clean composition, no extra characters, no weapons, no logo, no watermark.

entries.title: Monochrome Mountain Warrior Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white wide portrait of a tattooed dark fantasy warrior-priest standing on a rugged mountain ridge, centered in frame, arms extended outward in a commanding ritual pose. The figure has messy dark hair, a deliberately obscured blurred square over the face, bare tattooed chest, and an intense mythic presence. Costume details: exactly 6 prominent outfit components are visible: 1 heavy black velvet cloak draped over the left shoulder and arm with ornate trim, 1 polished crescent-shaped metal chest plate with round studs and chain details, 1 dark layered skirt or kilt, 1 wide belt with circular metal medallions, 1 hanging central pendant ornament, and 1 set of arm tattoos covering both forearms. The left hand is open and expressive, the right hand loosely holds a thin dangling cord or chain. Place the character outdoors on a steep rocky hillside with a jagged mountain slope rising on the right, a distant valley and horizon on the left, and a sky with exactly 3 small soft clouds. Use high-contrast monochrome cinematic photography, gritty film grain, shallow depth of field, dramatic natural sunlight glinting on the metal armor, strong texture in the cloak, atmospheric haze in the valley, and a widescreen 16:9 composition. Mood: epic, mysterious, occult, fashion-editorial fantasy. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.

entries.title: Crystal-Smoke Architect Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a gritty sci-fi character design sheet for NOA VALE, a team leader and crystal-smoke architect in a post-apocalyptic tactical faction. The sheet should look like a high-end concept art board for a film or game trailer, with dense technical callouts, worn paper texture, and dark industrial fantasy styling.

Canvas: Vertical 4:3 character sheet, weathered gray parchment background with black smoke, ink splatter edges, thin white grid lines, and small technical typography. Overall palette is charcoal black, gunmetal, tarnished bronze, bone gray, smoky white, and cold blue light accents.

Main character: A tall athletic female warrior, age 23, with short messy black hair shaved on one side, cyberpunk undercut silhouette, face deliberately obscured by a soft rectangular blur/censor block. She wears an asymmetrical black leather and metal tactical outfit: cropped armored top, exposed midriff with straps and buckles, fitted pants, high-heeled armored combat boots, layered belts, chain details, fingerless gloves, segmented arm armor, spiked shoulder pieces, and a long shredded black coat or cloak made of dangling strips. A heavy mechanical jetpack / crystal-smoke apparatus is mounted on her back, with small blue exhaust glow. Pose is confident, standing slightly turned with one hand relaxed and the other near her weapon.

Left information column: Large title text "NOA VALE". Subtitle: "TEAM LEADER // CRYSTAL-SMOKE ARCHITECT". Quote: "I don't break the city. I give it shape.". Include labeled data blocks: Role: "CRYSTAL-SMOKE ARCHITECT / OFFENSIVE TACTICIAN"; Affiliation: "NO FACTION - SLUMS COALITION"; Status: "ACTIVE"; Height: "5'6" / 168 cm"; Weight: "121 lb / 55 kg"; Age: "23"; a compact biography paragraph; a sharp abstract faction emblem; a handwritten signature; and two vertical red stamp-like marks.

Layout and counted elements: Include exactly 5 full-body views across the upper half: 1 large hero full-body view on the left, plus 4 smaller orthographic views across the top labeled Front, Side, Back, and 3/4 View. Include exactly 1 close-up portrait panel beneath the orthographic row, again with the face obscured by a rectangular blur. Include exactly 4 crystal-smoke ability panels in a 2x2 grid labeled Barrier Wall, Lattice Cage, Elevated Path, and Deflector Array, each showing a tiny black silhouette interacting with luminous white crystalline wireframe structures and smoky particles.

Lower technical panels: Include exactly 4 footwear views labeled Front, Side, Back, and Sole, showing the same armored high-heeled boot. Include exactly 1 long weapon panel labeled "WEAPON: CRYSTAL-WRITE KIT", showing a modular staff/rifle-like implement with two modes. Include exactly 6 weapon breakdown components labeled Frame Rail, Energy Conduit, Crystal Cartridge, Stabilizer Fin, Grip Module, and Safety Latch. Include exactly 7 accessories and gear items labeled Crystal Chamber, Smoke Filter, Utility Pouch, Data Slate, Line Spool, Folding Hook, and Scrap Key. Include exactly 5 jetpack / propulsion system detail panels labeled Jetpack Overview, Thruster Detail, Harness & Attachment, Fuel Cell, and Vector Nozzles.

Outfit and material detail strip: Add close-up panels of layered leather straps, buckles, metal plating, cybernetic ear implant, neck/shoulder armor, wrist projector, and mechanical gauntlet. Make the materials visibly worn, scratched, riveted, oily, and handmade rather than clean futuristic.

Bottom reference strip: Include a notes box with short bullet-like production notes; a color palette containing exactly 8 vertical swatches from black to graphite, brown leather, gray metal, parchment beige, smoky white, and pale blue; a material / finish guide containing exactly 6 rectangular samples labeled Worn Leather, Oiled Canvas, Carbon Fiber, Scratched Metal, Crystal Glass, and Mesh Fabric; and a team context panel on the bottom right showing exactly 3 small figures walking together through a ruined vertical cityscape.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed dark cinematic concept art, realistic anatomy, tactical cyberpunk, post-apocalyptic fashion design, precise industrial callouts, Japanese game artbook layout energy, monochrome smoky atmosphere with icy blue glow accents. Text should be small but arranged like a professional production design sheet. No clean white background, no cute style, no bright saturated colors, no extra characters beyond the counted team context silhouettes.
entries.description: A dense cinematic sci-fi character design sheet for a cyberpunk warrior with orthographic views, abilities, gear, materials, and technical callouts.

entries.title: Kai Ren Sci-Fi Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a dense dark sci-fi character concept sheet for KAI REN, a post-apocalyptic smoke-trace swordsman and tactical team leader, with a gritty AAA game art-book presentation.

Canvas: Portrait-oriented character design board on a weathered gray concrete-paper background, roughly 4:5 aspect ratio. Use charcoal black, gunmetal, ash gray, oxidized brown, and muted steel tones. Add rain, dust, scratches, ink splatter, technical grid lines, thin white divider lines, and small dossier typography.

Main layout: Place one dominant full-body hero illustration on the left, occupying about 45% of the canvas height and most of the left column. The character stands facing forward in a relaxed but dangerous stance, wearing layered black tactical rags, armored leather plates, strapped belts, heavy boots, gloves, scarf, hood-like collar, dangling shredded coat panels, and a bulky cylindrical jetpack or propulsion backpack. Hair is messy black and spiked. The face should be obscured or shadowed. Include a long smoke-trace blade or sheathed weapon integrated into the gear. Behind the hero figure, add a large black circular brushstroke halo.

Left dossier text: At the top left write the name KAI REN. Under it add the role line "TEAM LEADER / SMOKE-TRACE SWORDSMAN". Include two quotes: I read the smoke. and I cut the path.. Add small dossier fields: Role: Team Leader / Tactician / Pathfinder; Affiliation: No Faction - Slums Coalition; Status: Active; Height: 6'0" / 183 cm; Weight: 72 kg / 159 lbs; Age: 24; Profile: a short paragraph describing him as born in the lower tiers of Yor City, surviving by reading the city's smoke currents, a fighter and pathfinder who leads with ruthless instinct and unstable loyalty. Add a simple angular faction emblem and signature-like marks below.

Top row body views: Across the upper center and right, include exactly 4 smaller full-body views labeled "FRONT", "SIDE", "BACK", and "3/4 VIEW". Show the same outfit from each angle, emphasizing the layered armor, ragged coat strips, backpack tanks, straps, boots, and silhouette.

Middle panels: Create a rectangular "CLOSE-UP PORTRAIT" panel showing the head and upper torso with messy black hair, scarf, armor straps, ear device, and shadowed/obscured face. Next to it create a "SMOKE-TRACE ABILITIES" section with exactly 6 illustrated ability cards in a 2-column by 3-row grid. Label the six cards: "SMOKE SENSE", "PATH REVEAL", "AIR SLICE", "TRACE CUT", "SMOKE STEP", and "SMOKE LINE". Each card should show a small cinematic action scene of the character moving through a dark rainy city or battlefield while luminous white smoke trails, arcs, map-like paths, or slicing lines swirl around him.

Equipment and detail panels: Add exactly 6 outfit and material close-up strips labeled "MAIN FABRIC", "SCARF ARMOR", "HARNESS STRAPS", "JETPACK BACKPLATE", "UTILITY POUCHES", and "EDGE STITCHING". Add a "CYBERNETIC & INTERFACE" panel with exactly 4 close-ups labeled "NECK IMPLANT", "TEMPORAL NODE", "HUD PROJECTOR", and "ARMS IMPLANT". Add a "FOOTWEAR" panel with exactly 4 boot views labeled "FRONT", "SIDE", "BACK", and "SOLE". Add a "JETPACK / PROPULSION PACK" panel showing front and rear technical views with callout labels for compact thrusters, fuel cell, vector nozzles, stabilizer fins, and harness system. Add a "WEAPON: SMOKE-TRACE BLADE" panel showing a modular long blade and exactly 5 separated components labeled "MONO BLADE CUSTOM", "POWER COIL", "SCABBARD", "SMOKE LINE", and "CORE MODULE". Add an "ACCESSORIES & GEAR" row with exactly 7 objects labeled "SMOKE BEACON", "CLIMBING HOOK", "PULSE DARTS", "RECON DRONE", "DATA CHIP", "SURVIVAL KIT", and "WATER FILTER". Add a "SILHOUETTE & MOVEMENT WITH JETPACK" panel containing exactly 4 dynamic flying or leaping silhouettes with smoky trails.

Bottom strip: Include a small "NOTES" box with several concise bullet notes about growing up in the Ash Rungs, survival by reading the wind, weapons hidden in the blade and paracord, valuing freedom and loyalty, and leading with intellect before violence. Include a "COLOR PALETTE" with exactly 8 vertical swatches: near-black, charcoal, dark slate, worn brown, rust leather, pale ash gray, cold gray-blue, and deep navy-black. Include a "MATERIAL / FINISH GUIDE" with exactly 7 texture swatches labeled "BURNT LEATHER", "OILED CANVAS", "CARBON TEXTURE", "METAL WEAR", "REACTIVE CLOTH", "REINFORCED COMPOSITE", and "SMOKE WEAVE". At bottom right add a "TEAM CONTEXT: THE SMOKE-WALKERS" panel with exactly 3 small standing character figures together.

Visual style: Highly detailed cinematic concept art, dark cyberpunk wasteland fashion, gritty realistic rendering, technical production design sheet, dense but organized annotations, thin white labels, rain-speckled texture, high contrast metal highlights, realistic fabric fraying, heavy boots, straps, buckles, rivets, scratches, and smoky supernatural energy. Keep all text in English, small and diagrammatic, with no logos or watermarks.

entries.title: Anime Idol Guitarist Contact Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an ornate anime-style character sheet collage of an anonymous idol guitarist performing on a warm theatrical stage, with the character's face deliberately obscured by a soft square blur in every panel.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 composition, dark vintage film-contact-sheet design with thin gold borders, decorative corner flourishes, and a black-gold cinematic frame. Use a warm amber, brown, cream, and black palette with glowing stage light.

Layout: Use exactly 7 image panels total: 1 large dominant portrait panel on the left occupying most of the canvas, and 6 smaller numbered panels arranged around it. The small panels are labeled with gold numbers 1, 2, 3 on the right column from top to middle, and 4, 5, 6 along the bottom row. Include decorative filmstrip motifs on the far left, a small gold crown icon near the upper left, a small sparkle icon mid-left, and a circular star emblem near the lower left. Every panel has rounded black borders with fine gold outlines.

Subject details: The same anime young woman appears in all 7 panels. She has short chestnut-brown bob hair with bangs and small hair clips, a blurred square face, slim build, and idol-band styling. Outfit: cream puff-sleeve blouse with ruffled neckline, brown ribbon bow at the chest, black choker, black guitar strap, high-waisted brown plaid pleated skirt, belt with round buckle, white thigh-high stockings, small gold accessories, and wrist cuffs. She holds a glossy black electric guitar with white pickguard and sings into a black microphone on a stand.

Panel count and contents: Panel 1 large left panel shows a three-quarter full-body pose with microphone in her left hand, guitar across her hips, confident stage stance. Panel 2 top-right shows a closer waist-up singing pose with the guitar neck extending right. Panel 3 mid-right shows a similar waist-up pose with the microphone angled toward her mouth. Panel 4 lower-right-middle shows the character slightly lower in frame with warm curtains behind her. Panel 5 bottom-left small panel shows a close crop with microphone and guitar body. Panel 6 bottom-center small panel shows her centered with microphone stand and guitar neck. Panel 7 bottom-right small panel, labeled 6, shows a more energetic pose with the guitar raised diagonally and a small drawn motion mark near her head.

Background and lighting: Each panel shows the same stage setting with tall golden-orange curtains, dark stage rigging, and a bright triangular spotlight behind the performer creating a halo-like backlight. Use dramatic rim light, glossy highlights on the guitar, cinematic shadows, and fine anime illustration detail.

Constraints: Keep the composition as a polished character reference/contact sheet, not a real photograph. Preserve exactly 6 numbered thumbnail labels plus the large unnumbered main panel. Do not add extra characters, extra text, logos, watermarks, or readable captions beyond the small gold numbers.
entries.description: A structured prompt for generating an ornate anime stage-performance character collage with one large main panel and six numbered thumbnail panels.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的时尚条目《Anime Idol Guitarist Contact Sheet》。 关键词：portrait、cinematic。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Custom Japanese Itasha Vehicle Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an original Japanese itasha vehicle based entirely on the uploaded illustration. Design a fully fictional car and manufacturer naturally born from the artwork's universe, never resembling real vehicles or brands. The design must adapt to the illustration itself: cute rounded styling for soft fantasy or shrine themes, elegant luxury styling for regal worlds, aggressive mechanical styling for cyberpunk or military themes, sporty styling for energetic characters, mystical styling for magical worlds, or retro-futuristic styling for nostalgic sci-fi. Body shape, proportions, cockpit, wheels, headlights, aero parts, glowing elements, materials, and interior must visually match the illustration's atmosphere, colors, fashion, architecture, magic, and technology. All decals, logos, symbols, typography, crests, and sponsor-style graphics must be fully original fictional designs inspired only by the illustration. If a character exists, place them naturally beside the vehicle. Cinematic automotive photography, anime-inspired photorealism, masterpiece quality.

entries.title: Blue Celestial Anime Girl Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: full-body anime character design sheet style, centered single girl standing in a neutral front-facing pose on a plain white paper-like background, delicate clean ink lines with soft watercolor and colored-pencil rendering, pastel celestial magical-girl fashion, a petite teenage girl with very long flowing ice blue hair reaching past her knees, straight bangs, pointed elf-like ears, and a dreamy fantasy aesthetic; her face is mostly obscured by a soft blur block. She wears 2 crescent-moon hair ornaments on top of her head, 2 dangling star-chain hair accessories, and small star accents around the hair. Outfit: a short puff-sleeve dress in sky blue and white with a fitted bodice, white ruffled blouse sleeves, Peter Pan collar, front buttons, and a large oval gemstone brooch at the chest; a flared skirt with white ruffle hem decorated with exactly 2 large crescent moons near the lower left and right hem, 1 large central white star, and multiple small yellow stars scattered across the skirt. Add 2 hanging star charms from the waist, frilled wrist cuffs on both wrists, white thigh-high stockings with exactly 4 visible blue star motifs across both legs, and blue high heels with ankle bows and star decorations on the toes. Behind her, place 1 large translucent iridescent bubble halo and 4 small glowing sparkles near the lower body. The overall palette is pale blue, white, and soft gold, with a whimsical moon-and-stars theme, elegant symmetrical costume design, and polished high-quality anime concept art presentation.

entries.title: UR Fox Priestess Fantasy Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A luxurious fantasy trading card illustration in a premium anime gacha style, vertical format with an ornate gilded frame and jewel insets, designed like an ultra-rare character card. The card shows a full-body shrine maiden priestess named カヤ / KAYA standing slightly right of center in an enchanted pink-and-lilac sacred grove with cherry blossoms, glowing lantern light, mist, a small waterfall, and shrine architecture in the background. She is a beautiful elegant young woman with very long flowing soft pink hair, fox ears, and a white fox mask worn tilted on the side of her head, partially obscuring the upper face area with ceremonial styling. Her outfit is an elaborate layered kimono and priestess robe in pink, rose, plum, and gold with intricate embroidery, armored shoulder pieces, braided cords, paper talismans, decorative tassels, and glowing jewel ornaments. She holds an ornate ritual staff topped with rings, charms, ribbons, and multiple large purple crystal orbs. Beside her on the left sits a divine white fox spirit with nine large luminous tails and delicate gold vine-like markings. The whole image is filled with magical sparkles, soft bloom lighting, shimmering particles, and ethereal pink light effects.

The card layout must include exact visible sections and labels. At the top center, a dark plaque with gold trim reads "神異 - Divine Anomaly -". At the top left, a huge gradient rarity mark reads "UR" with 7 gold stars directly below it. On the left side, include 4 stacked black-and-gold attribute panels with icons and bilingual labels: 1) droplet icon, "属性", "水・祈", "WATER + PRAYER"; 2) fox head icon, "守護神", "黄金の蔓の白狐", "Golden Vine White Fox"; 3) praying hands icon, "役割", "祈癒・支援", "Heal Support"; 4) circular sigil icon, "スキル", "祈灯結界", "Prayer Light Barrier". At the bottom center, a large nameplate reads "カヤ / KAYA" and beneath it the subtitle "東の里の巫女 / Priestess of the Eastern Village". Along the bottom edge, include 5 stat panels with icons and values in this exact order: ATK 760, DEF 690, SPD 820, MAG 960, SUP 990.

Use a highly polished collectible-card aesthetic, dense ornamental filigree, engraved gold borders, gemstone corners, dramatic fantasy lighting, ultra-detailed costume design, soft painterly anime rendering, luminous magical atmosphere, and rich pink, gold, ivory, and violet color harmony. The final image should feel like a high-rarity sacred fox oracle card, majestic, mystical, elegant, and premium.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium ultra-rare anime-style fantasy character card, ideal for gacha game mockups, collectible card art, and ornate RPG character showcases.

entries.title: Gothic Visual Novel Character Lineup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark fantasy visual novel screenshot in polished anime game art, showing 4 girls standing side by side inside a dim, old-fashioned crimson prison mansion lounge with deep red walls, dark wood paneling, a lit fireplace in the center background, and two warm wall lamps glowing on either side. The composition is a front-facing character lineup cropped around the knees, with ornate black filigree shadows and UI decoration around the frame, a silver crest emblem in the top left, interlocking gear motifs in the top right, and a small rounded "Auto" button in the bottom left. Put a Japanese dialogue subtitle across the lower center reading "--エマとシェリー、ハンナが同席だった。" in white Mincho-style text with a subtle glow. The overall mood is gothic, mysterious, and elegant, like a steampunk-inflected otome or dark academy visual novel. Show exactly 4 female characters. Character 1 on the far left: a blonde young woman in a simple white dress with a brown belt, long yellow gloves, and a royal blue hooded cape draped over her shoulders, holding a tall staff topped with a circular metallic ornament containing a glowing pale blue orb and a dangling red crystal; she has a red jewel set on her forehead and a calm upright posture. Character 2 second from left: a cheerful blue-haired girl with bright orange eyes, short twin-tied or bobbed hair adorned with blue roses and ribbons, wearing a small black hat with lace and bows, a navy-and-white layered outfit with capelet, oversized sleeves, bows, a blue plaid skirt, and a crossbody satchel; she smiles openly and holds a small handheld magnifying glass up near her chest. Character 3 second from right: a soft-looking white-haired girl with a short bob that fades to pink at the tips, pink eyes, a black hair clip and flower accessory, wearing a black-and-white outfit with a vest-like top and voluminous translucent sleeves decorated with pale pink blossoms; she gently holds a pink gem pendant or brooch near her collar and smiles subtly. Character 4 on the far right: an ornate doll-like girl in an elaborate green-and-cream layered dress with lace, bows, petal-like trims, white feathered or wing-like accents near the shoulders, and a lavish bonnet covered in flowers, ribbons, and netting; she holds a white lotus-like flower fan or bouquet in front of her torso. Use detailed anime facial rendering, glossy eyes, refined costume textures, crisp linework, warm rim lighting from the lamps and fireplace, and a slightly vignetted, game-screenshot presentation.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished anime visual novel scene with four distinct girls posed in a dark gothic mansion interior, ideal for game mockups, story screenshots, or character ensemble illustrations.

entries.title: Monochrome Anime Gothic Dress Girl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime fashion illustration of a slim young woman standing front-facing in a neutral pose against a clean light gray-white background, centered like a character design sheet. She has very long straight silver-white hair that falls past her waist, with soft layered bangs covering one eye and long side sections framing the face. The style is refined, soft-shaded, and highly polished with delicate linework, subtle fabric folds, and a modern idol-goth aesthetic. She wears a short white and pale gray ruffled dress with 8 visible black front buttons, puff short sleeves, frilled sleeve hems, frilled shoulder straps, a square neckline with a small black ribbon bow at the chest, and a layered asymmetrical skirt with multiple airy ruffle tiers. Around her neck is a frilled lace choker. At the waist is a wide black belt with a large silver circular ring buckle and 1 hanging strap ending in a metal ring. She wears 2 black fingerless gloves with frilled cuffs and silver bracelet details, 2 white thigh-high stockings, and 2 black garter straps clipped from the skirt to the stockings, one on each thigh. Her shoes are glossy black Mary Jane heels with ankle straps and small bows on the toes. Add a small dangling cross earring on the visible ear. Keep the palette mostly monochrome white, gray, black, and silver, with a soft elegant mood and a clean studio presentation.

entries.title: Punk Pink Anime Girl Full-Body Render
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body anime-style 3D virtual idol girl viewed from a high angle, standing on a plain light gray studio background with a soft cast shadow to the lower right. She has long straight blue-green teal hair reaching past her waist, with blunt bangs, 2 large black ribbon bows on her head, and a dramatic red spider-lily-style floral hair accessory on one side. Her face is cute and youthful, with a trendy alt-idol gyaru-goth aesthetic, and she is posing with 1 raised hand making a peace sign close to her face while the other arm rests naturally by her side. Outfit: an oversized pink top with 2 black horizontal stripes on each sleeve and distressed black graphic print across the chest, layered under a black strappy harness dress or camisole with metal studs; a pink plaid pleated mini skirt with frayed hem; 2 black belts at the waist with silver rings and chain details; 1 hanging plush keychain pouch attached at the hip; 1 black choker and multiple layered silver necklaces. Legwear: 2 matching pink-and-black striped loose leg warmers or thigh-high coverings, with one black garter strap visible on the upper thigh. Footwear: 2 chunky black platform shoes with metal hardware. The overall fashion is Japanese jirai kei, punk, and gothic streetwear in pink and black, with glossy fabric, metallic accessories, and highly detailed clothing textures. Clean character render, crisp lighting, high detail, stylized proportions, polished game-avatar quality, centered composition.

entries.title: Celestial Dynasty World Bible Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the visual foundation, expand the single sky-palace scene into a complete cinematic world-building presentation for a fantasy civilization. Preserve the same East Asian celestial imperial design language, floating architecture above clouds, gilded ornamentation, warm sunset lighting, and ultra-detailed realistic concept-art look, then turn it into a polished multi-panel lore board on a dark background with elegant editorial typography. Include 8 labeled sections: 1 large hero overview panel for the civilization, 1 architecture section with 9 images, 1 characters section with 7 full-body character designs, 1 clothing and armor section with 6 outfit variations, 1 vehicles and transport section with 4 vehicle designs, 1 world map section with 1 illustrated map, 1 environments section with 6 environment images, and 1 culture and details section with 6 close-up detail images. Add a refined fantasy title and short lore paragraph for the civilization, using the name Celestial Dynasty. The architecture section should show 9 distinct items: palace, temple, gate, pillar, bridge, throne hall, garden, library, and observatory. The characters section should show 7 archetypes: emperor, empress, high priest, general, royal guard, scholar, and artisan. The clothing and armor section should show 6 designs: ceremonial robe, battle armor, noble attire, priest robes, artisan garments, and dancer costume. The vehicles and transport section should show 4 designs: an airship, a flying beast mount, a sky chariot, and a ceremonial palanquin. The environments section should show 6 scenes: one wide banner panorama plus 5 smaller locations, including forest, mountain peaks, lotus valley, golden fields, and a celestial port. The culture and details section should show 6 images: dragon motif, lantern or artifact, palace interior, scholarly scene, mechanical instruments, and decorative symbols. Keep all panels visually unified as if from one official franchise world bible, with extremely rich detail, believable material design, and cinematic realism.
entries.description: This prompt turns one reference scene into a complete fantasy civilization pitch board with architecture, characters, costumes, vehicles, map, environments, and cultural details for concept development or franchise worldbuilding.

entries.title: Couture Fashion Design Concept Board
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Fashion design sketch / haute couture design page, themed inspiration from beetle. The layout is a professional fashion design board: the center is a full-body standing real female model with a realistic skin texture and high-end fashion photography atmosphere, wearing an haute couture gown inspired by the beetle. The silhouette is slim long dress. The design should extract colors, geometric shapes, and textures from the inspiration object into the skirt, bodice, embroidery, and fabric details.

Layout requirements: Top left features an exquisite hand-drawn inspiration sketch or illustration of the beetle; the right side features black and white technical line drawings of the gown with handwritten notes in English/French style about fabric and tailoring. The background is clean white with designer signatures and studio annotations, presenting a professional fashion design sheet / couture concept board visual.

Style requirements: Fusion of realistic model and high-end design manuscript. The subject and fabric details are extremely refined, featuring a mixed texture of soft watercolor and digital illustration. Lighting is soft and uniform. 4K ultra-clear, high aesthetic, suitable for brand-level fashion proposals.

Inspiration theme: Beetle
Aspect ratio: 3:4
entries.description: A professional fashion design template for creating high-fashion gowns inspired by specific themes, featuring sketches, technical lines, and real models.

entries.title: Pastel Sweet Lolita AI Doll
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a full-body front-facing 2D fashion doll / anime-inspired dress-up character on a vertical 2:3 canvas, standing in a glossy pastel candy stage. The character is a cute young female AI doll with a deliberately blank smooth face with no eyes, nose, or mouth, light skin, and warm caramel brown hair styled into exactly two high curled twin tails with ringlet curls and small bangs mostly hidden by accessories. She wears an elaborate sweet lolita idol outfit in mint green, cream, pink, yellow, and turquoise: a floral candy headband with many tiny bows, pearls, beads, flowers, and pastel dessert charms; a cream puff-sleeve blouse with pink edging; one large yellow bow at the chest with a turquoise gem center; a mint corset bodice with brown trim and pink crisscross lacing; a short layered cupcake skirt with exactly four visible ruffle tiers in cream, pink, yellow, and lace-trimmed pastel layers, decorated with tiny sprinkles, bows, hearts, and dessert ornaments; white thigh-high lace stockings with pink ribbon lacing; and pink platform Mary Jane heels with heart decorations and pastel straps. Count the main symmetrical elements clearly: 2 curled twin tails, 2 puff sleeves, 1 chest bow, 1 corset, 4 skirt ruffle tiers, 2 thigh-high stockings, 2 pink platform shoes, 2 large spiral candy-cane columns in the background, and 2 round pink heart medallions behind her. Pose her standing gracefully with one leg crossed forward, arms lowered slightly outward, fingers relaxed, like a collectible dress-up doll. Background: a high-key pastel confectionery set with a mint-and-cream checkerboard tiled wall, twisted mint-yellow candy columns forming an arch, pink heart disks on both sides, glossy pale pink floor, soft studio lighting, dreamy overexposed highlights, clean kawaii aesthetic, highly detailed fabric textures, lace, ribbons, beads, plastic-doll smoothness, sharp full-body composition. Use polished Japanese 2D anime doll fashion illustration with realistic costume detail. Avoid text, logos, watermark, extra characters, and facial features.

entries.title: Gothic Angel Demon Couple
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dark, highly detailed gothic anime illustration of two androgynous punk-lolita characters seated close together in an ornate candlelit Victorian room. The left character is a tall slim demon-like young man with messy black hair, pale skin, exposed chest and abs under sheer black lace, layered chokers and necklaces with cross and pentagram pendants, many rings, black leather pants with zippers, belts, chains, buckles, and a deep navy-black fur-trimmed jacket; one large black bat wing rises behind his left shoulder. The right character is a petite gothic lolita girl leaning against him, with long wavy dark brown hair braided and decorated with many tiny pink bows and heart clips, wearing a black lace bodice, pink ribbons, layered pink-and-black tutu skirt, fishnet stockings, strapped platform boots, chains, star charms, and an oversized pale pink fur-trimmed coat; one pale feathered angel wing is visible behind her right shoulder. Count exactly two visible wings total: one black bat wing on the left character and one pale feathered wing on the right character. Their faces are intentionally hidden by soft-edged opaque brown rectangular censor blocks, one larger rectangle over the taller character's face and one smaller rectangle over the girl's face. Use a moody romantic composition, close cropped vertical portrait, bodies intertwined, luxurious gothic accessories, lace textures, metallic chains, leather straps, fur, bows, crosses, pentagrams, hearts, and star charms. Background: dim antique interior with gilded picture frames, dark wallpaper, and a few tall candles glowing on the right. Lighting is low-key and cinematic, with warm candle highlights and cool purple-black shadows, ultra-detailed digital painting, dramatic dark fantasy fashion editorial atmosphere, black, midnight blue, dusty pink, mauve, and candlelit gold.

entries.title: Japanese Office Outfit Magazine Spread
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the outfit and model reference, transform it into a bright Japanese fashion-magazine outfit feature page for an office commute look. Keep the same sheer brown blouse and white floral jacquard skirt as the core styling, but rebuild the scene as a clean editorial collage on an off-white background with soft blush-pink accents, thin rounded boxes, handwritten-style English annotations, sparkles, and elegant Japanese typography. Create exactly 3 main photos of the same outfit: 1 full-body outdoor commuting shot on the left with a beige handbag and black pumps, 1 seated office-desk laptop scene in the center, and 1 standing office scene on the right holding a dark folder. Add the article title OLかえでさんの 褒められ通勤 Style, the subtitle 可愛さもきちんと感も叶える♡大人の華やかフェミニンコーデ, and a vertical side catchphrase 透け感ブラウスでつくる、上品あざと可愛い通勤コーデ♡. Include exactly 3 outfit detail cards on the right labeled Point 01, Point 02, and Point 03: Point 01 shows a circular close-up of the sheer blouse neckline, Point 02 shows a circular close-up of the white floral skirt texture, and Point 03 shows a circular two-color palette swatch for brown and off-white. Add exactly 2 small profile/rule sections near the top right: a profile box for KAede with 27歳・都内勤務のOL, and a pink circular 'My Rules!' note. Add exactly 1 pink circular 'Fashion Tips' badge at bottom left with 3 checklist items, and exactly 1 'Today's Schedule' timeline along the bottom with 4 entries: 8:30 出勤, 10:00 会議, 13:00 ランチ, 18:30 退勤後. Make it look like a polished Japanese web article thumbnail or social-media magazine spread, preserving the reference outfit while changing the background, poses, and layout into an informational fashion guide.
entries.description: Generates a polished Japanese fashion-magazine collage from a reference outfit, ideal for showcasing commute styling and clothing details.

entries.title: Relaxed Woman on Sofa Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft, desaturated anime-style illustration of a young woman lounging on a light-colored sofa in a quiet indoor living room, shown in a vertical composition. She has long, slightly messy wet-looking dark brown hair with loose strands falling over her shoulders and chest, a small earring visible on one ear, and a relaxed, drained pose with her head tilted and resting against one hand. Her face is obscured by a flat square censor block in muted taupe-gray centered over the face area. She wears an oversized off-shoulder white shirt slipping low across her body, exposing one thin black camisole strap, with bare legs folded casually on the sofa. Her posture should feel limp and unforced, with a natural sense of loosened tension. In the foreground, place 2 tabletop objects: 1 black mug and 1 closed thick book or binder stacked near the edge of a small table. In the background, include 1 potted leafy houseplant on the left and sheer pale curtains behind the sofa. Use a muted palette of warm gray, cream, off-white, dusty charcoal, and pale taupe, with sketchy pencil-like linework, delicate watercolor wash shading, airy negative space, and a calm intimate mood like a fashion-lifestyle editorial illustration.

entries.title: Photoreal Valentine Idol Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed photorealistic portrait of a young Japanese woman styled like an elegant idol-inspired Valentine character, shot indoors in a luxurious vintage room with warm afternoon sunlight streaming through tall windowpanes behind her. She is seated or leaning forward toward the camera, extending both hands to offer a round red gift box of assorted chocolates in the foreground, creating a slightly intimate first-person perspective. Her face is mostly hidden by her short wavy bob haircut and downward tilt of the head, giving a shy, gentle, mysterious mood. She has soft ash brown with subtle green-tinted ends hair in a chin-length tousled bob with glossy texture, and wears a deep wine-red beret with a ribbon and a beige polka-dot bow on the right side. Her outfit is a rich dark burgundy gothic-lolita inspired dress with a sleeveless high-neck halter bodice, sheer patterned fabric, black lace trim, fine gold accents, a small heart-shaped jewel at the collar, matching detached arm warmers with translucent ruffled cuffs, frilled wrist accessories, dangling heart earrings, and delicate chain decorations around the waist. The chocolate box is round and red, tied with a metallic gold ribbon, and contains exactly 8 visible chocolates in black dividers, including one red heart-shaped piece and 7 assorted square or rounded pralines. The setting includes soft floral arrangements, antique decor, and a crystal chandelier bokeh in the background. Use cinematic shallow depth of field, strong backlighting, realistic skin and fabric rendering, subtle lens bloom, warm amber highlights, rich shadows, and an upscale fashion editorial style that feels like a real-life adaptation of an elegant mature idol with a romantic Valentine theme. Emphasize exquisite costume craftsmanship, a slightly cosplay-like but premium studio-photo realism, and a refined, wistful atmosphere.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic fashion-style portrait of a young woman in a burgundy Valentine idol costume offering a chocolate gift box in a warm vintage interior.
